If we’re going to flip the Senate, we need to defend all of our vulnerable Democrats and flip every competitive seat. **That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 more before midnight.**
If we fall short, Republicans will see it as a green light to flood these states with even more dark-money ads and smear campaigns. They’ve already booked airtime, lined up big fundraisers and have the resources to pour MILLIONS into flipping these seats.
But if we close this gap before midnight, it sends a message they can’t ignore — that grassroots Democrats are organized, energized and ready to fight for every voter and every inch of ground.
So this is it. The last hours before midnight. The final sprint before Republicans flood the field.

But if we close this gap before midnight, it sends a message they can’t ignore — that grassroots Democrats are organized, energized and ready to fight for every voter and every inch of ground. So this is it. The last hours before midnight. The final sprint before Republicans flood the field. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = Let’s finish strong — together. — Kirsten Gillibrand * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: The clock is ticking as Dems fight to save the ACA. What you need to know.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITSxjytRqnk5Se65PvvR0SC1Vi60eIcmGaf4kR6MPJnbRGd2XwIrhDn8ZZ-Z4PPuO0Vx2PdmM8zh_l0Ht__s0eBKXYt4Eycix_X0du3HGPAvzc4MotXOTXWEO3i9074KBEJk7msA_sSWBeyxgjeidHqlTjElJGy-MrvBTcjegAUedUZlFtvP3NjysIVMZBYyJPawr65buwkPggc7E65HJwh6i2rb8yfrLxc-Jz2CmwWJo/4l1/jVz7G9L5ThmkUOTySAQOPA/h0/h001.qFIGq9NFxM1fsRidW3syPVdvxCJP5IlvIGPbOXx_Co4)
---
Peter, If Congress doesn't act immediately, the ACA tax credits will expire one week from today. Here's what that means for your family: If you get healthcare from the exchange currently, or you're planning to sign up for health insurance through the exchange, you'll no longer be able to count on these tax credits to offset the cost. A lot of people will choose not to renew their plans. And as healthy people withdraw from the program, the rates go up for EVERYONE else - whether you use the exchange or not. **Some premiums could skyrocket by more than 100%.** What's infuriating is that anyone could see the train coming down the tracks - and yet my opponent, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez doesn't seem to think it's an emergency. Last month she told Republicans she was ready to vote for their bill that would lock in devastating healthcare cuts and give up the only leverage we have to force MAGA to the table. Then last week she published an op-ed shaming Democrats for holding the line and telling us to surrender for the sake of bipartisanship! Is she kidding?? [**I 'm running for Congress because when it comes to healthcare, I will fight like a junkyard dog to protect what we have and expand coverage to EVERYONE. Donate now to help me defeat MAGA supporting Marie.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUCCYqRdLcWA3NKcbRbGtwPuNBzPjYOKf95XSCx7aQpv7a72WoGCXBGzbv6fv3RJmLh92WJVztPwOX9Nuuk8Y_xBBLvpzd0iyYeCo8W3OWPCnS7KC3_zJCjgrIMc4ICM0giQ-AP6vBLwMXTEJmJ0U7j5_18cBHzLF-5tZnfKpKwSyZApMvrJWEH9A3rCedz4bY6xotNQJUPgmi_omhODeCbKsHZqZAgQhX0QcsaCoKZjL8IvZ6gEDE8QcXTF_k7wjTvnaH6MgzFHVN-NgHojgTKVEAnkliQA5ymUq4tNJCd7vZDzyjIGkGXAjwLHXHiiEK8/4l1/jVz7G9L5ThmkUOTySAQOPA/h1/h001.Of4QHVTzsJHpttDVOT551fBjhQcO6xNWSrep7Rsdyts) If these tax credits aren't renewed, families could see their premiums increase at least $1,500 - $15,000 per year - not to mention other out of pocket medical expenses. That's money they need for bills, groceries, or saving for college, predatory student loan payments, housing, or retirement. As a working-class dad, I know how much families depend on affordable healthcare.

**I know what it 's like to worry about medical bills piling up.** Marie should be fighting for us, but she isn't. She doesn't get it, she seems to think losing your healthcare isn't a big deal.

But I know that people don't stop getting sick when they lose their health insurance. Already **60,000 people die every year from lack of health insurance**. That number will only go up if Marie gets her way. We have to hold the line on healthcare, this fight is too important. But we can't stop there. **I 'm running for Congress because I believe healthcare is a human right.** When elected, I will fight like hell to pass universal healthcare and make sure EVERYONE is covered. [**Don 't let Marie sell you out. Donate to our campaign and join our fight for healthcare for ALL.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUCCYqRdLcWA3NKcbRbGtwPuNBzPjYOKf95XSCx7aQpv7Q8LQHPYwN-SeLp-axwSu73V2QzHzzJJw-33izgKGIR71tfCF7qZihRs3AlwzwxRN3sj2gzGgCDLQM2gS_8w4LgIg2ck2VDPqSwCpbRzFsw93jfvMf7VZvSk4r8STX7BlZ2dYKMYKLzBv7928iU1lyTEKuRH8PM57R29kO_sfdt4P6Wsy3vVX0e01D6V8p02ETic4LlnHu7FApizvOzykkmE6UWZMLDrBJSf67HqHa_yQAR8VSpdq_tkbWci1Jc7WNRJEGJnwZ3bNVVxYNOxJbY/4l1/jVz7G9L5ThmkUOTySAQOPA/h2/h001.nKNXYKqBPjW4ffxCM75z40lFP0UN2OiqSge1uLOayxc) Let's Heal Washington!
Brent Hennrich
Democrat for Congress, WA-03

clean_body: | | Peter, If Congress doesn't act immediately, the ACA tax credits will expire one week from today. Here's what that means for your family: If you get healthcare from the exchange currently, or you're planning to sign up for health insurance through the exchange, you'll no longer be able to count on these tax credits to offset the cost. A lot of people will choose not to renew their plans. And as healthy people withdraw from the program, the rates go up for EVERYONE else - whether you use the exchange or not. Some premiums could skyrocket by more than 100%. What's infuriating is that anyone could see the train coming down the tracks - and yet my opponent, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez doesn't seem to think it's an emergency. Last month she told Republicans she was ready to vote for their bill that would lock in devastating healthcare cuts and give up the only leverage we have to force MAGA to the table. Then last week she published an op-ed shaming Democrats for holding the line and telling us to surrender for the sake of bipartisanship! Is she kidding?? If these tax credits aren't renewed, families could see their premiums increase at least $1,500 - $15,000 per year - not to mention other out of pocket medical expenses. That's money they need for bills, groceries, or saving for college, predatory student loan payments, housing, or retirement. As a working-class dad, I know how much families depend on affordable healthcare. I know what it 's like to worry about medical bills piling up. Marie should be fighting for us, but she isn't. She doesn't get it, she seems to think losing your healthcare isn't a big deal. But I know that people don't stop getting sick when they lose their health insurance. Already 60,000 people die every year from lack of health insurance. That number will only go up if Marie gets her way. We have to hold the line on healthcare, this fight is too important. But we can't stop there. I 'm running for Congress because I believe healthcare is a human right. When elected, I will fight like hell to pass universal healthcare and make sure EVERYONE is covered. Let's Heal Washington! Brent Hennrich Democrat for Congress, WA-03 | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. Brent Hennrich is a lifelong Washingtonian, a proud working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. Chip in now to help elect a Democrat ready to stand up to MAGA. | | | | Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington ---|--- (C)2025 Brent Hennrich for Washington, all rights reserved Our mailing address is: Brent Hennrich for Washington PO BOX 820070 Vancouver, WA 98682 We hate to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can | | Sent via . clean_body: - My radical Democrat opponent is outspending us by OVER $10 MILLION! We MUST close the gap here! Abigail Spanberger has been getting HUGE donations from Soros-backed groups, Democrat organizations, and even megadonors with CCP ties. With help from her deep-pocketed friends, she's created a MASSIVE fundraising gap. Now, she's outspending us by OVER $10 MILLION! I'm coming to you as a Chrisitan, mother, Marine, and a conservative, asking for your help in my fight to defend our shared values. We cannot let Spanberger's rich pals be the reason we lose this race. put my faith in the Lord and I'm putting my trust in you. - no donation is too small! Please don't give up on our movement just as we're about to secure victory. Stand with me now and help me secure a BIG WIN in November and beyondThank you and may God bless you. -Winsome Earle-Sears | . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. Peter ,
All eyes are on Pennsylvania again, and for good reason.
This November, voters there will decide whether to retain three Democratic justices on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, the same court that protected voting rights in 2020 and struck down Republican gerrymanders in 2018.
If these justices lose their retention vote, the court would fall into a 2–2 deadlock, giving MAGA Republicans a chance to seize control ahead of the 2028 presidential election.
The GOP knows exactly what’s at stake. They’re already running ads urging voters to “vote NO” and calling these judges “radical left justices” because they remember what happened last time Pennsylvania’s courts upheld democracy – and they’re determined not to let it happen again.
We cannot let Donald Trump and his billionaire backers buy Pennsylvania’s courts. Will you chip in $15 today to help fund GOTV PAC’s direct work to help us protect Pennsylvania’s courts and defend democracy before the November election? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10242025]

Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

body:

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117944695/578163963/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTlkYTM5ZC0zOWIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jrlhlTKNeRHCJmafb_oo7c_El9ihlUrIFZShyE_ZJaI=&emci=272fc1f0-36b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=999da39d-39b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4925535)_ [_**If you'd like to donate to the INDems' Reorganization Fund, you can do so by clicking here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117944696/578163964/1764064610?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTlkYTM5ZC0zOWIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jrlhlTKNeRHCJmafb_oo7c_El9ihlUrIFZShyE_ZJaI=) ****
_Hoosiers Are Making Their Voices Heard on Redistricting and ‘No Kings’ Draws Tens of Thousands_
[__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117944697/578163965/-1275465983?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTlkYTM5ZC0zOWIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jrlhlTKNeRHCJmafb_oo7c_El9ihlUrIFZShyE_ZJaI=&emci=272fc1f0-36b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=999da39d-39b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4925535) Over the past three months, Hoosiers have made thousands of calls and sent thousands of emails against the Republican scheme to cheat and redraw our maps mid-decade. This week was another crucial week, with Governor Braun saying that a decision would have to come soon, as the latest a special session could be called would be in late November. Your calls are making an impact. But we can’t stop now — we must keep letting Republican senators know that they should listen to Hoosiers, not DC party elites. **Take a moment today to call your state senator and leave them a message against Redistricting: (317) 232-9400.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117944698/578163966/-730478672?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTlkYTM5ZC0zOWIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jrlhlTKNeRHCJmafb_oo7c_El9ihlUrIFZShyE_ZJaI=&emci=272fc1f0-36b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=999da39d-39b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4925535) On Saturday, millions of Americans gathered in cities and towns across the country to call for an end to Donald Trump’s authoritarian policies and power grabs. In Indiana alone, over 60,000 Hoosiers showed up to their local courthouse or to the Statehouse. Indiana is standing up and fighting back against the constitutional overreaches of this administration. ****_Republican Shutdown Threatening SNAP Benefits In Indiana and Across the Country_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117944699/578163967/1624788821?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTlkYTM5ZC0zOWIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jrlhlTKNeRHCJmafb_oo7c_El9ihlUrIFZShyE_ZJaI=&emci=272fc1f0-36b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=999da39d-39b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4925535) The Republican shutdown in Washington DC is now the second-longest shutdown in American history, and its impacts are being felt by Hoosier families. Just this week, we learned that over $100 million in SNAP benefits are on the chopping block for November. This puts extreme pressure on families and food banks across our state and country. Also, healthcare premiums under the ACA exchange are expected to rise by over 27% in Indiana. Hoosiers need a change from the backward priorities of this administration.
****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117944700/578163968/763284599?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTlkYTM5ZC0zOWIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jrlhlTKNeRHCJmafb_oo7c_El9ihlUrIFZShyE_ZJaI=&emci=272fc1f0-36b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=999da39d-39b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4925535) Throughout the government shutdown, Rep. Frank Mrvan has worked day-in and day-out to secure an end to this shutdown, and to protect healthcare and nutrition benefits that thousands of Hoosiers in Northwest Indiana rely on. This week, he went on the radio in Gary to reaffirm his commitment to the people of Northwest Indiana. Frank knows that we must protect affordable healthcare access for every Hoosier who needs it. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Hoosiers Are Making Their Voices Heard on Redistricting and ‘No Kings’ Draws Tens of Thousands Over the past three months, Hoosiers have made thousands of calls and sent thousands of emails against the Republican scheme to cheat and redraw our maps mid-decade. This week was another crucial week, with Governor Braun saying that a decision would have to come soon, as the latest a special session could be called would be in late November. Your calls are making an impact. But we can’t stop now — we must keep letting Republican senators know that they should listen to Hoosiers, not DC party elites. Take a moment today to call your state senator and leave them a message against Redistricting: (317) 232-9400. On Saturday, millions of Americans gathered in cities and towns across the country to call for an end to Donald Trump’s authoritarian policies and power grabs. In Indiana alone, over 60,000 Hoosiers showed up to their local courthouse or to the Statehouse. Indiana is standing up and fighting back against the constitutional overreaches of this administration. Republican Shutdown Threatening SNAP Benefits In Indiana and Across the Country The Republican shutdown in Washington DC is now the second-longest shutdown in American history, and its impacts are being felt by Hoosier families. Just this week, we learned that over $100 million in SNAP benefits are on the chopping block for November. This puts extreme pressure on families and food banks across our state and country. Also, healthcare premiums under the ACA exchange are expected to rise by over 27% in Indiana. Hoosiers need a change from the backward priorities of this administration. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Throughout the government shutdown, Rep. Frank Mrvan has worked day-in and day-out to secure an end to this shutdown, and to protect healthcare and nutrition benefits that thousands of Hoosiers in Northwest Indiana rely on. This week, he went on the radio in Gary to reaffirm his commitment to the people of Northwest Indiana. Frank knows that we must protect affordable healthcare access for every Hoosier who needs it. That’s why he’s standing strong for our Hoosier families in Congress. Information on County Party events, Town Halls, protests, volunteer opportunities, and more can be found on our Make Your Voice Heard! Submit Public Input on Upcoming Indiana Projects INDOT – INDOT is taking comments on its proposed upgrades and changes to the I-80/94 corridor in Northwest Indiana (FlexRoad), which is the busiest stretch of interstate in Indiana. Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Thursday, November 6th from 7-8 pm ET for a free virtual live training on So You Want to Run for Office. INDems IN the News IndyStar: WTHR: Indiana Capital Chronicle: * Indiana Capital Chronicle: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Guilded ballroom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Trump is holding paychecks hostage and literally turning the people’s house into a tacky palace to feed his own ego.
#
Donald Trump demolished part of the White House to build himself a tacky, gilded ballroom backrolled by billionaire donors — while millions of Americans are hurting from the Republican manufactured shutdown.
_I wish I were making this up._
[__](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251024-1.LtLol5&amount=5&%3Brefcode=em20251024-2437&t=1&akid=2437%2E21716%2EfTrBvR)
Trump is holding paychecks hostage and literally turning the people’s house into his own just to feed his inflated ego.
**Meanwhile, I’m in Congress doing what Delawareans sent me to do: protecting health care, standing up for working families, and fighting to make government work for all of us, not just the powerful few.** And it’s grassroots contributions from people like you — not billionaire donors — that power this work.
[**Can you pitch in right now? With a major fundraising deadline just days away, your support couldn’t come at a more critical time.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251024-1.LtLol5&refcode=em20251024-2437&amount=5&t=2&akid=2437%2E21716%2EfTrBvR)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251024-1.LtLol5&amount=5&refcode=em20251024-2437&t=21&akid=2437%2E21716%2EfTrBvR)**
Every donation will help keep me in this fight and help us put a real check on this president by taking back the House in 2026.
Thank you,
— Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251024-1&t=22&refcode2=2437_21716_fTrBvR&akid=2437%2E21716%2EfTrBvR)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=2437%2E21716%2EfTrBvR)

clean_body: We can't get complacent for even a moment | | | | | Patriot - It’s happening! A new poll came out from****Trafalgar/Insider Advantage, a Top Rated pollster showing the Republican nominee Jack Ciattarelli within 1% of Democrat Mikie Sherril in the race for Governor. Everything is coming together at the perfect time in New Jersey as my grassroots team of ballot chasers are barnstorming the state and banking thousands of Republican votes. But we can’t get complacent for even a moment. This race is so close that it could come down to just thousands, possibly hundreds of votes, and . Every day between now and Election Day, our focus is 100% on getting Republicans to return their mail-in ballots, vote early in person, and show up to the polls on Election Day. We are going all out on offense and I’m asking for sponsors from around the country to help fund our program. If we can’t fully execute our ballot chasing and get out the vote programs, the consequences could be catastrophic. I’m talking about tens of thousands of votes that very well could be the difference between victory and defeat. . Thank you, Scott Presler | | | | | | | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: JB Pritzker (via Democrats.org)
subject: Come and get me:
body:
---
Hi Derek, it’s JB Pritzker here. Trump’s deranged agenda is harming people in every corner of Illinois — as well as Americans in every other state in our great nation. Illinois is the top soybean-producing state in America. Trump’s tariffs are wreaking havoc on our farmers and agricultural economy — raising fertilizer costs, shutting off markets, and driving down farm incomes. This guy is unhinged. He’s insecure. He’s a wannabe dictator. He said I should be thrown in jail, along with Democratic leaders who’ve had the courage to stand up to him and his threats to our basic democratic principles. **I have one thing to say to Donald Trump: If you come for my people, you come through me. So come and get me.** Derek, Trump and his threats won’t scare me out of fighting back, and I hope that you won’t let them stop you, either. But to prevent him from having two more years of unchecked power, we need to make sure that Democrats up and down the ballot and across the country have the resources that they need to win in 2025, 2026, and beyond. The fact is that the DNC is the organization best positioned to distribute resources to the candidates, organizations, and state parties that need them most to win critical races. Now is not the time to stand on the sidelines; it’s time to make your voice heard. [**So, Derek, will you chip in $7 or whatever makes sense for you to the DNC today? Your contribution will help Democrats organize everywhere and fight back against the Trump administration.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251024_5006_fr&refcode2=5006_22930333_C-8eUe&akid=5006%2E22930333%2EC-8eUe) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251024_5006_fr&refcode2=5006_22930333_C-8eUe&akid=5006%2E22930333%2EC-8eUe)**

name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: Former President Obama is spot-on about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
“After years of complaining about cancel culture, the current administration has taken it to a new and dangerous level by routinely threatening regulatory action against media companies unless they muzzle or fire reporters and commentators it doesn’t like..."
#
**Former President Barack Obama is spot-on about this, Peter:**
_“After years of complaining about cancel culture, the current administration has taken it to a new and dangerous level by routinely threatening regulatory action against media companies unless they muzzle or fire reporters and commentators it doesn’t like. This is precisely the kind of government coercion that the First Amendment was designed to prevent — and media companies need to start standing up rather than capitulating to it.”_
**We cannot allow the Trump administration to keep attacking free speech.**
Media companies need to stand against these attacks. Elected officials need to take action to protect the sacred right to free speech. And today, we’re asking grassroots supporters like you to do your part too.
While the GOP lets Donald Trump get away with this, we need your help to elect Democrats who will work to END these attacks and RESTORE the ability for Americans to speak freely and express themselves. So please:

_What does one say to a two-year-old about this situation?_
She knows her Baba has been taken from us. She's knows he's stuck there, that he misses us and wants to come home. She knows that she has to drive a long way and wait a long time and go past guards and through narrow, strange hallways to see him, and even then she can't hug him and she can only hear his voice if she holds the big awkward phone just right. She knows I'm working to get him home, and in her tiny, earnest, two-year-old voice, she tells him that, over the cold black phones in the sterile, colorless visitor hall. "Mama's working to bring you home." He smiles at his beloved daughter, and I'm certain the ache in his heart is even greater than the ache in mine. It's heartbreaking.
On the drive home, she asks me why he can't come home. She asks why they took him from us.
I tell her, as simply and honestly as I can, it's because they're mean.
She asks, "What are they mean for?" She says, "Baba is good," and "he did nothing wrong." (Yes - to my own astonishment, she really is this conversational. She tells us long stories and grasps complex information. Yesterday she used the word "eventually," correctly, in context. Blows me away every time.)
I tell her, it's because right now they're paid money to be mean. (She knows about money, that we trade things we make or our time and effort for it, and use it to trade for things we're want and need to take care of ourselves and our families.) I tell her that they're paid money to be mean because we have a bad leader in this country right now.
That, she understands. She's developed a fascination for Lion King, and who can blame her - the story arc of the loss of a beloved parent and betrayal by a powerful, trusted figure would resonate deeply in her young mind right now. She asks me to retell and explain sections of the story over and over again, analyzing Scar's manipulation, Simba's grief and exile, "Hakuna Matata," and Simba's eventual return home to lead, once he learns the truth - that he's innocent of his father's death. We talk about good leaders, who understand and respect the circle of life and do their best to be a part of it and to bring life to everything they are responsible for -- and bad leaders, who are lazy, greedy, and arrogant, don't care about those who depend on them, and destroy everything good.
_Fairly relevant, wouldn 't you say? _
When Baba calls, she leans into the phone with her whole body and tells him how much she loves him. She tells him, again and again, that I'm working to get him home.
(Whenever I leave, for legal work or meetings, this is the simple reason I tell her for why I'm going. It's true. She understands.)
He tells her he loves her so much, sooo much. She smiles and sort of hugs herself as best she can.
I'm trying to make this smooth, I really am. I'm trying to be strong for them, but it ages me. I'm doing my best to contextualize this in a way that will strengthen her resilience, in the long run, rather than cripple her with trauma. I'm trying.
We just found the perfect, gentle preschool for her. Patient, inclusive, small, outdoor-based. Gentle, experienced teachers who aren't currently holding massive personal grief, trauma, fury, injustice, soul-loneliness, and a legal team's worth of work. The ability for her to feed the chickens and find frogs in the creek and swing on the swings with a playful young woman who is giving her complete and positive attention, is a godsend.
It's sanctuary, of a sort, to borrow their peace for her - to leave her safely there while I go work on the next legal filing or try to recover from the latest court rejection or work on the new website and media strategy or... all things that require focus and attention; which, once fulfilled, allow me to return to her, more emotionally present for having seen the work through to completion.
And then I consider the embodied luxuries of "emotionally present" and "focus and attention." My husband, her baba, is imprisoned, underfed, chronically sleep deprived and noise assaulted, in buildings with no windows, with no charges against him, with no power except his mind and mindset, with no time frame for release, and with no way out.
It's terrible. It's constant. I try not to dwell there overmuch. I say Alhamdulillah and I enjoy what I can and I keep going. I do the work and I care for the kids and I try my best to give them a good experience of childhood and family even in the midst of this.
Zahid calls, and he tells me the latest. Tonight, he said that with the recent mass takings at midnight, out of 116 men in his unit, they've *all* changed over since he's been there except him and one other person. He's been there the longest if anyone in his unit, now - he, who shouldn't even be there in the first place. He told me one staffperson was almost in tears, saying he shouldn't still be there - another salutes him every time he passes, and calls him Staff Sergeant. These are the people paid to keep him imprisoned.
Now, detainees are coming in and being deported within only a couple of days; it didn't used to be that way, but with the government shut down, nobody in power is watching too closely anymore.
The other day, a detainee collapsed during yard time - full collapsed, unconscious, spasming. My husband was a volunteer paramedic and he trained medics in the army, he went immediately to respond and start CPR but was yelled at by the guards to get back. The guards themselves did nothing. It wasn't until the fire department arrived _twenty minutes later_ that the man received CPR and a hospital transfer. Twenty minutes is an **Age** , in a medical emergency. Zahid was aghast that the guards were so slow to respond. The man stopped breathing. I don't know if he lived.
Two weeks ago, a detainee was awarded bond at his hearing on a Friday. The good news lately is that since the Federal Judge for the Western District of Washington decided on September 30th that "no jurisdiction" was an unlawful ruling, people actually have been getting awarded bond and getting out. (Hooray! Zahid applied for a new bond hearing under the new rules, which made his original "no jurisdiction" finding null and void. Then, yesterday, they rejected his motion. He's trying again.)
Since the new ruling - which, in case you're interested, is _Rodriguez-Vasquez v. Bostock_ \- Zahid has helped dozens of people apply for bond, who wouldn't otherwise know how. This particular detainee was one of his, and he was successful - he was awarded bond (yes!) on the Friday before the long weekend. His family, on the East Coast, missed the 5pm cutoff to get the money through, but they did send it, so it came on Tuesday or so. Friday of that following week, ICE apparently changed their mind (??!?), returned the bond money, and kept the man. Then, before Monday when the judge would hear his lawyer's urgent appeal for release and justice... he was transferred to another state. In the middle of the night, on a weekend, deliberately designed to induce maximum psychological whiplash and despair; vacate his pending cases, and make him start all over.
(Relatedly, take a look at _Trump v Casa_ , decided in June of '25, which effectively revoked a federal court's right to protect Americans (by using sweeping sanctions and injunctions with the power to block implementation of a bad law across the whole country just from one ruling) and - for the first time - limited their jurisdiction to only their small district. This ruling is a major component of the current active shredding of the rule of law in this country. So, when they moved this man to another facility at 2am on a Sunday, that facility is out of the Western District of Washington so the same new ruling doesn't apply. He's been completely deprived of jurisdiction AND due process and all this has been done to him AFTER he was AWARDED BOND.)
In the history classes, later, when they ask "But how bad was it, really?"
Tell them this. And tell them there were many, many more - just like it, or much, much worse .
Keep up the good work, team. And let me know if theres anything you need, or feel, or want to do or share. New folks welcome -- thank you for being here.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=176898188&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2ODk4MTg4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjEzNjIyMTUsImV4cCI6MTc2Mzk1NDIxNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.e81n2pbkX9XoffJ32TwlVScgge5jv-ip4dIsq91fObA)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWxpc3NhNGNvbmdyZXNzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.qAlxLR25coOkEQvaUnIR56x7TqJV0KpGy5mT5DZRao8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=176898188)
[Message Melissa Chaudhry](https://open.substack.com/chat/dm/user/240671627-melissa-chaudhry)
**Conclusion (with a gentle request)**
I'm writing this so my little ones will one day see exactly how we told the truth, held our ground, and chose life anyway. If you've read this far, you're part of that circle now. Thank you.
If you're able, here's how you can help us bring Baba home:
* [Chip in](https://substack.com/redirect/c400b764-a6fc-46ec-97ae-529e2fbe9d37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) what you can--even $10-$25 makes a real dent and helps keep our B daughter in her gentle preschool while I do all I can to support Zahid - legally, emotionally, and in the court of public opinion. (More coming soon, on that front.)
* Share this update with someone who will care. The more eyes, the more safety--and the faster we get him back.
* Send a note of support (two sentences is enough) that we can include in public-facing messages. It strengthens the record, puts pressure on the court, and reminds those with the power to free him that he has a whole community paying attention.

We'll keep working--filing, appealing, and building the public record--until our daughter can wrap both arms around her Baba again. Thank you for standing with us in love and in action - for Zahid, and for so many others.

Prepare Now: FBI reports your water supply is in danger
SHOCKING REPORT:

CHINA ATTACKS U.S. WATER SUPPLY

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=f97567d0f62934c741c5d7fcd6b160f80a9a1ea1d9d4d9097ab93b1ba850c4c85ead4d40b8faa76234cf05b9cf102bee5d42a261d00ceb95bb63e5ff5ac2be9a

FBI's Urgent Warning Has Been All Over The News

Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown.

Attacking city water systems, biding their time and waiting for China's signal to strike. Experts warn that Russia and Iran are also targeting attacks on our city water systems.

Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems that we trust to keep us safe.

Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link.

Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink.

We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants.

Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom...

But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.

If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable.

Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether.

It sounds harsh...

But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes.

Mistakes like...

Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.

If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water.

Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.

Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out.

Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.

Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it.

Well we have great news to share...

Folks have been calling...

Folks have been emailing...

Folks have been leaving Facebook messages asking about our just-released...

NEW AND IMPROVED...

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=f97567d0f62934c741c5d7fcd6b160f80a9a1ea1d9d4d9097ab93b1ba850c4c85ead4d40b8faa76234cf05b9cf102bee5d42a261d00ceb95bb63e5ff5ac2be9a
NEW Ultra-Fast MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System!

4X Faster Flow Rate for Perfect, Delicious Drinking Water

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=f97567d0f62934c741c5d7fcd6b160f80a9a1ea1d9d4d9097ab93b1ba850c4c85ead4d40b8faa76234cf05b9cf102bee5d42a261d00ceb95bb63e5ff5ac2be9a

But hurry – we have limited stock, and this MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System is first-come first-served. We only have a small number of units to go around.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=f97567d0f62934c741c5d7fcd6b160f80a9a1ea1d9d4d9097ab93b1ba850c4c85ead4d40b8faa76234cf05b9cf102bee5d42a261d00ceb95bb63e5ff5ac2be9a
Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!

The best part is...

This advanced filtration technology filters the nastiest, filthiest, bacteria-riddled and parasite infested water using no chemicals, no electricity and no moving parts!

It's powered by the same technology that the U.S. Military and NASA trust to filter their water. But now available for you in your home.

You're among the first to get access to these advanced, carbon-block water filters designed to filter water on your countertop at a sub-micron level without power or water hookup.

So you can reduce...

Harmful Bacteria – up to 99.9999%

Life-Threatening Viruses – up to 99.99%

Disease-Carrying Cysts – up to 99.9%

Plus, this table-top unit targets 140+ dangerous contaminants from your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, arsenic, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, VOCs and more.

All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in their homes.

The NEW & improved Filtration System may look the same...

But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. They're MORE reliable and easier to replace, too.

So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family.

But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while.

In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=f97567d0f62934c741c5d7fcd6b160f80a9a1ea1d9d4d9097ab93b1ba850c4c85ead4d40b8faa76234cf05b9cf102bee5d42a261d00ceb95bb63e5ff5ac2be9a
Now we've just got a fresh batch in.

And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out.

And YES there's an interest-FREE payment plan! Yes, right now, you can get your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System on a convenient, no-credit-check, interest-FREE payment plan. We know you're good for it.

You'll have the peace of mind knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=f97567d0f62934c741c5d7fcd6b160f80a9a1ea1d9d4d9097ab93b1ba850c4c85ead4d40b8faa76234cf05b9cf102bee5d42a261d00ceb95bb63e5ff5ac2be9a

Attacking city water systems, biding their time and waiting for China's signal to strike. Experts warn that Russia and Iran are also targeting attacks on our city water systems. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems that we trust to keep us safe. Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link. Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever. If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like... Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it. If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water. Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply. Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. name: Jake Warner
subject: Supreme Court heard free speech case
body:
The fight to keep men out of women’s sports isn’t over.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0f4gjqsqn5lc96grvupgdt2mdjoogoigks93lu0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cpge6ob4clh2bs)
Dear Fellow American, Trauma. Addiction. Depression. Personality disorders.

This world is full of people who need a trusted person to guide them through their mental health issues.

Kaley Chiles is a licensed counselor and committed Christian. Many of Kaley's clients come to her because they share her Christian worldview and faith-based values.

But Colorado law bans counselors from having private conversations with young clients that could help them regain comfort with their God-given sex--rather than pushing them one step closer to dangerous gender-transition drugs and surgeries.

Kaley has already had to start censoring herself to avoid potential fines of $5,000 for each offense and even the loss of her license.

This law violates freedom of speech. The government has no business censoring conversations between clients and counselors.

We are working with Kaley and other counselors to stop this government censorship. We're excited the U.S. Supreme Court heard oral arguments for this case on October 7th.

Will you stand with Kaley?

Click this link to stand with Kaley Chiles and her constitutional right to speak with clients about their shared faith-based values.

[https://adflegal.org/support/chiles-case-statement/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zppsls6asqq3a6s07i43ccf7k6q7jq7c6mgv6ua8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cpge6ob4clh2bs) For freedom, **Jake Warner** Senior Counsel

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: We have done the math
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
For just $4.59, you can LOCK IN another vote to SAVE New York!

For just $4.59, you can LOCK IN another vote to SAVE New York!
| Friend,
---
The polling is clear: Radical Communist Zohran Mamdani’s lead is shrinking as we get closer to Election Day.
---
**If we flood the ballot boxes with enough Republican votes between the start of early voting on October 25th and 9 P.M. on November 4th, he can be defeated.**
---
Since the fate of New York hangs in the balance, I’m leaving no stone unturned!
---
Per _Politico_ :
---
**“New York City Republican voters are going to be hearing from Rep. Elise Stefanik. The potential gubernatorial candidate is the face of a get-out-the-vote effort for Big Apple Republicans... Stefanik and the New York GOP are targeting Republican voters who turned out in the 2024 presidential election, but have _not_ cast ballots in mayoral elections.”**
---
My team has done the math: For roughly every **_$4.59_** we raise, we can get another likely Republican voter to the polls on or before Election Day and ensure their ballot is counted.
---
Trust me, it’s not easy or cheap to turn out voters like this. But the cost of failure is far greater.
---
**Not only will Mamdani impose his Marxist agenda on New York, but he’ll use his victory as a springboard to seek higher office...** **
---
_...Just like how an unknown left-wing community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama emerged from the shadows in 2004 – and just 4 years later, was sitting in the White House!_
---
Democrats already see Mamdani as the next Obama. In fact, Obama is calling him to offer advice and serve as his mentor.
---
Knowing what you know now, wouldn’t you gladly give $4.59 to _STOP_ Obama’s rise to power?
---
Well, this is your chance: There’s no better way to STOP Mamdani’s communist takeover than to lock in another vote to help SAVE New York, Friend.
---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: It is President Trump and you have me worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
It’s been a while since I heard from you.

| | | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7fl6dvrd1m6vqa1op721r2051esb7ntda1b3mg0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cpge6ob5c9h2bs)
---
# **_From Trump: You’ve got me worried_**
**__**

I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS, and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me.
I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you.
Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW...
_But I know you haven’t abandoned me._
I’m reaching out because **_YOUR NAME_** is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you.
**_[So could you take a quick second to reaffirm your support and give me your response to some important questions I have for you?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zck0rekdln02p5kl4bdpbce6b1kagtq6u36pq1i8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cpge6ob5c9h2bs)_**

[RESPOND TO TRUMP!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zamjtia57qjhc8pr5bplj856td96m5pql7nert60_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cpge6ob5c9h2bs)
**I know that you have never abandoned me and the MAGA Movement, but it’s been a while since I’ve heard from you...**
Please, I know that you’re a very busy person, but I could really use your response to some important questions that I have for you.
I have always taken into account YOUR thoughts, and I need them now more than ever.
[RESPOND TO TRUMP!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9oh77tqtofs6q10qs8krhiupfnpj32i28bbar8o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cpge6ob5c9h2bs)
THANK YOU.
\- President Donald J. Trump
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5ppe8q4dj3fotpiqjco85amhoabrcmua5366mkg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cpge6ob5c9h2bs)

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: His words are now our mission
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdjqhpvr2ure2r34ke0ec2ro33mavbil981cv5n0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cpgeepj2clh2bs)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zee2iqj8aju54dmdoq7sg2075nil53k79qa8r3t0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cpgeepj2clh2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z72ijhuko3gc9hp8hanqvlra6k738kjpj62hh7b0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cpgeepj2clh2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. [**Make your gift to join Turning Point USA today, and we'll send you your FREE copy of ****_How We Win_**** today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpcq66i0vsngsbh7n5oqgpv1thkvoi34gnno2460_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cpgeepj2clh2bs)
---

---
Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies. Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. **For Charlie,** **The Turning Point USA Team**
---

[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **['Mistress Dispeller' Is a Documentary About a Service Distinctive to China That's Described by the Title](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Unhappy partners can spend significant sums of money to ward off those who would break up their marriages. One such service is said to have had more than a million clients.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD01MzU0NjgifQ/LpC2DQwRK-2xLqb_2Bmifg)

[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/CJ2FIJPh4bR1h5vVqYCZNA)
# **[Democrats melt down over Trump's private-funded White House ballroom](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/CJ2FIJPh4bR1h5vVqYCZNA)**
---
President Donald Trump’s plan to build a grand new White House ballroom is underway, and the media and celebrity class have melted down into unhinged hysterics, per usual.In a segment on “The View,” former White House press secretary Karine Jean-Pierre resurfaced to join the madness, telling the always-rational panel that “the people’s house is basically being sold to the highest bidder.”“It is corruption at its core. And I heard someone say this when I was backstage. It could not be, there’s no greater metaphor right now than what’s happening right now in this country than watching Donald Trump take a wrecking ball to the White House,” she added.“But why do they let him get away with it? He has all of these people who just let him get away with whatever he wants to do,” Joy Behar chimed in.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/CJ2FIJPh4bR1h5vVqYCZNA)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Better Late Than Never, Film Forum Offers Chances To Get To Know the Work of Kevin Brownlow](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Over the next few weeks, Film Forum will be hosting a run of pictures that honor Brownlow’s efforts as documentarian and director, as well as films that had a decisive impact on his aesthetic.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)

What happens next in America's future will decide how NYC falls. Right now, Conservatives are at a massive fundraising disadvantage, and we have a short window to make things right and catch up to the massive war chest Democrats are building to unleash their Socialist uprising.

# **_From Trump: You’ve got me worried_**
**__**

I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS, and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me.
I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you.
Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW...
_But I know you haven’t abandoned me._
I’m reaching out because **_YOUR NAME_** is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you.
**_[So could you take a quick second to reaffirm your support and give me your response to some important questions I have for you?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgenabt4kh3ggllnt29ge6tk3p1g34l5fi1o8leg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cpie0o34cph2bs)_**

**I know that you have never abandoned me and the MAGA Movement, but it’s been a while since I’ve heard from you...**
Please, I know that you’re a very busy person, but I could really use your response to some important questions that I have for you.
I have always taken into account YOUR thoughts, and I need them now more than ever.
[RESPOND TO TRUMP!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z57ul1phm8qgq68jifcijklmll12bcusndp64hso_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cpie0o34cph2bs)
THANK YOU.
\- President Donald J. Trump

subject: 10.24.2025 Grassroots Insider

body:
The bi-weekly collection of all things grassroots! No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-qkllrht-didthutlhu-k/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkllrht-didthutlhu-r/) **October 24, 2025** Patriot,Last week, we saw so many touching tributes to the life and legacy of Charlie Kirk all across our great state and across the country. The impact of Charlie and his message of faith and freedom was clearly felt by his supporters. Let's continue to honor Charlie and his work by fighting for conservative values into 2026 and beyond!It's now more important than ever to get involved and connect with your local Republican Party. For events and opportunities to get involved, visit [wisgop.org/take-action](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkllrht-didthutlhu-y/). -Team WisGOP **Upcoming Events****10/24: Brown County Lincoln Reagan Trump Dinner
10/24-26: Tomah Gun Show
10/25: Milwaukee County Candidate Interest Meeting
10/25: Jackson County Downtown Trick or Treat and Trail of Terror
10/25: Green County Lincoln Day Dinner
10/25: Portage County Concealed Carry Training
10/27: Calumet County Conservative Citizens Meeting
10/27: Jackson County Member Meeting
10/28: UW La Crosse CR Meeting
10/30: Crawford County Member Meeting
10/30: Sheboygan County Young Conservatives Night
11/1: Monroe Conservative Breakfast Club
11/1: Quad County "Promises Made, Promises Kept" Rally
11/1: Eau Claire Member Meeting
11/1: Kenosha County Lincoln Day Dinner
11/3: Barron County Member Meeting
11/3: Jackson County Member Meeting
11/3: Polk County Member Meeting
11/4: Election Inspector Training Meeting
11/4: UW La Crosse CR Meeting
11/5: Waukesha County Pints and Politics
11/6: St. Croix Membership Meeting and Phone Bank
11/9: Monroe County 2nd Amendment Forum
11/11: Portage County Member Meeting
11/12: St. Croix Community Prayer
11/13: Taylor County Member Meeting
11/13: Waukesha County Movie Night
11/13: St. Croix Young Republican Meeting**
**11/15: Trempealeau County Member Meeting
11/15: Sauk County Member Meeting
11/15: St. Croix Candidate Development Workshop
11/17: Marathon County Member Meeting
11/17: Brown County Pints and Politics**
**11/18: Shawano County Member Meeting **
**11/18: Election Inspector Training Meeting
11/18: La Crosse County Member Meeting
11/18: UW La Crosse CR Meeting
12/7: St. Croix Bags/Cornhole Tournament****For more information, please visit:[wisgop.org/calendar/events/](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkllrht-didthutlhu-j/) ** **Barron County**
The Barron County Republicans organized a successful Freedom Ride to celebrate Charlie Kirk's birthday, God, liberty, and America, with twenty vehicles joining in on the ride! **Buffalo County**
Republicans in Buffalo County got together to celebrate and say farewell to a couple of their members moving out of state. It's incredible to see the power of a community built on conservative values! **Columbia County**
Columbia County Republicans got together for a night to remember Charlie Kirk on what would've been his 32nd birthday, complete with a cake and reflections on Charlie's fight to defend freedom and the Constitution. ** Dodge County**
Republicans in Dodge County held a successful Conservative Breakfast Meeting! **Kenosha County**
Kenosha County Republicans had a day of family fun at their Family Harvest Celebration! The day was complete with raffles, food trucks, face painting, a bounce house, and more! **Marathon County**
Republicans in Marathon County had an impressive turnout for their event to remember the life and legacy of Charlie Kirk! **Marinette County **
Republicans in Marinette County held a corn roast to discuss issues such as Governor Evers' attack on farmers, safe elections, and supporting law enforcement. Speakers included Congressman Tony Wied, State Senator Mary Felzkowski, Marinette County Sheriff Randy Miller, and more! **Milwaukee County**
Over 200 people gathered in Milwaukee County to celebrate the life and legacy of Charlie Kirk, joining countless others all over the country. **Monroe County**
Monroe County Republicans gathered for a Prayer Breakfast organized by Rep. Nancy VanderMeer. Attendees were able to hear from guest speaker Capt. Scott Southworth who shared how his faith inspired him to adopt three boys and give them a chance at life. **Brown County**
Brown County Republicans held their event to remember Charlie Kirk with speeches by former Governor Tommy Thompson, former Lt. Governor Rebecca Kleefisch, Rep. Tony Wied, and many others who gave touching tributes to Charlie and his impact! **Racine County**
Republicans came together in Racine County for their event to celebrate Charlie Kirk. Attendees included Racine and Kenosha County Young Republicans, Moms for Liberty, Turning Point USA, Republican Women of SE Wisconsin, the Kenosha GOP, Sen. Julian Bradley, and more! **Sauk County**
Sauk County's evening to remember Charlie Kirk was a hit with attendees, thanks in large part to the inspiring words of Pastor Randy Hoffman and all those who spoke about what Charlie and his message meant to them. Republicans in Sauk County also had lunch with AG candidate Eric Toney! **Shawano County**
Shawano County Republicans held their fall dinner with speeches by Sen. Eric Wimberger highlighting Gov. Evers' policy failures. **St. Croix County**
Republicans in St. Croix County got creative with their "No Kings but Jesus" Rally, which completely dwarfed the Democrat "No Kings" Rally down the street! They also hosted a United for Liberty Rally alongside TPUSA and AFP. **Walworth County**
Walworth County Republicans celebrated Elkhorn Oktoberfest following their candidate training meeting, featuring Sen. Steve Nass, Rep. Tyler August, and former Lt. Gov. Rebecca Kleefisch. **Waukesha County**
Republicans in Waukesha County have been busy! They have recently signed up new voters and new members at the Waukesha Gun Show and Waukesha Flea Market. They also held a Pints, Patriots, and Politics event at their HQ and attended Halloween celebrations in downtown Delafield with over 2,000 kids and their parents - good job Waukesha! **Winnebago County**
Winnebago County Republicans have been busy! They hosted a successful pints and politics event to discuss candidates and issues for 2026 in addition to their Charlie Kirk Prayer Vigil. Way to go Winnebago County! **Wood County**
Republicans in Wood County held their own Charlie Kirk Vigil with hundreds in attendance to celebrate his accomplishments and keep his flame alive. They also held an exciting event in Wisconsin Rapids with Congressman Derrick Van Orden, Sen. Patrick Testin, Rep. Scott Krug and special guest Congressman Jim Jordan! **Extra!**
The County Party Chairs of Adams, Juneau, and Wood Counties got together with WI GOP Regional Director Christina Estenson. It's great to see unity and collaboration within the party to help us win in 2026 and beyond! [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkllrht-didthutlhu-t/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkllrht-didthutlhu-i/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkllrht-didthutlhu-d/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkllrht-didthutlhu-h/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-qkllrht-didthutlhu-u/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-qkllrht-didthutlhu-o/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-qkllrht-l-b)
---|---|---

But it is Americans who are paying the price for the Democrats' indulgence in hateful tantrums and a willful lapse into political psychosis. Case in point: Senator Jon Ossoff in Georgia. How else can you explain Ossoff keeping the government shutdown in a futile effort to provide illegal aliens with free healthcare and other giveaways? Insanity! With your support, I will be working overtime to help Republicans WIN and to Get-Out-The-Vote in states like Georgia and across the Nation. name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: The Left feared this book
body:
Charlie didn't just talk about it. He built a movement that's changed history.

| | |
---
Friend, Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**

Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.

---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGOnDAMhp8m3BgFOyTDgUPVEVIPu9ceI5OYIVpIKAnD61dstw-wB0uWv9-fZPn3m32jsIT4fKeVe_cKds-2zLzwVCamnX2ZQx5T-rAgoa0bWUN7ZaDyvfMaoeK-MbrBu1aqq-YeNVEDugUtJxyh8WCmVrcwsulko7sq9Jep-SwpUd3u2JIiOTkljZdSCyWPzVPhfHMpZt5fVMKLQ4zp6lK8ubRWSz-XsmWBPwQMAobM7tj5RpF9KldCwFCOPYb4rLcUYqmPTAIGvrfA4zjWjemgVmaUdYcGa54c3Uen0YEXOOR07I6tS54FPn7-ejeoEAToo6x2ZR-OVeCDVwrL1_DfhsDHTLun_GHJ_flCjtaNwjNeMJ32ZHuG-J-lWDgWgQ-q9t5vZ1iWkLURSj4v--ex5XuvefXwNwAA__-Bc5pp)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. clean_body: Charlie didn't just talk about it. He built a movement that's changed history. | | | Friend, Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. He built a movement that's changed history. And long before he left us... he wrote How We Win -- the playbook that lays it all out. Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward. Friend, this isn't just a book... It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to: 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states 🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists 🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. He showed us HOW WE WIN. Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you. How We Win is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up." Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth. The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies. Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. **Good morning!** On this day in 1929, Albert B. Fall, Secretary of the Interior under President Warren G. Harding during the [Teapot Dome Scandal](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOozAQhU8DnREeB5wULrahy7ZbogGPw2QNRngI4vYror3BX0wz39PTp_fn2T-RIy-v3ziTk5D6hY4cSYS2XrZ9XsddcgpBMP7NQ9zpjWfuoYZG6VpB03vkePa30rtABGRKctq22tzb5tGUk9PjnTTa1mgM5PXdD1D7usUBa2sbgpLd1aa_VxvdVGStDmgMtLdHMNYWt5o8S9qqd-JFJgrxTB_aqjHNZXSTyJoL86uAroDuOI5q4ixpOy9eQCcTZ-XxVLyo_6SALo2SBtoUNAV0Iw68kKiZ5uv32jnKNy-EaxLl00wqj7h4jOXm_HpwjJzbS-01I8evivxov4-DfwEAAP__SzyHDQ), was found guilty of accepting a bribe in office, becoming the first cabinet member to be convicted of a crime.

The World Series, one of America's greatest sporting events, opened last night without much public fanfare. The baseball fans at The Flyover are excited—how about you? Are you planning to watch this year's Fall Classic? Let us know by voting in our _Poll_ below.

## Trump Ends Canada Talks Over Reagan Ad
President Trump [terminated trade talks with Canada](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ8Gd1j82BAXFNu4y7ZbWsdwSMhiiADH8ttfOa9wi6lGmplv_t2XO4QY0uMvbGiaz0vCo0ZsDcvSyr697d5q9r5B_F_XuOMLzroIJkbKGRXj4iDEcxk6ZzyiQNmh4VpxeVPjNHZPY_06KXXzq_PMMxgmv2rUkjunFFirumCuNP4Vk3zsUWvuQUqhhslLrcnA0IWWS__KIbUn-njmD5be5q2L5tnauxL5h4iZiPk4jj6t9qK4fCLmda8hYa1EzGhzyttJxPxFoxYSOKCtgENacoLoaEF4QKLFJhByGtmtK8a9jxBjqOra8tggxG93-9VhHyN-AgAA__8Lv4GP), effective immediately, after Ontario began running an ad featuring a speech from Ronald Reagan criticizing tariffs and trade barriers. The ad, posted on X by Ontario Premier Doug Ford, was narrated by an edited version of a radio speech given by former President Reagan in 1987. [You can see the ad here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFvwyAQBeBfg7dEcGeMGRgqVd7StaNFzJGQYhOZc9L8-8r5Cx3e8ob3Se_7NJ58ymm5fPmZHMcyLvSsmZhpHXnd5vu0cS0xss8_9Zw3uvlXHUGCPih5AD0Gn_JrbJvgIhEQNuSU6RT2nba6uToryZ-DNZNUsu_PMFmvVVRT6E2MvZRNcvuaekei0kcyRkWPCF1rIxojWkkhcVmPt5IWvlLMr_Kg9TiVucnuynyvAj8EDAKG370VMMSyhsVzKouAobLnrQoYlDW9MVZLBIVSA6IROFSBn23XrC7cnynnVLvdvMw-5bfB_zrm4eAvAAD__5Wyc9Q). The Ronald Reagan Presidential Foundation said the ad had used ["selective audio and video"](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupDAMRb8mdBkFBwIUKbZJ97bdEnmIM5O3gYwSzyD-fgX7Ca-wdIsj2-f--Zq_MKa4PX7jSpZDnjfaayJmKjOX9_pa3lxzCIzpb72nN33jUWdQ0MtWSehnjzEdc9d4G4iAdEO2HUyrR9NPffO0Uwd47yc1gQb0Hk0w4a600d24QD9CE-25rb1G6ba_0TC0AbUG001BD4PoFPnIudy-c9z4SSEd-UPltuS1SfbJ_KpC_xLgBLh932_vipw9HicgwFXO5RDgTjMB7pVT5Lic8TwswLXqzFqA83nD5OUlLhfc0KPkgp7k5S8ZSwyhyvKfK4QP3CT6DxWOlVbaWIAbzWhGrQalBgGuKda_9phSrOZ0eawY0_U7_6jwj4V_AQAA__-KM5PP) spliced together out of sequence and that it was examining legal options. Trump cut off all trade talks after accusing Canada of using the ad to try to interfere with an upcoming Supreme Court review of tariffs. Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney said his government would take up talks again whenever the U.S. is ready.
## Social Security Benefits to Rise 2.8%
Social Security will increase retirement benefits by 2.8% in 2026, [or about $56 per month](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OwyAUhE-DOyx4-CcpKLZxl223tDA8YrLYWPAcy7dfOVfYYqSRRvpmND-P8WFCDOvz2yyoyadxxaNEJMI8Ut6Xze5Ukvdk4m-Z4o4vc5YRBLRcCg7t6EyI59hUTntEQFWhln0n1a1r720168k31hrwoLxAZ42bUN1cb71DMUnZVEFfNPmRULKtse-lN0pB19y96nvWCHSBUq5fKaw0o49nemOubVqqqGeirTD1xWBgMBzHUdt1slfIYLjQDAYpLt8wGEqywURe0O450MltioaDgI5PuKIPVHhYbUZTsJ5piVXWbjtCjKF015LnYkL8NNO_7npr-AsAAP__40J-2A) on average, the government announced Friday. The increase will begin showing up in beneficiaries’ checks in January and is meant to help keep pace with rising costs. Social security is the primary source of income for about 40% of older Americans, according to the AARP. In 2025, the increase [was a bit lower, at 2.5 percent.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2SgyAUxfGn0Q6HDwUsKLaxy7ZbOle5GLIIGUAzvv1O8gpbnPb8Zv4_t_kGPvi4fcOOpro0R3yVgLVinms-9ud61JKcqxB-yxIOfMBVZk75QBglfJgt-HDNfWuNQ-QoWjRMSSa0HMahvZtRO0olBzVaway2oBa90F6xBTRKrVtv3m_sMyrY0KFSzIEQXPajE0o1PUXra8rdI_lY7-jClU7M3Zr2Nph7rc_SiK-GTw2flpC2rhTotnQ2fCpp9RBIwfXIvl4EYkxHXLGQBSM6X4mPa0YoSFzKhFMuGz612djny4fgi3zz2w4-fLj6r0an4X8BAAD__26_e8Q) “The cost-of-living adjustment is a vital part of how Social Security delivers on its mission,” said Social Security Administration Commissioner Frank J. Bisignano.
## List: States Ranked By Job Openings
A new list ranks Oklahoma [No. 1 for job openings](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuqzAQRL8GOiNsYzsULl5Dl9feEm3COmxibISXoPz9FfmFW0w3mjk6P9fxChQpPf7Dgp5DHhMeJSIzbiNv-7Ledy45BIb4Kre44xM-ZVStMkK2QplxAoqfsasnHxAV6hq9dFbqizW9qWdvbGdsD7dw6VXQDls1tb22ynbWgWxNTf5ck9-0WpoGnZMBtFa264N2rupanIjz1jwzJZ4xxE9-49bc81JHPzOvpdL_KjVUajiOo3lT2SHeYSWGSIXPYqWGDdILJ1EYGIs4iGfBM4olFxbPfBN5xUTpUQQlcSJVaqg3P60HxUjFnhyPBSh-f_lPst5e_QYAAP__YX1-nQ) as the state’s revitalized energy industry drives employment growth and strengthens its labor market. The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics [measured open and filled positions](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQRp8GOiP_AA6Fi9vQ5bZbogGPwVljI3sIytuvknq7Lb7u09HR-bpPd_DBx_U_7GjIpSniVQISYZ4on_uxnFSScwThu8zhxAe8yiS57JjgTHaTBR9eU1tb4xAlqhqN0L1Qt74bunozrnXLINqB3wRf7KDbRalew-z4zXYCh9qbN018xpXoGtRaOFBK9u3glNZVy9F6Srl5JB9pQxde6Ym5WdJeB7MRHaVS_yo5VnK8rquZQ2nW9KzkuGyQqVRyLASE7JFmlg6MPq6FQbQswJwyozPHN_D3XwbC0my019nY4_Ih-NK_pdYdfPhI0J_KPY38CQAA___Z54Th) in every state. Oklahoma had a 5.5% job opening rate, with Alaska second with a 5.3% rate. Michigan, Georgia, Kentucky, and the Carolinas—the so-called "battery belt"—also had near or above 5% rates, reflecting electric vehicle and battery manufacturing investments. Florida and Texas had the lowest job vacancy rates at 3.7%. [See where your state ranks](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuqzAQRL8GOiNsYzsULl5Dl9feEm3COmxibISXoPz9FfmFW0w3mjk6P9fxChQpPf7Dgp5DHhMeJSIzbiNv-7Ledy45BIb4Kre44xM-ZVStMkK2QplxAoqfsasnHxAV6hq9dFbqizW9qWdvbGdsD7dw6VXQDls1tb22ynbWgWxNTf5ck9-0WpoGnZMBtFa264N2rupanIjz1jwzJZ4xxE9-49bc81JHPzOvpdL_KjVUajiOo3lT2SHeYSWGSIXPYqWGDdILJ1EYGIs4iGfBM4olFxbPfBN5xUTpUQQlcSJVaqg3P60HxUjFnhyPBSh-f_lPst5e_QYAAP__YX1-nQ).

clean_body: President Trump , effective immediately, after Ontario began running an ad featuring a speech from Ronald Reagan criticizing tariffs and trade barriers. | | | | | | Saturday, October 25, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1929, Albert B. Fall, Secretary of the Interior under President Warren G. Harding during the , was found guilty of accepting a bribe in office, becoming the first cabinet member to be convicted of a crime. The World Series, one of America's greatest sporting events, opened last night without much public fanfare. One survey we saw indicated that many people weren't sure which teams were playing (it's the Los Angeles Dodgers vs. the Toronto Blue Jays). The baseball fans at The Flyover are excited—how about you? Are you planning to watch this year's Fall Classic? Let us know by voting in our Poll below. If you're already paying for Amazon Prime, be sure to check out these nine perks you need to be using from today's sponsor . | Trump Ends Canada Talks Over Reagan Ad President Trump , effective immediately, after Ontario began running an ad featuring a speech from Ronald Reagan criticizing tariffs and trade barriers. The ad, posted on X by Ontario Premier Doug Ford, was narrated by an edited version of a radio speech given by former President Reagan in 1987. . The Ronald Reagan Presidential Foundation said the ad had used spliced together out of sequence and that it was examining legal options. Trump cut off all trade talks after accusing Canada of using the ad to try to interfere with an upcoming Supreme Court review of tariffs. Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney said his government would take up talks again whenever the U.S. is ready. Social Security Benefits to Rise 2.8% Social Security will increase retirement benefits by 2.8% in 2026, on average, the government announced Friday. The increase will begin showing up in beneficiaries’ checks in January and is meant to help keep pace with rising costs. Social security is the primary source of income for about 40% of older Americans, according to the AARP. In 2025, the increase “The cost-of-living adjustment is a vital part of how Social Security delivers on its mission,” said Social Security Administration Commissioner Frank J. Bisignano. **Good Morning!** On this day in 1939, basketball player [Zelmo Beaty](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1u6zAQBODTUJ2F3RUlWQWL9wp1ThsgjUBTK3sTyhTI9d_tA_sKKQaYab5iPg_TwUuUy-nDr-z0saTpwvcSWZXzu163zCuHdM36fS0qgYumiYDaHcKO2mn2Ep-TrWZ3hHnAih32HTYDIEB1dv2-DSFQjzb03AwdLg0gdjzYdr-QHSpxLwxfQcCmr1sLg913QNQerT2yscCzaMq1nln54csSn-nGuQ5praI7q27FNP8MjYZGvtR3-ZGNZ_F1yidD42sbGr84rmn6z16fVXbzdpcYpXS9sXBavcQ3p3874eboNwAA___VLXCB) was born in Hillister. He attended Prairie View A&M University and was selected by the St. Louis Hawks with the third overall pick in the 1962 NBA Draft. Beaty joined the ABA’s Utah Stars for the 1970-71 season, leading the team to a league championship. He was inducted into the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame in 2016. Catch it all in _Top Stories_ and _Et Cetera_.
