## Abbott Appoints Kyle Hawkins to Supreme Court
Gov. Greg Abbott appointed former [Texas Solicitor General Kyle Hawkins](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAMhp8mdEFJSIApUlxDN9deiRIwkNuAUeJhZt5-BTtvsIUly7Z--fv-3fu7CzFs81-3gqXXhP0GzxyBCNLVPvYEKwz4SPT_kSkMkAl7JZThUnBl-tGF-O51MVovxpsswMqmltVNSCGKxXoPdSOrdmp9ZYZ2GryGwSijxAiVnHQR7Bkmz5JCVk1ptLjpthZKGa-1B6YFjIEwlbQAwcvlKb7xgFQOuBbRLkR7ZtUfpjqmuhmP8joqZzyY6k4GprodM_1sIW2YuPMeibjbdwwbZb6451fYMneZfzA5TpwW4B8D_FJwDc_0Itlxf4YYQ64bpsW8uhCvh-h3Gg-rvgMAAP__zxqK1Q) to the Texas Supreme Court, filling the vacancy left by Justice Jeff Boyd’s retirement. Hawkins, now a partner at Lehotsky Keller Cohn LLP, previously served as the state's [top appellate attorney](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAQRb8GMyxAQCcgeInZvHRDC7BVdlCmoB1n_n5La_9gg666wa0-ffrrPtxtiGGb_9sVDL6nNGxwlAiIkK-4PzOs4NOe8XsvGDwUTINgQlHOqFDDaEP8DLIajWPjjVdgeKt5c2OcsWoxXk_MajU5r7RQ3LpON0qC9Z1TfGq7KphzGT-HM960tZLsJjvNhFBOSgdEMhgDplzjAghvW6b4SS_ItU9rFc2C-Cyk-UdET0R_HEd9lTAHt29QpzwT0Z8MInrOziyJ6K8O_dWjlx99fCLQxR6PsBVaUgz-xNIZNsg2UutcQiSir7IZn0eIMRTdEsnm1YZ4XYN_--HLiJ8AAAD__5dnhx4) and as a lawyer for the U.S. Department of Justice under President Trump. His appointment continues Abbott’s reshaping of the [all-Republican court](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupSAQQL8GO8yAqM-CYhu7t-2WBnVUVgQD4_X69xvNzf7AKyaZYnJyzvz57r6NddbPv82Gmt5T6DyeySERxmc99ogbDuGI9PdIZAdMFDoJsuQCuCy70Vh3dSobdQ9jIzLUoq5E0YAAyBYNVanqpoACyn4oJoS-ll9SVgVO2JeVyKy-YeIeAaKo81JBo74qkLLsleqRKcDRUog5LUj4NmlyV3hhzIewZU4vRHtixS8mWybb8zzzFaO53fMQZybb-T72G3pisv1vrphsPZ78IfJPJ39C-aeUr5dDvphztT7xFJwdbg8-o8doHF_R8928KXg-Bm_cyCke284NUYgeryzqcT-tczZVNVMwb8a6x5p-9uuXlv8CAAD__9Qplsc), where seven of nine justices are now his appointees.
## Apple Begins Shipping AI Servers from Houston
Apple has begun shipping advanced [AI servers](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOwyAURL8Gd1hwAT8Kim3cZdstLR43MSuwLSBx8vcr-xe2GOlII52R5uc230yIYX18m4S6vu_bvOJRItaK-cLnnjGh2565_j5LDQ5L3WZgoChnFNTsTYifWTZeW-ZH3qDmfcfFyDhjzaKtkgJhACUkDkpIAcyNlkMHfvC2t03Qp4yf4YyLvlWSjXLoGICyUlokkqEPdcttXbDi25R7_GwvzK3bUhP1UuteiPgiMBGYjuNo3WrdWRKYTjeBibOTBYHJ7HtEahLm4MxKk_FITaAF8wtzoZe_XWqKTdZ-P0KMoXQ9keyRTIjXZP3fUS8NfwEAAP__TPF7ZA) built at its new Houston factory, part of the company’s $600 billion plan to expand U.S. manufacturing and supplier investment. The servers, powered by Apple-designed silicon, will support [Apple Intelligence](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMHOnSAQhZ8GdxhA1N8Fi9s07v6mSRddGoTxSoNAYfi9vn3jfYUuJpnJ5Jyc8_3-XD618y48f-gDFL62uAQ4iwdEyO-1pgwHmFgz_qkFnYGCcRFM9JQzKvrFauevRTZWrcxOvAHFx4F3E-OMNbuyYFa7sXEcLTAJ1n4AgJzsNvZyAD00Tt1m_B7OeDe2vWST_BiYEP0q5QpEMrAOY25xB4SXLpu_4hfk1sSj8WpHTIV0DyJmIubzPNujhPtHxAyB1kLEfDchYkYwe4g-Pi8iZp2SB_q3OkB_Ua9rMDsUmnK01aCLgWqkAU66x1rwPh1NXge8tZk-HvyndCBJN0fjLOm-f7s5wll-QU5NVjadzntXhpFI9jy08-_A-H-Yv5T4FwAA___XhpUx) and Private Cloud Compute services for iPhones, iPads, and Macs. Apple Chief Operating Officer Sabih Khan said the Houston facility opened ahead of schedule and will continue expanding next year, creating thousands of jobs. The milestone also aligns with calls from President Trump for more [U.S. tech manufacturing](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2urCAUhZ8GOwwgjlpQ3MZubntLs4XlyA3-BHCcefsTfYVT7OQrdr6stf49hyf54NfXX1pg8mfahhVnCsgZ8cZjj1hgtyPm_0fK3iLlbVBC1VwKrurBkQ_fQRfOjMJ1soCRzUNWnZBCFLOhikACrZXoCK0iJypqulHUrdNdPRbeXDJ5nRSyaspai063D6FUPWo9gmkB5_MWyzwj40NpCt_tjVjabSmCmXPeE6v-MNUz1Z_nWe4RFg6rRUQCRTtfr0z1VyGmetr3AH6r-ETWB5-_3CH4N2Li5HlCvPFIfKH1mMjmI8IV0bj99CH49GiYFq-FfLhT5N9t9zbqJwAA__9xl4d0).
## Severe Storms Threaten Texas
A slow-moving [storm system](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAMhp8mbKmckNAyZLiFrbfeiAIxxafQVImh5e1PtI9wg6VPny3_0v9z7a-eIt1v335Bx68p9Xd8lojMmN-4PjIuOKY18-9amEYsnHoN2koFUts-eIp7b6rgBgitqtCpc6PqFhRANTsLELSaaoSLtVgbfxmMHVtojEVba1ORO56pYxSo-nyyBlpzaUBrOxgzoDCAgTjlE8_I-PJlinvaMJ_GtFTRzcyPIuovoTuhuyd6nj87obvCKS_lANwwo9DdRgHTIdLKs_xo-TmTU0wp0P0mp0zB77J4XnPwe5VdeDwpRirNWRi4LZ7iO53_19nm9F8AAAD__3B8gpA) pushing east from West Texas is bringing the threat of flash flooding, hail, and possible tornadoes across much of the state through the weekend. The milestone also aligns with calls from President Trump for more . Severe Storms Threaten Texas A slow-moving pushing east from West Texas is bringing the threat of flash flooding, hail, and possible tornadoes across much of the state through the weekend. subject: Fourteen Candidates Vie for Half-Dozen Key City Council Seats in Biddeford Election
body:

Voters will head to the polls on Tuesday, Nov. 4, to decide several competitive City Council races that will shape Biddeford’s approach to housing, taxes, infrastructure and government transparency. Three candidates are competing for two at-large seats, while Ward One, Ward Two, Ward Four, Ward Six and Ward Seven feature contested races. Ward Five is [...]

body:
| | |
---
Patriot, Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**

---
Patriot, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkTuu3DAMRVcjdzb08bdwkWTg7qVNKVAiPRaeLU0kerz9wMjLAlKw4SEPcHF_fdgPCHuIz59w0OydzcXyRjutvBJkQt5CcSl9Wi11VytZ6-6-URXOfiLduraiWQ29MpOcjKm2ue36Dv0KAB0ijk5Pbh27aRyReomgqjDfLnWPUp3RzaDXtTUTEUgnx2EVrSQMnHLjUyyU38DhTS4nQA-Fm0hc7fPG_CrCfBN6EXop5M9MDUTCxI1Ph9ALnzmG-KxfKUSuzwJCLzR2mpxztRomXbeDk_VkBlPT6mF0vjdeozBLSWf2ZH1CEubx4_tgWjMK3Z982IMwnIcwDzog7F_Lvw_CPDbICOXTgv_9hTwcLwjPeMN02YvsFeI_liJTZGEeUOUZX1fY91D6QbTyedvvJBX_VzHvWf8JAAD__9cOmsM)

Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Patriot. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. ---
| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. | | Peter, I’ll get straight to the point: Donald Trump and Republicans shut down the government 25 days ago. They haven’t done a damn thing to try to reopen it since then. House Democrats are ready, willing and able to negotiate a bipartisan deal that meets the needs of the American people, reopens the government and addresses the Republican healthcare crisis. We will continue to stand up for everyday Americans. We will NOT back down until the Republican healthcare crisis is fixed. House Democrats are in this fight until we win this fight for the American people. Keep the faith, Hakeem

clean_body: Peter, I’ll get straight to the point: | | Peter, I’ll get straight to the point: Donald Trump and Republicans shut down the government 25 days ago. They haven’t done a damn thing to try to reopen it since then. House Democrats are ready, willing and able to negotiate a bipartisan deal that meets the needs of the American people, reopens the government and addresses the Republican healthcare crisis. We will continue to stand up for everyday Americans. We will NOT back down until the Republican healthcare crisis is fixed. House Democrats are in this fight until we win this fight for the American people. Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. name: BoebertCare
subject: Hope you like 306% premium hikes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
She’s too busy with conspiracy theories about UFOs and lizard people to lift a single finger for working families in her district who are wondering how they’ll afford their next doctor’s visit.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yLnjCp8qIeMTcpZi3GQm5hosxSxnvx2n_IO9YNRtlf2jT0VJQgvI5uw_-eXSEGyuNa2lhSZj-RaPaKK91IOjz73YicPWCKModaah34HGYW--gpoiOgydVEoI5k99-NixZWgVwJDdlmqXnWGVP8Vnr0I8kq5MEdwdu51wRyxf2stk36IJuKhxg8431OomUfikWmYKXTEnjB4G-aeWjMtZMgelzOVQnlsG&c=Px8RbhxV5_Rlg_35NZMsXH9KZiNx-PGCTrfTmybd8-aqgqTOUgaHfQ==&ch=RNvpPRfPabLXVW828-N2SSDJ2_HMo_I_l2sz4_dLY8bVix_ZAcaYzA==)
---
|

Peter,
Lauren Boebert carpetbagged into our district, cashes a taxpayer check, and keeps her taxpayer subsidized health care plan -- while the cost of ours skyrockets.
Because Lauren Boebert and her MAGA allies refuse to extend Affordable Care Act subsidies, the government is still shut down, and working families are about to pay the price with 306% premium hikes.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yLnjCp8qIeMTcpZi3GQm5hosxSxnvx2n_IO9YNRtlf2jT0VJQgvI5uw_-eXSEGyuNa2lhSZj-RaPaKK91IOjz73YicPWCKModaah34HGYW--gpoiOgydVEoI5k99-NixZWgVwJDdlmqXnWGVP8Vnr0I8kq5MEdwdu51wRyxf2stk36IJuKhxg8431OomUfikWmYKXTEnjB76EiFiYT07f6ZUcrPpYl5E&c=Px8RbhxV5_Rlg_35NZMsXH9KZiNx-PGCTrfTmybd8-aqgqTOUgaHfQ==&ch=RNvpPRfPabLXVW828-N2SSDJ2_HMo_I_l2sz4_dLY8bVix_ZAcaYzA==)
---
Even Republicans like Jeff Hurd are calling to extend the subsidies to avoid catastrophe. But Boebert? She's too busy with conspiracy theories about UFOs and lizard people to lift a single finger for working families in her district who are wondering how they'll afford their next doctor's visit.
I took care of both my parents as they died -- just thirteen days apart. I know how broken the system is. I've seen firsthand what happens when care isn't affordable or accessible. Lauren Boebert won't do anything to fix our broken healthcare system. But I will.
I'm running because our friends and neighbors deserve a leader who actually cares about them.
[Can I count on you to pitch in $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help me end Boebert's cruelty and send a true champion of working people to Congress?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yLnjCp8qIeMTcpZi3GQm5hosxSxnvx2n_IO9YNRtlf2jT0VJQgvI5uw_-eXSEGyuNa2lhSZj-RaPaKK91IOjz73YicPWCKModaah34HGYW--gpoiOgydVEoI5k99-NixZWgVwJDdlmqXnWGVP8Vnr0I8kq5MEdwdu51wRyxf2stk36IJuKhxg8431OomUfikWmYKXTEnjB6VBT-A5-wFPPlmJ8OR0gG9&c=Px8RbhxV5_Rlg_35NZMsXH9KZiNx-PGCTrfTmybd8-aqgqTOUgaHfQ==&ch=RNvpPRfPabLXVW828-N2SSDJ2_HMo_I_l2sz4_dLY8bVix_ZAcaYzA==)
---

clean_body: She’s too busy with conspiracy theories about UFOs and lizard people to lift a single finger for working families in her district who are wondering how they’ll afford their next doctor’s visit. | | | | | == | Peter, Lauren Boebert carpetbagged into our district, cashes a taxpayer check, and keeps her taxpayer subsidized health care plan -- while the cost of ours skyrockets. Because Lauren Boebert and her MAGA allies refuse to extend Affordable Care Act subsidies, the government is still shut down, and working families are about to pay the price with 306% premium hikes. | == Even Republicans like Jeff Hurd are calling to extend the subsidies to avoid catastrophe. But Boebert? She's too busy with conspiracy theories about UFOs and lizard people to lift a single finger for working families in her district who are wondering how they'll afford their next doctor's visit. I took care of both my parents as they died -- just thirteen days apart. I know how broken the system is. I've seen firsthand what happens when care isn't affordable or accessible. Lauren Boebert won't do anything to fix our broken healthcare system. But I will. I'm running because our friends and neighbors deserve a leader who actually cares about them. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | In solidarity, Trisha Calvarese | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | | | | | | |

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Rich Lowry Talks Mississippi’s Conservative Wins
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/richinms?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**This week, we were thrilled to host Rich Lowry, editor of _National Review_ and a leading voice in American conservatism,** as he visited Mississippi to celebrate our state’s recent policy successes with the Mississippi Center for Public Policy (MCPP).

During his visit, I had the pleasure of sitting down with Rich to discuss the state of American conservatism and Mississippi’s role in shaping it. **Click the image below to watch our conversation: **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=87f6f6b826&e=5703353baa)
---
| We also explored the policy victories that are putting Mississippi on the map as a leader in conservative reform. **If – like me - you’re proud to call Mississippi home, I believe you’ll find this discussion inspiring and insightful.**

Thank you for your continued support in championing Mississippi’s progress. I hope you enjoy the conversation and share our excitement for the bright future ahead!

Wishing you an amazing weekend,
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=644eb2f6d0&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warmest regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117952127/578202138/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjc4ZmM4Ny1hMmIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=virxTmbC1IoDgi1UpIB9d_CEZKoNDFRff-pm_gLsawg=&emci=e7bd7119-11b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2678fc87-a2b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=13185894) _**The New York Times: “Supreme Court Appears Poised to Weaken Voting Rights Act”**_ The Supreme Court is once again threatening the foundation of our democracy. During recent oral arguments in a Louisiana redistricting case, several conservative justices signaled they’re ready to gut the Voting Rights Act—specifically Section 2, the very heart of the law that protects voters from racially discriminatory practices like gerrymandering. **This would allow Republicans to redraw congressional maps across the country to tip the scales in their favor and silence voters who may not agree with them.** [**Chris refuses to stand by while they undermine our democracy. But this fight is bigger than any one person—it’s going to take all of us. Derek, join Chris and stand up to this threat, defend voting rights, and protect our democracy. Rush an urgent donation right now →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117952129/578202181/981825435?refcode=email_102525_vra&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjc4ZmM4Ny1hMmIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=virxTmbC1IoDgi1UpIB9d_CEZKoNDFRff-pm_gLsawg=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117952132/578202193/981825435?refcode=email_102525_vra&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjc4ZmM4Ny1hMmIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=virxTmbC1IoDgi1UpIB9d_CEZKoNDFRff-pm_gLsawg=)

At Trump’s request, Republicans have already been gerrymandering congressional maps in states across the country to rig next year’s election in their favor.
Now, if the Supreme Court moves forward with weakening the Voting Rights Act, Republicans could eliminate more than a dozen Democrat-held districts across the South— _furthering their effort to manipulate next year’s election and silence voters._
**This would make it even harder for Americans to vote, and it’s a direct threat to the very foundation of our democracy.**
Chris has fought to secure our elections before as a voting rights lawyer, and in Congress, he’s been working to defend your rights, and make it easier, not harder, for people to exercise their right to vote.
[**Chris is standing up to Republicans’ attempts to rig our elections, and he’s fighting to ensure every eligible American has the right to use their voice at the ballot box. If that’s a mission you believe in, pitch in today and help Chris keep up the fight in the House →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117952135/578202200/981825435?refcode=email_102525_vra&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjc4ZmM4Ny1hMmIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=virxTmbC1IoDgi1UpIB9d_CEZKoNDFRff-pm_gLsawg=)

clean_body: The New York Times: “Supreme Court Appears Poised to Weaken Voting Rights Act” The Supreme Court is once again threatening the foundation of our democracy. During recent oral arguments in a Louisiana redistricting case, several conservative justices signaled they’re ready to gut the Voting Rights Act—specifically Section 2, the very heart of the law that protects voters from racially discriminatory practices like gerrymandering. This would allow Republicans to redraw congressional maps across the country to tip the scales in their favor and silence voters who may not agree with them. = | | = At Trump’s request, Republicans have already been gerrymandering congressional maps in states across the country to rig next year’s election in their favor. Now, if the Supreme Court moves forward with weakening the Voting Rights Act, Republicans could eliminate more than a dozen Democrat-held districts across the South— furthering their effort to manipulate next year’s election and silence voters. This would make it even harder for Americans to vote, and it’s a direct threat to the very foundation of our democracy. Chris has fought to secure our elections before as a voting rights lawyer, and in Congress, he’s been working to defend your rights, and make it easier, not harder, for people to exercise their right to vote. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Team Deluzio | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Is there anything I can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251025-1-b&t=1&akid=10991%2E3935704%2Ee-b6UR)
---
Team —
We are 10 days away from the fall elections. Is there anything I can say for you to chip in $10 to GIFFORDS PAC before midnight?
What if I told you that voters are already casting their ballots? More than 500,000 early ballots have already been turned in, with even more on the way.
What if I said that Republican groups are spending big these last 10 days to defeat us? They know that these 2025 elections are our best indicator for the 2026 elections — and if they can win here, they will have huge momentum going into the midterms.
And how about the fact that reaching even a few hundred more voters could decide the difference between winning and losing in our top races? In 2017, control of the Virginia statehouse came down to _one vote_... so we can’t take these last 10 days for granted.
**If passing commonsense gun safety legislation is important to you, I am asking:**
**[Can you please chip in to GIFFORDS PAC today? Our average online contribution this year is just $22. Some people give more, others give less. What matters most is that you are choosing to step up and donate right now.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251025-1-b&t=2&akid=10991%2E3935704%2Ee-b6UR)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&amount=3&refcode=em251025-1-b&t=21&akid=10991%2E3935704%2Ee-b6UR)**
---

---

| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-q42025.bzPEeG&refcode=em251025-1-b&t=23&akid=10991%2E3935704%2Ee-b6UR)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-q42025.BnaACt&refcode=em251025-1-b&t=24&akid=10991%2E3935704%2Ee-b6UR)**

Thank you,
Gabby Giffords

name: Kevin Sorbo
subject: What’s going on with our boys at the hands of radical “educators”
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10281425/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZ2J6YnZIUVVmRQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEwMjU/LbmNsN3laUzZ5ag/qP2hpZHM9bmN6MUJ0V3B4czV5dlBscw/gaPzO7Q/s3l75c2b0eb)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m reaching out to you today because I think you and I agree. America needs strong boys again. America needs courageous boys again. America needs strong and courageous boys who grow into strong and courageous men of honor. But we will never get back to being a nation that values men and the unique role God created for them unless each of us steps up to do our part right now. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please join me in supporting BRAVE books in the next 24 hours to get God’s Word, “Be strong and courageous!” to a boy who longs to hear that message.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Because right now a little boy is sitting in a classroom or a library story hour with a pink-haired they/them teacher or librarian. He dreams about hitting the homerun to win the game for his team, or coming screaming in on a firetruck to save everyone from a burning building, or of rescuing the princess from the evil enemy. But his woke teachers and librarians tell him those ideas are “toxic.” They tell him he must be meek. He must be quiet. He must be more like the girls. And after they teach him to act like a girl, they suggest that maybe he IS a girl. What’s going on with our boys at the hands of radical “educators” is as evil as it sounds. Back when you and I were growing up boys climbed trees, skinned their knees, carried slingshots in back pockets, played knights and pirates with sticks as swords, then got cleaned up on Sunday to sit before our Lord. Our teachers and librarians fed our imaginations with stories of heroism and adventure: The Three Musketeers, Paul Bunyan, Treasure Island, White Fang, The Swiss Family Robertson, and so much more... But today, radical “educators” are bubble-wrapping our boys and pushing a feminized “woke” agenda on them.
---
| | They bring in men wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” and read books like these to children of all ages... _How To Be a Real Man._ Aimed at kids aged 3-7 and featuring a bearded man in a pink tutu, this “must-have” picture book ‘smashes the age-old assumption’ about masculinity.
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | How To Be a Real Man. Aimed at kids aged 3-7 and featuring a bearded man in a pink tutu, this “must-have” picture book ‘smashes the age-old assumption’ about masculinity.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| _Julian Is a Mermaid_. A book for pre-schoolers to 3rd graders about a boy who dreams of dressing up as a fabulous mermaid and then gets help from his grandmother to make it happen.
---
| | Julian Is a Mermaid. A book for pre-schoolers to 3rd graders about a boy who dreams of dressing up as a fabulous mermaid and then gets help from his grandmother to make it happen.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | And then when boys are a little older there’s...
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| _The Heartstopper Series._ Scholastic Books describes this series as “Boy meets boy. Boys become friends. Boys fall in love.” Remember when you let your kids shop the Scholastic Book Fairs? No more! And maybe you’ve heard of the book, Gender Queer. Parents protesting this book have been thrown out of school board meetings because they attempted to read excerpts aloud and the material was deemed too pornographic for a school board meeting.
---
| | The Heartstopper Series. Scholastic Books describes this series as “Boy meets boy. Boys become friends. Boys fall in love.” Remember when you let your kids shop the Scholastic Book Fairs? No more! And maybe you’ve heard of the book, Gender Queer. Parents protesting this book have been thrown out of school board meetings because they attempted to read excerpts aloud and the material was deemed too pornographic for a school board meeting.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | But the book is O.K. for middle school libraries?? Crazy! I wish I could tell you that this was only happening in the most radicalized communities in our nation. But you know that’s not true. Every night on the news you see another story of a boy who wants to play on a girls’ team, or a boy who wants to use the girl’s locker room. Or a boy who’s turned his confusion and frustration into violence. I hope you see that we’ve got to step in and stop this madness for all our sakes. We’ve got to fill boys with Godly lessons that teach them to step into their roles as strong and courageous leaders in our country and in our families. But the Left has had a monopoly on the leftist messages that swamp our boys in school, movies, TV, and now even in sports. Until now. **[I’m asking for your support because a small Christian book publisher aptly named BRAVE Books needs it immediately.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Started by a father who had his first child and couldn’t believe the destructive messages that were being thrown at young kids through books and television... **BRAVE Books** now battles leftist “educators,” the radicals at Scholastic Books, Hollywood, Marxist librarians, drag queens, and all the rest by creating the high-quality, wholesome, Godly books, and entertainment that conservative parents need to raise brave boys who grow into men of honor. Books like: _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by General Michael Flynn – Showing kids how to be good and strong leaders. _Unmuzzle Me, Please!_ By Rogan O’Handley (aka DC Draino)- Teaching kids the value of free speech. _Paws Off My Cannon_ by Dana Loesch – Explaining to kids why it’s important to protect others. And many others that teach the truth about gender identity, the importance of humility not pride, and on and on. I was honored when BRAVE Books asked me to write a book with them that inspires boys to be courageous. My name is Kevin Sorbo and maybe you recognize me from the 1990’s TV show “Hercules” or from my work in inspirational movies like “God’s Not Dead” and “The American Miracle.” But you’ve probably also seen me on Fox News, Real America’s Voice, or Newsmax calling out the Left and their lies. Facebook banned me for telling the truth about Covid, I get daily online hate for daring to say that boys can’t be girls, and Hollywood canceled me long ago for being outspoken about my conservative and Christian values. I wear all that as a badge of honor. **Because being a lion in this culture is way more important to me than being a sheep.** **That’s why my BRAVE Book is called****The Test of Lionhood****.**
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| It teaches boys to face obstacles with grit and determination. It teaches boys to be brave. It teaches boys to be men. The pink-haired radicals at Scholastic Books would never publish something so overtly masculine for boys. But **BRAVE Books** is unafraid.
---
| | It teaches boys to face obstacles with grit and determination. It teaches boys to be brave. It teaches boys to be men. The pink-haired radicals at Scholastic Books would never publish something so overtly masculine for boys. But **BRAVE Books** is unafraid.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | In a minute**[I’ll tell you how you can get The Test of Lionhood as my free gift to you and your family](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** but first I want to tell you about one of the ways BRAVE Books is fighting back. Since you’re an informed patriot, you may have heard of **BRAVE** ’s “See You at the Library” movement.
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| It started when **BRAVE Books** stood up to the awful anti-God, anti-family, anti-America Drag Queen Story Hours that were taking over our public libraries. Led by my friend Kirk Cameron, **BRAVE Books** started a counter movement called “See You at the Library Day” where parents and grandparents all across the country held patriotic, God-centered Story Hours of their own to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. At **BRAVE Books** Story Hours we pledge allegiance to the flag, sing “God Bless America”, and read wholesome and Godly books.
---
| | It started when **BRAVE Books** stood up to the awful anti-God, anti-family, anti-America Drag Queen Story Hours that were taking over our public libraries. Led by my friend Kirk Cameron, **BRAVE Books** started a counter movement called “See You at the Library Day” where parents and grandparents all across the country held patriotic, God-centered Story Hours of their own to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. At **BRAVE Books** Story Hours we pledge allegiance to the flag, sing “God Bless America”, and read wholesome and Godly books.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | Here’s me reading at a **BRAVE Books** Story Hour in Florida. I’m writing you today and asking for your support because **BRAVE Books** has set an**** ambitious goal to expand their “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 250,000 children in the next year – America’s 250th birthday! But they can’t do it without you. [**So, will you please consider sending in a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Your sponsorship gift helps send a ‘Story Hour Kit’ to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library. The kit includes everything they need to reach kids with your conservative values in our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for 50 little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **[Your sponsorship gift](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** is the only way **BRAVE Books** can fund Story Hours for 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who are teaching our boys to be girls and our girls to be boys. If now is a time when you can send a gift of $125 or more, know that that’s enough to sponsor one entire ‘Story Hour Kit’ yourself. Single handedly, you’re helping **BRAVE Books** reach 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message.
---
| | And my friend, think of this... Here are the “kits” that the radical National Education Association gave out to teachers this school year. They’re sponsored by Planned Parenthood and the messages include: Protect Trans Kids! and Teach Inclusive Sex Ed! This is what we’re up against and this is what your support of BRAVE Books will counter!
---

They’re sponsored by Planned Parenthood and the messages include: Protect Trans Kids! and Teach Inclusive Sex Ed! This is what we’re up against and this is what your support of BRAVE Books will counter!
---

---
| | And as my personal “Thank You” for supporting **BRAVE Books** , when you contribute a gift of $100 or more it will be my honor to send you The Test of Lionhood as a gift for you and your family to enjoy. You can also bring this critical book to your local library, school, or charity to reach a young boy who may have no other way to get the message that he can be strong! **[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $125, or anything higher or lower please send in your sponsorship gift in the in the next 24 hours so it’s sure to be here when BRAVE Books needs to ship out their next ‘Story Hour Kits!”](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Raising brave boys who grow into men of honor is a critical mission for all of us and I’m so glad that you’re with us. May God Bless You, May God Bless Our Children, and May God Bless America,

clean_body: | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m reaching out to you today because I think you and I agree. America needs strong boys again. America needs courageous boys again. America needs strong and courageous boys who grow into strong and courageous men of honor. But we will never get back to being a nation that values men and the unique role God created for them unless each of us steps up to do our part right now. Because right now a little boy is sitting in a classroom or a library story hour with a pink-haired they/them teacher or librarian. He dreams about hitting the homerun to win the game for his team, or coming screaming in on a firetruck to save everyone from a burning building, or of rescuing the princess from the evil enemy. But his woke teachers and librarians tell him those ideas are “toxic.” They tell him he must be meek. He must be quiet. He must be more like the girls. And after they teach him to act like a girl, they suggest that maybe he IS a girl. What’s going on with our boys at the hands of radical “educators” is as evil as it sounds. Back when you and I were growing up boys climbed trees, skinned their knees, carried slingshots in back pockets, played knights and pirates with sticks as swords, then got cleaned up on Sunday to sit before our Lord. Our teachers and librarians fed our imaginations with stories of heroism and adventure: The Three Musketeers, Paul Bunyan, Treasure Island, White Fang, The Swiss Family Robertson, and so much more... But today, radical “educators” are bubble-wrapping our boys and pushing a feminized “woke” agenda on them. | | They bring in men wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” and read books like these to children of all ages... How To Be a Real Man. Aimed at kids aged 3-7 and featuring a bearded man in a pink tutu, this “must-have” picture book ‘smashes the age-old assumption’ about masculinity. | | | How To Be a Real Man. Aimed at kids aged 3-7 and featuring a bearded man in a pink tutu, this “must-have” picture book ‘smashes the age-old assumption’ about masculinity. | | | Julian Is a Mermaid. A book for pre-schoolers to 3rd graders about a boy who dreams of dressing up as a fabulous mermaid and then gets help from his grandmother to make it happen. | | Julian Is a Mermaid. A book for pre-schoolers to 3rd graders about a boy who dreams of dressing up as a fabulous mermaid and then gets help from his grandmother to make it happen. | | And then when boys are a little older there’s... | | | The Heartstopper Series. Scholastic Books describes this series as “Boy meets boy. Boys become friends. Boys fall in love.” Remember when you let your kids shop the Scholastic Book Fairs? No more! And maybe you’ve heard of the book, Gender Queer. Parents protesting this book have been thrown out of school board meetings because they attempted to read excerpts aloud and the material was deemed too pornographic for a school board meeting. | | The Heartstopper Series. Scholastic Books describes this series as “Boy meets boy. Boys become friends. Boys fall in love.” Remember when you let your kids shop the Scholastic Book Fairs? No more! And maybe you’ve heard of the book, Gender Queer. Parents protesting this book have been thrown out of school board meetings because they attempted to read excerpts aloud and the material was deemed too pornographic for a school board meeting. | | But the book is O.K. for middle school libraries?? Crazy! I wish I could tell you that this was only happening in the most radicalized communities in our nation. But you know that’s not true. Every night on the news you see another story of a boy who wants to play on a girls’ team, or a boy who wants to use the girl’s locker room. Or a boy who’s turned his confusion and frustration into violence. I hope you see that we’ve got to step in and stop this madness for all our sakes. We’ve got to fill boys with Godly lessons that teach them to step into their roles as strong and courageous leaders in our country and in our families. But the Left has had a monopoly on the leftist messages that swamp our boys in school, movies, TV, and now even in sports. Until now. Started by a father who had his first child and couldn’t believe the destructive messages that were being thrown at young kids through books and television... BRAVE Books now battles leftist “educators,” the radicals at Scholastic Books, Hollywood, Marxist librarians, drag queens, and all the rest by creating the high-quality, wholesome, Godly books, and entertainment that conservative parents need to raise brave boys who grow into men of honor. Books like: The Night the Snow Monster Attacked by General Michael Flynn – Showing kids how to be good and strong leaders. Unmuzzle Me, Please! By Rogan O’Handley (aka DC Draino)- Teaching kids the value of free speech. Paws Off My Cannon by Dana Loesch – Explaining to kids why it’s important to protect others. And many others that teach the truth about gender identity, the importance of humility not pride, and on and on. I was honored when BRAVE Books asked me to write a book with them that inspires boys to be courageous. My name is Kevin Sorbo and maybe you recognize me from the 1990’s TV show “Hercules” or from my work in inspirational movies like “God’s Not Dead” and “The American Miracle.” But you’ve probably also seen me on Fox News, Real America’s Voice, or Newsmax calling out the Left and their lies. Facebook banned me for telling the truth about Covid, I get daily online hate for daring to say that boys can’t be girls, and Hollywood canceled me long ago for being outspoken about my conservative and Christian values. I wear all that as a badge of honor. Because being a lion in this culture is way more important to me than being a sheep. That’s why my BRAVE Book is calledThe Test of Lionhood. | | | It teaches boys to face obstacles with grit and determination. It teaches boys to be brave. It teaches boys to be men. The pink-haired radicals at Scholastic Books would never publish something so overtly masculine for boys. But BRAVE Books is unafraid. | | It teaches boys to face obstacles with grit and determination. It teaches boys to be brave. It teaches boys to be men. The pink-haired radicals at Scholastic Books would never publish something so overtly masculine for boys. But BRAVE Books is unafraid. | | In a minute but first I want to tell you about one of the ways BRAVE Books is fighting back. Since you’re an informed patriot, you may have heard of BRAVE ’s “See You at the Library” movement. | | | It started when BRAVE Books stood up to the awful anti-God, anti-family, anti-America Drag Queen Story Hours that were taking over our public libraries. Led by my friend Kirk Cameron, BRAVE Books started a counter movement called “See You at the Library Day” where parents and grandparents all across the country held patriotic, God-centered Story Hours of their own to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. At BRAVE Books Story Hours we pledge allegiance to the flag, sing “God Bless America”, and read wholesome and Godly books. | | It started when BRAVE Books stood up to the awful anti-God, anti-family, anti-America Drag Queen Story Hours that were taking over our public libraries. Led by my friend Kirk Cameron, BRAVE Books started a counter movement called “See You at the Library Day” where parents and grandparents all across the country held patriotic, God-centered Story Hours of their own to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. At BRAVE Books Story Hours we pledge allegiance to the flag, sing “God Bless America”, and read wholesome and Godly books. | | Here’s me reading at a BRAVE Books Story Hour in Florida. I’m writing you today and asking for your support because BRAVE Books has set an** ambitious goal to expand their “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 250,000 children in the next year – America’s 250th birthday! But they can’t do it without you. Your sponsorship gift helps send a ‘Story Hour Kit’ to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library. The kit includes everything they need to reach kids with your conservative values in our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for 50 little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. is the only way BRAVE Books can fund Story Hours for 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who are teaching our boys to be girls and our girls to be boys. If now is a time when you can send a gift of $125 or more, know that that’s enough to sponsor one entire ‘Story Hour Kit’ yourself. Single handedly, you’re helping BRAVE Books reach 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. | | And my friend, think of this... Here are the “kits” that the radical National Education Association gave out to teachers this school year. They’re sponsored by Planned Parenthood and the messages include: Protect Trans Kids! and Teach Inclusive Sex Ed! This is what we’re up against and this is what your support of BRAVE Books will counter! | | | And my friend, think of this... Here are the “kits” that the radical National Education Association gave out to teachers this school year. They’re sponsored by Planned Parenthood and the messages include: Protect Trans Kids! and Teach Inclusive Sex Ed! This is what we’re up against and this is what your support of BRAVE Books will counter! | | And as my personal “Thank You” for supporting BRAVE Books , when you contribute a gift of $100 or more it will be my honor to send you The Test of Lionhood as a gift for you and your family to enjoy. You can also bring this critical book to your local library, school, or charity to reach a young boy who may have no other way to get the message that he can be strong! Raising brave boys who grow into men of honor is a critical mission for all of us and I’m so glad that you’re with us. May God Bless You, May God Bless Our Children, and May God Bless America, | | Kevin Sorbo | | | Brave Books 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite C Conroe, TX 77301 | | | ---|---|---

name: Colleen Davis
subject: The East Wing is gone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
But you might not realize what this symbolizes...| | |
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117962332/578232868/1976498213?refcode=EM_F_251025east_N_CD_90DO_13_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5ODA0NWI5LWE2YjEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z67z1CorGoPWle1l3_6IBtRk37fqxpwhyJ-YwjdBBVA=)
---
Some of the most important parts of Women’s American history have just been erased.

As you may have already heard, President Trump has officially demolished the entire East Wing of the White House. He is doing so in order to build a $300 million ballroom. While there are plenty of reasons to find this utterly appalling and upsetting, we at Her Bold Move want to point out another important aspect of this moment.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117962333/578232869/1976498213?refcode=EM_F_251025east_N_CD_90DO_13_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5ODA0NWI5LWE2YjEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z67z1CorGoPWle1l3_6IBtRk37fqxpwhyJ-YwjdBBVA=)
---
As written in _The 19th_ , “The East Wing is home to the Office of the First Lady and has played a key role in women’s visibility in the White House.”
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117962334/578232870/1976498213?refcode=EM_F_251025east_N_CD_90DO_13_G_N_P2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5ODA0NWI5LWE2YjEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z67z1CorGoPWle1l3_6IBtRk37fqxpwhyJ-YwjdBBVA=)
---
**Here is a look at the history that was just destroyed:**

✅ First Lady Eleanor Roosevelt first “professionalized” the East Wing for official functions, as the base for her activism, and as a space to connect with groups that represented the American people.

The 19th wrote, _“From the East Wing, Roosevelt expanded the role of first lady, working to highlight women with intention. Her first news conference, on March 6, 1933, featured 35 reporters, all of them women. During her tenure, she held nearly 350 news conferences, helping to elevate the role of women in national and political life, as well as in journalism.”_

✅ Betty Ford fought to increase pay for her staff in the East Wing.

✅ Rosalynn Carter was the First Lady to keep her own offices in the East Wing.

✅ In the East Wing, Laura Bush launched her literary efforts, and it’s where Michelle Obama oversaw her “Let’s Move” campaign.

We could go on and on, but it’s clear. The East Wing is where First Ladies ran their operations, shaped policy, and fought for the values they believed in.

Trump and his enablers are trying to erase and shrink the power of women in our nation. He stripped millions of American women of our bodily autonomy through his judicial appointments. Now, he has destroyed some of our most treasured history.

**But Her Bold Move knows women’s power in our government is here to stay. Our organization __exists__ to ensure the trails these women blazed stay paved; and that we only keep building and expanding women’s political power on top of the foundation they built for us.**

[**Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office across America. We are combating the _destruction_ of the Trump administration by endorsing, electing, and MEANINGFULLY supporting women running for political office. We prioritize the parts of our government in which male legislators hold supermajorities but still find the audacity to make laws that limit women’s rights. Help support our work to fight for women’s empowerment, our rights, and our future by rushing $25 or more today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117962335/578232871/1976498213?refcode=EM_F_251025east_N_CD_90DO_13_G_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5ODA0NWI5LWE2YjEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z67z1CorGoPWle1l3_6IBtRk37fqxpwhyJ-YwjdBBVA=)

Together,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager

body:
This has escalated into an all out national fight. Tens of millions have been spent by both sides and on the ground it is hand to hand.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wxZk9Qq0AZ9un6IL_-ShpTy8BZFLYNOB7JnVoMfHTm0AslvwoO7njLNQbYu1yXEaRTUAGBrQW8DTpQXtJ5o_jLHW0cFFT5k09CCIdu1YVzVoOSUpTwK4OVj9uz9imH8WMh84Dlg25IW8K6fLbGmVMTeWO5ZupZI0VbYXdEf2Pf_wop9GIAXwOajrnhOMmcCIAbyw0b0sulmyv--YnBVOzMq_bQfgW7uJ&c=aJ_gmHaIvsG5gcmbx61-7Jt40IjITOQ-BWRdk012dNjnKu3YbHLCxg==&ch=2xOf5g6HblM9ZrozMRLK-oBkiAmNZzGqH2dGufj5xBj0Y2B3sTdw4g==)

|
Peter,
The Pennsylvania Supreme Court election, once an obscure and sleepy affair, has escalated into an all out national fight. Tens of millions have been spent by both sides and on the ground it is hand to hand.
The far-right is jockeying to turn this court into a decisive advantage over Democrats and aims to use it to uphold an extreme abortion ban, a full redistrict of the PA congressional map, and to rig the 2026 midterms and 2028 presidential where Trump will seek a third term.
The stakes are life or death.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wxZk9Qq0AZ9un6IL_-ShpTy8BZFLYNOB7JnVoMfHTm0AslvwoO7njLNQbYu1yXEaRTUAGBrQW8DTpQXtJ5o_jLHW0cFFT5k09CCIdu1YVzVoOSUpTwK4OVj9uz9imH8WMh84Dlg25IW8K6fLbGmVMTeWO5ZupZI0VbYXdEf2Pf_wop9GIAXwOajrnhOMmcCIAbyw0b0sulmyv--YnBVOzDvMTQSib8JV&c=aJ_gmHaIvsG5gcmbx61-7Jt40IjITOQ-BWRdk012dNjnKu3YbHLCxg==&ch=2xOf5g6HblM9ZrozMRLK-oBkiAmNZzGqH2dGufj5xBj0Y2B3sTdw4g==)
---
To win this race the GOP has unleashed an unprecedented dirty tricks campaign comprised of deceptive mailers, ads, and now even canvassing efforts, that aim to convince Democrats and Independents to vote for the Republican ballot choices.
Because the Judges appear without partisan affiliation MAGA's ads and mailers use using pro-choice adjacent language into convincing that a no vote (the GOP ballot option) will "protect women"
To combat this, Defend our Courts is doubling down on making it crystal clear to voters that voting YES is the only way to protect women. This week Spotlight PA took notice:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wxZk9Qq0AZ9un6IL_-ShpTy8BZFLYNOB7JnVoMfHTm0AslvwoO7njLNQbYu1yXEaRTUAGBrQW8DTpQXtJ5o_jLHW0cFFT5k09CCIdu1YVzVoOSUpTwK4OVj9uz9imH8WMh84Dlg25IW8K6fLbGmVMTeWO5ZupZI0VbYXdEf2Pf_wop9GIAXwOajrnhOMmcCIAbyw0b0sulmyv--YnBVOzBDGO4ycdZXy&c=aJ_gmHaIvsG5gcmbx61-7Jt40IjITOQ-BWRdk012dNjnKu3YbHLCxg==&ch=2xOf5g6HblM9ZrozMRLK-oBkiAmNZzGqH2dGufj5xBj0Y2B3sTdw4g==)
---
| Unfortunately despite the best efforts of us and our peers, it could all be for nothing.
If the election were held today, there is a very real chance that we would lose it. Polling shows that the GOP's disinformation strategy is working and that many of our voters are confused on whether to vote yes or no.
Defend Our Courts is making a stand and leaving nothing on the table. We are defending this court like the Alamo and are spending money we don't have on a last ditch final round of ads ([see one of them here](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wxZk9Qq0AZ9un6IL_-ShpTy8BZFLYNOB7JnVoMfHTm0AslvwoO7njLNQbYu1yXEaRTUAGBrQW8DTpQXtJ5o_jLHW0cFFT5k09CCIdu1YVzVoOSUpTwK4OVj9uz9imH8WMh84Dlg25IW8K6fLbGmVMTeWO5ZupZI0VbYXdEf2Pf_wop9GIAXwOajrnhOMmcCIAbyw0b0sulmyv--YnBVOzMXKkiC5khYH&c=aJ_gmHaIvsG5gcmbx61-7Jt40IjITOQ-BWRdk012dNjnKu3YbHLCxg==&ch=2xOf5g6HblM9ZrozMRLK-oBkiAmNZzGqH2dGufj5xBj0Y2B3sTdw4g==)) to make it crystal clear for voters that a YES vote is the only way to protect abortion in PA.
[Only 10 days remain to salvage this. If the election were held today, there is a very real chance that we would lose it. Polling shows that the GOP's disinformation strategy is working and that many of our voters are confused on whether to vote yes or no. Defend Our Courts is making a stand and leaving nothing on the table. We are defending this court like the Alamo and are spending money we don't have on a last ditch final round of ads (==) to make it crystal clear for voters that a YES vote is the only way to protect abortion in PA. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Pennsylvania is in the midst of an unprecedented crisis. We will not forget those who came to our aid when all seemed lost. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE.

If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23542%2E4449941%2EP616Zc) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23542%2E4449941%2EP616Zc) [ **“JB PRITZKER COMPARES TRUMP TO PUTIN, CALLS FOR INVOKING 25TH AMENDMENT” ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69618?t=3&akid=23542%2E4449941%2EP616Zc)
_\- CBS News_ [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69618?t=4&akid=23542%2E4449941%2EP616Zc)
**20,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED ** **SIGN OUR PETITION NOW TO TELL CONGRESS:**
[**INVOKE THE 25TH AMENDMENT AND REMOVE DONALD TRUMP FROM OFFICE >> **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69618?t=5&akid=23542%2E4449941%2EP616Zc) | [CLICK TO SIGN >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69618?t=6&akid=23542%2E4449941%2EP616Zc)

The current situation is incredibly scary, friend...

Donald Trump is authorizing [**FULL MILITARY FORCE**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69618?t=7&akid=23542%2E4449941%2EP616Zc) on multiple American cities!!!

While he claims that it’s in the name of public safety...we KNOW that this is nothing but [**_an authoritarian power grab fueled by racism, lies, and fear._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69618?t=8&akid=23542%2E4449941%2EP616Zc)

Democrats are moving to IMPEACH Donald Trump over his lawless actions, but they need to know that Americans from across the country support them.

We’re sending this petition to Washington at 8AM on 10/26, but we’re still missing [547] local signatures.

Look, your signature has never been more important...

[ We’re going ALL-IN on invoking the 25th Amendment to remove him from office! But if we’re going to get it done, we need to prove to Congress that the American people want to see Donald Trump GONE. ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69618?t=9&akid=23542%2E4449941%2EP616Zc)

[ **So please, friend, sign on before our petition closes at 8AM tomorrow:** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69618?t=10&akid=23542%2E4449941%2EP616Zc)
[CLICK TO SIGN >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69618?t=11&akid=23542%2E4449941%2EP616Zc)

* * *
Friend — We just finished celebrating **Hispanic Heritage Month** , a time to honor the incredible contributions of Latinos and Latinas who have shaped our history, enriched our culture, and strengthened our democracy. For me, this month is personal. I came to this country as a young immigrant and a single mother, working three minimum wage jobs while studying to become a social worker. I’ve lived the struggles that so many Latino families face — _and I’ve seen firsthand the strength, resilience, and hope that define our community._ **Elizabeth joins the Democratic Latinos Organization of Virginia to celebrate Hispanic Heritage Month!****** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqY9_0SshaRVEF_zhKoiM5B0ZRvKH5AcXcitAhmkBbv-M31SdfFnIraeose8SPPG7S9yS7ehClbEultxsgbHD1EyO-y02lQO9tKylZR4rjcFCCNEqHqmsZbODzb5QokMUSyFDTi2tjofSKm-LVJoWb66-JkCQ-5mGP4WuASESbRVKWhD8A4eWYnO1FNYdzDr-BhW3GGGk1RSyTAMKCaeoPlInxKO8FulfjzJU-MqxGHjewI_MI6t9YJ1Z5kk3Gwv3d1e58JeV_boIsEnu8n0SpZJA4eVbBHsUe_RA-OfFpZJAlCEA6B2-Qp0LMxr6xPH9pZahCcom1vOTyRaSocJ9BJmOKyvtBKDMFTQ3U_MjpcLezohf469CFay0pBooBD7aMg/4l1/AO6cEriDTuS_GFfc-SyqFg/h3/h001.IUP_XNBilnfhp48-GoqbdgRCbuOhNRkxWotshv4Cxf4) That’s why I ran for office: to make sure every child, no matter where they’re from or what language they speak at home, has a fair shot at a better future. **_To make sure our government sees and serves all of us._** Our community’s story is America’s story — one of hard work, faith, and perseverance. But it’s also a reminder that representation matters. When Latinas win, working families win. **[Can you chip in now to keep us moving forward together?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqdF6ZSh8bvDCSFizRFzTKJfPbQTJ0oNJjuMxfTn4H6HOlWCbQkbwuctnAubVWfshOXwycXB9LGFnPpbKx5ZX4aVk0KwXJH9mPQrrnZp9MyAborLg8deAs6ULJb3MdzR5jKM8l0JLihaNPTE1bcx7CFFq950GrYYijVU7VWZKm1pXF_yXTt3h5sAHFq6IQRIm7alh3FLFHwaF666SQ8i8XykVXEhc8BboZbFJkyNFs6cHr-hKmG71u3m1T6gXprxJpAipj9ueVMwgnYq02_96-SSn9INFaf2WkJtAK9rjjWfgJkdJKluiBa8Qg_hvxDitCOTFfWeKRROWN73_JFBD_K220EC1U_a0529B12khYK2qvEYKI8bq2lCSS10v5DQvfQ/4l1/AO6cEriDTuS_GFfc-SyqFg/h4/h001.vGK9tTN99zNz8hFO1S3HoeIC88XMwVcIaXQHMlFgBRQ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

Democrat [Elizabeth Guzman](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.xqm-apKpWqGuZCDDu9wrxXA8maWDG4HvFsLVwyj62A-g_ZxQ5mBcNCjPmRcBJeb9GvQPVdMxnuz41QIzKLUY3s6Rcc1dEjymQoVRtp2UUq-PrstMI7XePgGTkXNnCLxVRdn8xjynK3zEUuTuy-AkuqmzDzpQgAbl4ryhTXZRDb3ettQQ9M6cOOJVeNmB3TdfaJEWJinc9V-nwHez5O7inBBUbe4vdXg_iRqe2ECGdLDQn4jFSK_rBqT3E0Bu87NjGJpqsvbBQJcYe8Lc1iyNozm9Mw-NoR71k-nc25zqf7VLosMPH3KPTO3OaQHkIsZt01q7GjGS0954URzJROQl6vkGHX8jLbkZkw6W2CE0km-Rru-uCDvFiMmstg_1du09/4l1/AO6cEriDTuS_GFfc-SyqFg/h12/h001.QZ93SzOaHwbQT4zfGBdm5CXce0nz5ABYVoFDAOmbCOA) is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. clean_body: | | | Celebrating Hispanic Heritage Month at Elizabeth’s Hispanic Heritage Month Gala! Friend — We just finished celebrating Hispanic Heritage Month , a time to honor the incredible contributions of Latinos and Latinas who have shaped our history, enriched our culture, and strengthened our democracy. For me, this month is personal. I came to this country as a young immigrant and a single mother, working three minimum wage jobs while studying to become a social worker. I’ve lived the struggles that so many Latino families face — and I’ve seen firsthand the strength, resilience, and hope that define our community. Elizabeth joins the Democratic Latinos Organization of Virginia to celebrate Hispanic Heritage Month!**** That’s why I ran for office: to make sure every child, no matter where they’re from or what language they speak at home, has a fair shot at a better future. To make sure our government sees and serves all of us. Our community’s story is America’s story — one of hard work, faith, and perseverance. But it’s also a reminder that representation matters. When Latinas win, working families win. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Your support helps ensure that our voices are heard, our values are defended, and our progress continues. Con todo mi corazón, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . No backroom deals with special interests. Just real results for working people and families. Here's what I'm ready to deliver: ✅ Crack down on corruption in both the public and private sectors ✅ Hold powerful corporations accountable when they hurt Florida workers and families ✅ Fight to lower costs by taking on bad actors squeezing everyday families ✅ Tackle the fentanyl crisis devastating Floridians across our state ✅ Defend our rights — from voting rights to civil liberties ✅ Take on scammers who prey on Florida families, especially our seniors ✅ Protect minors and the most vulnerable who need someone in their corner This is what the People's Lawyer looks like, Peter. name: Tim Burchett
subject: I just wanted to reach out to you personally, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
We’ve come too far to give up now.

| | | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, I want to get serious with you for a minute. **Democrats have voted more than 10 times to keep our government shut down.**

That’s not political theater—it’s the cold, hard truth. No matter how many ways they try to twist it, _they_ are the ones playing games with the American people.

Honestly, I can’t believe they’ve stooped to this level. I thought I’d seen it all, but Democrats have hit a new low. And after watching the weekend’s ridiculous “No Kings” protests, it’s clear that the Left has lost all touch with reality.

**That’s why I wanted to reach out to you personally, friend. I didn’t send this note to my entire list—just the folks who stood by me in the last election cycle. You’ve been in this fight with me, and I wanted you to hear directly from me.**

I know how worn-out folks are right now—it feels like the stakes just keep getting higher and higher. But I can promise you this: The louder they scream, the more proof we have that conservative values are cutting through the noise.
So don’t let up. Keep standing strong for what’s right. We’re in this together, and I’m not backing down anytime soon.
Sincerely,
---
---
Tim Burchett
---
---
| | |
---

clean_body: We’ve come too far to give up now. | | | | | | | | Friend, I want to get serious with you for a minute. Democrats have voted more than 10 times to keep our government shut down. That’s not political theater—it’s the cold, hard truth. No matter how many ways they try to twist it, they are the ones playing games with the American people. Honestly, I can’t believe they’ve stooped to this level. I thought I’d seen it all, but Democrats have hit a new low. And after watching the weekend’s ridiculous “No Kings” protests, it’s clear that the Left has lost all touch with reality. That’s why I wanted to reach out to you personally, friend. I didn’t send this note to my entire list—just the folks who stood by me in the last election cycle. You’ve been in this fight with me, and I wanted you to hear directly from me. I know how worn-out folks are right now—it feels like the stakes just keep getting higher and higher. But I can promise you this: The louder they scream, the more proof we have that conservative values are cutting through the noise. So don’t let up. Keep standing strong for what’s right. We’re in this together, and I’m not backing down anytime soon. Sincerely, Tim Burchett | | | Stay in Touch 👇 Paid for by Burchett for Congress | | | ---|---|---

We know $2 might not sound like much, especially when the Republican party is preparing to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to try to flip Jon’s seat red... But when thousands of grassroots supporters are all chipping in $2 at time, it all adds up! In 2021, this team was able to defy the odds and win a historic run off election alongside Rev. Warnock and secure the Senate majority — all because of $2, $10, and $25 donations from supporters just like you. Now, we’re counting on your support once again to help Jon win what will likely be the most expensive and competitive race in the nation. = | | = | = Thanks, Team Ossoff * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

subject: Tell Republicans to reopen the government, lower costs, and protect health care! »
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
Add your signature ASAP

| Earlier this year, MAGA Republicans passed the largest cut to Medicaid in history.

At the end of the summer, Trump proposed slashing healthcare _again_ which would raise premiums for 22 million Americans and put thousands of federal employees' jobs at risk.

**And just this past week, Republicans in Congress pushed the country into a shutdown rather than working on a bipartisan solution to lower costs and protect millions of American’s healthcare.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117969951/578246465/-2049238687?refcode=NDCAF_20251025_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDQ4MDAzMi1hYmIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OH2f_00_bUbLB8Va_T_CeBVi-PZbP1iYFh_Q7QS1T7s=&emci=f1a444d8-e4b0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=84480032-abb1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=48524772) | [_ADD YOUR SIGNATURE NOW:_ Tell Republicans to reopen the government, lower costs and protect healthcare »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117969953/578246468/-2049238687?refcode=NDCAF_20251025_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDQ4MDAzMi1hYmIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OH2f_00_bUbLB8Va_T_CeBVi-PZbP1iYFh_Q7QS1T7s=&emci=f1a444d8-e4b0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=84480032-abb1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=48524772)

**With the House, Senate, and White House under their control, the blame rests squarely on them.** While Democrats stayed in Washington fighting to end the crisis, _Republicans went home on vacation._

**Republicans could have avoided this shutdown** — and now our economy, national security, and essential services are all at risk.

That’s why we’re launching an emergency petition demanding Republicans come back to the negotiating table to reopen the government with the guarantee of lower costs and healthcare protections for the American people.

**[New Dems won’t back down as MAGA Republicans hold the American people hostage. We need your signature before midnight. We’re counting on you to stand with us, can you add your name now? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117969955/578246469/-2049238687?refcode=NDCAF_20251025_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDQ4MDAzMi1hYmIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OH2f_00_bUbLB8Va_T_CeBVi-PZbP1iYFh_Q7QS1T7s=&emci=f1a444d8-e4b0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=84480032-abb1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=48524772)**
