clean_body: Add your signature ASAP | Earlier this year, MAGA Republicans passed the largest cut to Medicaid in history. At the end of the summer, Trump proposed slashing healthcare again which would raise premiums for 22 million Americans and put thousands of federal employees' jobs at risk. And just this past week, Republicans in Congress pushed the country into a shutdown rather than working on a bipartisan solution to lower costs and protect millions of American’s healthcare. | With the House, Senate, and White House under their control, the blame rests squarely on them. While Democrats stayed in Washington fighting to end the crisis, Republicans went home on vacation. Republicans could have avoided this shutdown — and now our economy, national security, and essential services are all at risk. That’s why we’re launching an emergency petition demanding Republicans come back to the negotiating table to reopen the government with the guarantee of lower costs and healthcare protections for the American people. – New Dems | | Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund www.newdemactionfund.com Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th St NW Suite 1050, Washington, DC 20006 In 2022, NewDems flipped more competitive seats from red-to-blue than any other ideological caucus. subject: Trump wants to make it easier for states to pass racist gerrymanders

body:
They’re coming for a crown jewel of the civil rights movement
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117969771/578246182/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5NmNhN2VhLWFhYjEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=f16xGJlq8c4zsj-_ssIIcC-6rMyR12uXVX59Y0MlbNQ=&emci=67c9206f-1eb1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c96ca7ea-aab1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Donald Trump’s Justice Department is trying to weaken our voting process — again. Here’s what happened: The Trump administration filed an amicus brief in _Louisiana v. Callais_ — the case that calls into question the constitutionality of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) and Louisiana’s VRA-compliant map. In their argument, the Department of Justice urged the U.S. Supreme Court to end voting rights key protections — a move that infringes on the rights of voters of color and would make it easier for states to draw maps that gerrymander voters of color. This is yet another example of how the Trump administration is weaponizing the Department of Justice by coming for a crown jewel of the civil rights movement. Peter, they’re turning the DOJ’s long-standing track record of defending voting rights on its head. **That’s why the fair maps movement is committed to doing everything we can to hold the line against this assault on our democracy.[Will you rush a donation to make sure we can keep supporting fair representation across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117969773/578246183/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TrumpAntiVotingRightsNOR_email_20251025-NDRC-Tier1-TrumpAntiVotingRightsNOR_B&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251025-NDRC-Tier1-TrumpAntiVotingRightsNOR_B&utm_campaign=TrumpAntiVotingRightsNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5NmNhN2VhLWFhYjEtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=f16xGJlq8c4zsj-_ssIIcC-6rMyR12uXVX59Y0MlbNQ=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Texas, Alabama, and beyond for fair maps and equal representation, and the fair maps movement has to be ready to respond.
Already, GOP politicians have signalled that they’re watching this case closely, and could use it as an avenue to further gerrymander their states.
Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has claimed that his state is “entitled” to another congressional seat — and says he’s prepared to push for one if the Supreme Court guts the Voting Rights Act.
**We must be ready for the political implications of this critical Supreme Court case and respond to whatever comes next.**

clean_body: They’re coming for a crown jewel of the civil rights movement | Peter, Donald Trump’s Justice Department is trying to weaken our voting process — again. Here’s what happened: The Trump administration filed an amicus brief in Louisiana v. Callais — the case that calls into question the constitutionality of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) and Louisiana’s VRA-compliant map. In their argument, the Department of Justice urged the U.S. Supreme Court to end voting rights key protections — a move that infringes on the rights of voters of color and would make it easier for states to draw maps that gerrymander voters of color. This is yet another example of how the Trump administration is weaponizing the Department of Justice by coming for a crown jewel of the civil rights movement. Peter, they’re turning the DOJ’s long-standing track record of defending voting rights on its head. That’s why the fair maps movement is committed to doing everything we can to hold the line against this assault on our democracy.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Texas, Alabama, and beyond for fair maps and equal representation, and the fair maps movement has to be ready to respond. Already, GOP politicians have signalled that they’re watching this case closely, and could use it as an avenue to further gerrymander their states. Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has claimed that his state is “entitled” to another congressional seat — and says he’s prepared to push for one if the Supreme Court guts the Voting Rights Act. We must be ready for the political implications of this critical Supreme Court case and respond to whatever comes next. = Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Ilhan for Congress
subject: $230 million
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
The party of “America First” would rather line their own pockets than help the American people.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1918%2E791427%2EAKe017)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4646?t=2&akid=1918%2E791427%2EAKe017)
Friend, Donald Trump is demanding that the federal government pays him **$230 million** in compensation for investigating his crimes around election interference and compromising classified documents.
This would be a completely unprecedented payout and perhaps one of the most openly unethical moves we’ve ever seen from a President.
And as Americans have come to expect, Republicans in Congress, who are constantly warning about budgets and overspending, are standing by him.
Yes, the party that is currently shutting down the government because they claim they can’t afford health care for working Americans is going to give $230 million to the President of the United State
$230 million from the folks who nickel-and-dime the American people, slash lifesaving programs, and then have the nerve to turn around and tell us to pull ourselves up by our bootstraps.
If Trump and Republicans cared about anyone but themselves, they would use that $230 million to restore some funding for:
* Cancer and vaccine research
* NPR and PBS
* Services for small businesses
* Tax-fraud enforcement
* The National Weather Service
* STEM and education programs
* Clean air and water programs
* National parks and forests

All impactful programs that represent a mere drop in the bucket of the federal budget — and all programs that Trump and Republicans cut this year while giving themselves a huge tax break.
**The bottom line is that the millionaires and billionaires leading the party of “America First” would rather line their own pockets than help the American people,** whether it’s through crypto scams, insider trading, stock manipulation, openly corrupt tax schemes, and now government payouts.
Ilhan Omar believes that our nation has a responsibility to invest in our own people and ensure an affordable, prosperous life. We can afford health care, housing, childcare, and a quality education for _**everyone**_ — it’s just a matter of what our government is willing to do for us. That’s what “America First” should mean. Not giving the president a $230 million check when he demands it.
**[If you agree with this vision for America’s future, consider chipping in to Ilhan Omar’s campaign today. Your donation helps Ilhan continue to hold the line on protecting your health care from Republican cuts and fighting for a budget that reflects our values.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct25.q9Ch2B&refcode=em251025-1-180&t=3&akid=1918%2E791427%2EAKe017)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_

Team Ilhan

Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=1918%2E791427%2EAKe017)**. name: Mark Lamb
subject: I refuse to sit by
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f5d4cad871204e81911391ad0635e62c&_e=3AM72AxWIVe9hjxIBFA6k0Gh2v5f8Ft7err0vPPVV0Zx4BPeFFuP9MfnYtGxSgR094y917dcly2x-XU76JEjTcwtOqvS-_qC38YHv2L3xCPXe6_leqo9W7wlfdpYDZmyx9jDhBXY5XFjWr9CQbZ31czpY0r96L6J26XwqWEoN75ES0p8soUw_dyBXIBp2b1GWDLd7lGeVkdu5DWS6pFgCiqOGghzAIDc4QpAQ-XA0scycUTPTmfb3AgdcBUPzwln6PdaM1tBCyVFqHClNYaeGlgXrRvzyA3D03ELzDUMV30vKbYC_XQgD47zRyy8r1AlMvgijiUyBuxlJaTihlGYNhbAEH82cXNSu0HmZUHpuLwoFmDhSkwVbUj_ng6PatPqjM55RteMw_dfAazId0LS_eePWU68iX1sCOcrpi3BDshTLD-JgpuvvZw4PU4pW9GuJa4rOpV81R8iCCW6DkRW-DGyopHYrdm49NQDf3MEbrxbl0IaBvUmXy82016KAw5RuPME6vLA0hcPkOnjkgQ0kK7okYSEF2n6d0sfLZ6dfg9JOFEu-8Rz8lKkW4Qu6kePr-Qx9xUZ5mLGPXZ60nnKETgTDmuid6hnnGE9ywGCEedpm0kY2thcOQC4zQFDfLrGT_h59X0FxsJ6_ZgFPQDi3MK0p8kRY0h-3bsNBO7_bCA%3D)
---
Fellow patriot —

You may already know me – some of you know me and my story well.

But I want to take this opportunity to reintroduce myself and **share some exciting news.**

**My name is Mark Lamb** — I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and the proud former Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona.

After much prayer and reflection with my family, I’ve made a huge decision: **I am officially running for Congress in Arizona’s 5th District!**

This isn’t about ambition — _it’s about service._ I’ve seen what happens when leaders lack courage and conviction, and I refuse to sit by while feckless politicians and bureaucrats fail our nation’s families.

**I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right** — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now.

[**So I’m taking this fight, along with these principles, to Congress, and I want YOU, fellow patriot, to be part of our team from Day One that’s going to bring home a win.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f5d4cad871204e81911391ad0635e62c&_e=3AM72AxWIVe9hjxIBFA6k0Gh2v5f8Ft7err0vPPVV0Zx4BPeFFuP9MfnYtGxSgR094y917dcly2x-XU76JEjTcwtOqvS-_qC38YHv2L3xCPXe6_leqo9W7wlfdpYDZmyx9jDhBXY5XFjWr9CQbZ31czpY0r96L6J26XwqWEoN75ES0p8soUw_dyBXIBp2b1GWDLd7lGeVkdu5DWS6pFgCiqOGghzAIDc4QpAQ-XA0semi0htCu7oOjPRSXCFQTfRhhBHWaki9LHerGXeJWShHu2CdCEzW0aOSSXwfT_zB0kauMCBEBwEEYOXLY2e0bQa2mQI8981NLe6tOixgaau7GV8p7s15eVW4F5QhqbQE_fvU9NUEeSRbsGVhs5Rj_cCuC8HZocKTUC5nPSDZC_ijOxRa3rJAwFM5i8rY3zO_CArKRuUxLRYTR2eXhV4wiXj3M2kP7nNXG0yvcEDaqdXAK1StujWe5YhCIGUn3kVHphc_5NSfFh7sCjsydMBAnrlbTKE9qK4pKu2o-Fsx51syeNlbC6kKUpqAkDUCCtiw6Buiu0hv2P9ruSKUL7Ed7EPHLDSSAikhATyZfzcru_0-8qqCa3IfLhEJCsKUyfCWMwm7FUykJrB_Kv2-_I1AsbcVzMCrsppYWiMjzE0RyzHplyIJbAmcoGv_RBJ6NVVUF4%3D)

Before I go any further, I want to thank Congressman Andy Biggs for his years of service to AZ-5 and wish him well in his decision to step down from this seat and run for Governor of Arizona.

Andy has always fought hard for conservative values, **and you can trust that I will do the same.**

**You know me, and you know my record.** As Sheriff, I spent years on the frontlines — battling the fentanyl epidemic, fighting cartel violence spilling over our borders, rescuing children from trafficking rings, and holding gang members and criminals accountable.

**Every day, I put on my badge and carried the responsibility of keeping our communities safe.** I’ve seen families ripped apart by crime and drugs, and I’ve felt that pain personally. I’ve seen firsthand the devastating effects of rising crime and failing leadership.

**I won’t stand by while career politicians in Washington make excuses, play politics, and leave families unprotected.**

Our liberty, our safety, and our freedom are not guaranteed by silence — they are defended through action. I will fight in Congress for the same principles I’ve lived by as Sheriff: **personal responsibility, faith, courage, and an unwavering commitment to the people I serve.**

I will stand up to the woke left, to the weak political establishment, and to anyone who puts politics above the safety of our communities.

_This fight will not be easy._ Washington isn’t used to someone who tells it like it is, someone who’s willing to get their hands dirty and put people over politics. But that’s exactly what I intend to do — for Arizona families, for our law enforcement, and for our Constitution.

I’m ready to step up and bring real leadership to Congress, but I can’t do it alone. clean_body: I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now. | Fellow patriot — You may already know me – some of you know me and my story well. But I want to take this opportunity to reintroduce myself and share some exciting news. My name is Mark Lamb — I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and the proud former Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona. After much prayer and reflection with my family, I’ve made a huge decision: I am officially running for Congress in Arizona’s 5th District! This isn’t about ambition — it’s about service. I’ve seen what happens when leaders lack courage and conviction, and I refuse to sit by while feckless politicians and bureaucrats fail our nation’s families. I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now. Before I go any further, I want to thank Congressman Andy Biggs for his years of service to AZ-5 and wish him well in his decision to step down from this seat and run for Governor of Arizona. Andy has always fought hard for conservative values, and you can trust that I will do the same. You know me, and you know my record. As Sheriff, I spent years on the frontlines — battling the fentanyl epidemic, fighting cartel violence spilling over our borders, rescuing children from trafficking rings, and holding gang members and criminals accountable. Every day, I put on my badge and carried the responsibility of keeping our communities safe. I’ve seen families ripped apart by crime and drugs, and I’ve felt that pain personally. I’ve seen firsthand the devastating effects of rising crime and failing leadership. I won’t stand by while career politicians in Washington make excuses, play politics, and leave families unprotected. Our liberty, our safety, and our freedom are not guaranteed by silence — they are defended through action. I will fight in Congress for the same principles I’ve lived by as Sheriff: personal responsibility, faith, courage, and an unwavering commitment to the people I serve. I will stand up to the woke left, to the weak political establishment, and to anyone who puts politics above the safety of our communities. This fight will not be easy. Washington isn’t used to someone who tells it like it is, someone who’s willing to get their hands dirty and put people over politics. But that’s exactly what I intend to do — for Arizona families, for our law enforcement, and for our Constitution. I’m ready to step up and bring real leadership to Congress, but I can’t do it alone. Every contribution — big or small — sends a message: that hard-working families won’t be ignored, that our freedoms matter, and that courage still counts in America. I’m ready, fellow patriot. Are you with me? For God, Family, and Country, Mark Lamb Republican for Congress, AZ-5 P.S. I want to make it clear that the outpouring of support you’ve shown me and my wife, Janel, in the past factored into our decision to make this run. As Sheriff, I couldn’t have accomplished what I did without my deputies, and I won’t be able to succeed in this fight without you. Thank you! Join Mark Lamb on social media! | | PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

Peter, When defending the Constitution is popular, every politician wants to claim the title of "conservative." But when defending your freedoms is hard, and when standing up for liberty means standing alone, you see who really means it.

I've __never__ wavered. Not when the media attacks, not when the D.C. elite demand compromise, and not when both parties push for more spending, more surveillance, or more government overreach.

I will **ALWAYS** defend the Constitution, even when it means being the lone voice for liberty in the Senate. Because I know what's at stake: our freedom, and the future we leave for the next generation.

If you believe in limited government, the Bill of Rights, and that America's future depends on bold leadership that never backs down, then I need you with me.

clean_body: When defending the Constitution is popular, every politician wants to claim the title of “conservative.” | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Peter, When defending the Constitution is popular, every politician wants to claim the title of "conservative." But when defending your freedoms is hard, and when standing up for liberty means standing alone, you see who really means it. I've never wavered. Not when the media attacks, not when the D.C. elite demand compromise, and not when both parties push for more spending, more surveillance, or more government overreach. I will ALWAYS defend the Constitution, even when it means being the lone voice for liberty in the Senate. Because I know what's at stake: our freedom, and the future we leave for the next generation. If you believe in limited government, the Bill of Rights, and that America's future depends on bold leadership that never backs down, then I need you with me. I don't take the easy way out. I fight for you. But I cannot do it alone. In liberty, Rand Paul | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate | | P.O. body:
Now is not the time to take things for granted.

Peter, today marks ten days until Election Day.
Everything we've built over the last two years has led to this moment — the doors we've knocked, dollars we've raised, and conversations we've had with people all across Virginia.
_But now is not the time to take things for granted._
In the last couple of weeks, Donald Trump has endorsed Winsome's campaign. The polls have shown her gaining ground. And national Republicans have spent millions on attack ads against me.
_I've overcome the odds before, and with you by my side, I'm ready to do it again._
[_**These next ten days are crucial. Will you make your first donation of $25 to help us keep airing ads, knocking on doors, and turning out voters?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117971755/578249747/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTJjNmM1ZjQtYWNiMS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3AsKxSiWzRb6L_K8EWjvta2pJnx2MfAVotp9usfPvsM=)

clean_body: Now is not the time to take things for granted. = Peter, today marks ten days until Election Day. Everything we've built over the last two years has led to this moment — the doors we've knocked, dollars we've raised, and conversations we've had with people all across Virginia. But now is not the time to take things for granted. In the last couple of weeks, Donald Trump has endorsed Winsome's campaign. The polls have shown her gaining ground. And national Republicans have spent millions on attack ads against me. I've overcome the odds before, and with you by my side, I'm ready to do it again. = = = = = = = Thanks for having my back, Abigail Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. body:
Donald Trump is scared of Mikie Sherrill. That’s why he’s doing everything he can to flip New Jersey red this upcoming election
Peter, Donald Trump and his administration are scared of Mikie Sherrill.
That’s why they’re doing everything they can to flip New Jersey red this upcoming election — **including releasing Mikie’s personal military records, including her Social Security number, to an ally of opponent’s campaign. And Jack’s campaign disseminated those records too — while falsely smearing Mikie and her family.**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: It isn’t easy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Back when I first decided to run for U.S. Senate, I knew it wouldn’t be easy. I knew there’d be a ton of travel, events, time spent on the phone, time away from my family.
#

Friend —
Back when I first decided to run for U.S. Senate, I knew it wouldn’t be easy. I knew there’d be a ton of travel, events, time spent on the phone, and time away from my family.
You have to face millions and millions of dollars in attack ads during the campaign, and square off against corporate special interests and the wealthy and powerful when you’re in office.
You have to watch the president and his supporters attack you and try to convince the country you’re some kind of terrible person, or even a traitor to the country you served your whole life.
And you have to hope that millions of people you might never meet will see all of that and still have your back.
That’s why your support means so much to me. And it’s why I tell you so often that I can’t do this without you. Contributions of $5 or $10 from grassroots supporters are by far the largest source of donations we have.
None of this happens without you. It really means a lot to me. And it’s why I’m coming around to this request:
[**Please, can you make a donation of $3 before my official FEC reporting deadline at the end of the month? I’ve got to report my fundraising numbers publicly, and a ton of people will be watching.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-oct25/.P901v0&refcode=em251025-1-800k&t=1&akid=6226%2E6688874%2EoyARrx)

Jason Miyares has used his position to carry water for Trump’s allies, push an extreme agenda, and put politics ahead of the people of Virginia. Now, they’re pouring big money into his campaign to hold onto this seat. 2 → Early voting is already underway. Over 800,000 Virginians have already cast their ballots, and millions more will head to the polls on Election Day. We need to reach as many voters as possible in these final days. 3 → This race will come down to the wire. With just 10 days until Election Day, every single dollar could be the difference between four more years of MAGA control or an Attorney General who will defend reproductive freedom, protect voting rights, and stand up for every Virginian. Team, Virginia should be a firewall against Trump, not a launching pad for his movement. name: Team DNC
subject: Here’s the truth:
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
Derek,

If you’re on other email lists, you probably receive panicked emails that try to scare you into taking action. Too many PACs and politicians view their supporters as their own personal ATMs.

Here’s what we believe:

You are _not_ an ATM. You are an invaluable part of our organization and our mission.

Instead of trying to scare you into contributing, we want to provide you with information about the DNC’s work that inspires you and makes you _want_ to join us.

Instead of misleading you, our goal is always to make sure you have accurate, up-to-date information about how we will put your contribution to work.

So here’s the truth:

The DNC is the organization best positioned to distribute funds and resources to the candidates, state parties, and races that need it most.

[**When you receive a message from us asking for your support, that’s exactly where your contribution goes. Today, your donation will help us elect Democrats in states like Virginia and New Jersey and lay the groundwork to take back Congress next year. You can use this link to chip in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?refcode=em_20251025_5005_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5005_22930333_uXMTvK&akid=5005%2E22930333%2EuXMTvK)

Thank you,

The Democrats The Democrats |
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?refcode=em_20251025_5005_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5005_22930333_uXMTvK&akid=5005%2E22930333%2EuXMTvK)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Team Miyares
subject: Jay Jones caught misleading about his criminal case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
He’s covering this up in front of us all.| | | Friend,

**Jay Jones got caught misleading Virginia voters again.**

For weeks, Jones has been telling reporters and voters that his criminal case is "shut" and that he's been "held accountable by the Virginia State Police."

---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/rnX3AwhuoifR-vkCEH0KNtnq9ZFam5V8DgibFS42M80FjB_EpvqCfi0_wvgj19YrBGy3QYfYrqZTurAK3jrrAJaDrTwtlmpnwvn5JCEBbWOzSuSyYOxcd0FmuGozfqg8peibFDHaH-kTzkhXjThFzTOo2zubOAdEz2GND0jgvfTMPY062ltGyG3mFj50nC2B9vXv47WPngaVVfr_gmMLUb-oRcuswJ0Ut9P8u6npfD7ZuPcCsXOPtVOuUYBtD3htRbznDRgVcQusHF_TGFUImh2B5YBUB0wa0eTvgrqDwiiT8WaWTQiRSR3GKIwUN8Dp8uTT8tKmGoGZG-HaF5KDKm_wvs9acvUHMWKGV7IwNHCXhTR_ofPyFiBCBRM9j1LzeKYr_kKVu1_DPRi9S9TAQB5TfA20b3QIbtvulk6c83wfTbX4GavapT9vaREwuG_Sb1gfKNo386OsH3Mm0Gn5qNYwfBKUvF0RywhIFODmRL9jkDQrEYxUggkYutlH2VSUduSXL_ieVLON-eXH2B7exBv2h_C40jfPQORauF_BqNDs-TMrXyfAv4ANDjM3Gg7ARAz3RVEY8ZRzPPKk36Ht/w6pBmahOoN_lMM0n9_xBbcyYt044iCQK/14)
---
**That couldn't be further from the truth.**

A special prosecutor has been appointed and the investigation is **"currently pending."** Commonwealth attorneys are actively investigating Jones' community service scam.

Jones has been deceiving Virginia voters about being under criminal investigation while running to be our top law enforcement officer. **If he had any respect for you, he would suspend his campaign for Attorney General.**

**Special prosecutors get appointed when something seriously stinks.** The fact that they're reportedly digging into Jones' community service scheme proves this goes way deeper than reckless driving.

Jay Jones wants you to believe that he can command the respect to lead Virginia’s police and prosecutors. **He cannot do that while they are actively investigating him.**

👉 [_**End this nonsense and re-elect Attorney General Jason Miyares.**_](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/MBA7v-hzQAqKcgXNKsar4m8kJpEJUZooTcRmmeaXJ5fFLUeddFrBLj7TH-Joq_mXw3XgQitnhyRQRs2ui6sGjISSUVJC4-sXkifQQSFqgHmzbGRmSwKE2Zm-qwiSNk0nJur6ORQc1KabxkPRtSNnwzEL1WVPwd5uj0bMK-JkoqL-_gu2KirTg5iSUfzDcfdNjrG_nlcxkT51dvGrRZhnSEC9tmTeO1mQtKsXlSlGeNlLt3WmwJQXYf8RqSJRfBdX0hNEh9WoZklTCGJERlZCiqNe7NLlLSH_BoJtFx-FCrCGVcIa8MAgnY4moe56ieDusatDACVXxy7ay2o_ifI7bV05JOGe6l50Y_il3wsaJXROTzytSa70mXoaj74pIUszbnrJVuUjK9HTtWzJADigY5KwxFjPCJDKn8GfxnK-q3_cuEyIJ67Ns-iNOL35yo0jN3l0puJlR_OIrXM-3g8-AuOJDEQZLXPBpFcR6itkuMpVGKs6GWNC_0Y58LlvW4Ov5_cJBuSGYlItULRrK7FCyE9Y-TVRyh8NhAiWT_Ib21cJV6HpGLtI2bQAV72kTmlv0PumAwnKdk1wjHeXsNc7/GDVymhW7WgzzAA3CEXh2hzsOWv4yKUai/14)

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Watch my appearance on Everybody Gets Pie!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117977458/578259530/-1798313451?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTFlNjZjZTItYjFiMS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=99EOxcR5gW344dO8VsOQai0E6Ozgalhpw7qBL0kjAcY=) Friend, Can the federal government actually help fix our housing crisis? I think so, and I laid out how in a new interview on the podcast Everybody Gets Pie. We talked about cutting through red tape, building more homes faster, and how federal policy can actually empower states like California to lead on housing again. name: Letitia James
subject: I was arraigned yesterday on baseless charges
body:
Peter, I want to be direct with you about Trump’s blatant abuse of our justice system that has just happened.
But if you don’t need to read any further because you’re already fed up and have seen and heard enough of his political revenge tour, rush a rapid-response donation right now to help me stand firm against the sham indictment that’s been filed against me. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?refcode=101325_2]
RUSH A RAPID RESPONSE DONATION NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?refcode=101325_2]
So here’s what happened: Donald Trump fired the U.S. attorney who refused to bring baseless charges against me and then replaced them with someone who is blindly loyal to him – not the rule of law.
But, Peter, this is not just about me. It’s about the dangerous precedent being set for our justice system – where any president can install their own prosecutor to punish their political rivals.
That’s not democracy. That’s authoritarianism.
The truth is simple: My office is doing its job. We’ve followed the facts, the evidence, and the law – and judges have upheld our case that not only has Donald Trump and his company committed fraud, but many of his administration’s heinous executive orders have been unconstitutional.
So now, instead of facing accountability, he’s trying to rewrite the rules and discredit me for holding him accountable. But I refuse to back down.
This is a historic moment in our nation’s history – not just for me, but for the rule of law in America and defending our justice system. And that’s why I need your voice and your support today.
Will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can to my campaign and Real Texas PAC before midnight to stand with me against this dangerous abuse of our justice system? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?refcode=101325_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Letitia James and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_2&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_2&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_2&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?refcode=101325_2&amount=25]
Thank you for standing with me in this fight for justice.
– Letitia James

name: Team Tina
subject: Oregon deserves a public health system that’s ready to meet the moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Our federal government and officials like RFK Jr. can’t be trusted to look out for us. |
#
---
Peter, Tina’s proud to announce that she’s joined 14 other governors to create a multi-state public health alliance. Our goal is to ensure faster, more effective responses to public health threats across state lines. Oregonians deserve a public health system that’s ready to meet the moment — whether that’s a virus outbreak, a wildfire smoke event, or a long-term public health challenge. This alliance is about staying one step ahead and making sure every Oregonian has access to the care, information, and protection they need. **We’re proud that Oregon is working with other states to make that happen – especially since our federal government and officials like HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. certainly can’t be trusted to look out for us. ** If we can’t count on them, we need to count on each other. And today, Tina needs your support to keep moving forward on policies that protect our communities. Your contribution ensures we can continue critical work like this without compromising our values. name: Jermaine Johnson
subject: What are your thoughts on the shutdown?
body:
You’re receiving this email because you’re an engaged Democrat who cares about the future of our country. Jermaine Johnson is a Democrat exploring a run for Governor of South Carolina to challenge likely Republican nominee Nancy Mace. If you’d like to unsubscribe from these mailings, unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/t2QV_7tTjkaiMS3xjEGomg2?unsubscribedata=a4iv1IqUuHWQcHzBPMYFaPDhm0zpPBNehhOCuLbHMZMITVT5DRA2JElOnkxqmU8hNEzf1EmtOfR6kKnre6CO1dcrhEESzRXPhxzTPRrF%2B08UBlwDtttvikB5MilfpNDyQqq1LOcBFHig35xIoV%2F%2B9xQxe4m3DXvqyWtRpSfMRW77H36snzt4LE73CF2F1Gz2tR6fhWdtixS8bQtXJWt11H8mpmj0l6M7WqKI0BK3iKmOrRvVupHAH0WtsdVN%2Bj390EQV2jA9%2FrzkfXA%2FoeiGud%2FS5lxogwGnNQRqNrpXid%2BeShO%2BhoJc9RdesVwvgW5Rz%2F0NN5NERTg48BknOGo4MA2KOd7m8eoT3OH6TdjxTClm8vceQrtd4wNfyBhbZ3gzXyZn7izSUybFRPs0bJnxubkiLt0DH3DoBm5ZP%2Bz6jtP1VhtJ5VBwKUZBUQ5FgyyZ .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jjsc_footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jjsc_footer]
Willis, I’m Jermaine Johnson. My journey has taken me from being homeless on the streets of South Carolina to serving in the State House. Now, I'm exploring a run for Governor to give back to the state that made me - because South Carolina deserves better than one-party rule.
As you know, the federal government is currently shut down because Democrats and Republicans couldn’t come together to pass a budget.
Do you believe like I do that South Carolinians deserve better from their elected officials than the divisive politics that led us to this shutdown? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CUZ55SwvQ06TuQw_7UrJXA2]
YES [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CUZ55SwvQ06TuQw_7UrJXA2] NO [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CUZ55SwvQ06TuQw_7UrJXA2]
This isn’t some abstract fight happening in Washington - it’s hitting us right here in South Carolina.
* Nearly 40,000 federal workers in our state will see their paychecks frozen

* People who depend on VA hospitals across the state will see delays in care

* Families who rely on WIC benefits will lose access to healthy food and formula they rely on
I believe South Carolinians deserve leaders who will work together in good faith in order to put their constituents' needs first. I’d like to know where you stand on the issue.
Do you believe Washington politicians like Nancy Mace need to put politics aside and END this shutdown - because it’s hurting real people here in South Carolina? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CUZ55SwvQ06TuQw_7UrJXA2]
YES [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CUZ55SwvQ06TuQw_7UrJXA2] NO [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CUZ55SwvQ06TuQw_7UrJXA2]
Thanks for sharing your thoughts, Willis. The best is yet to come here in South Carolina. Stay tuned!
More soon,
Jermaine Johnson
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jjsc_footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jjsc_footer]I’m Jermaine Johnson, and I’m exploring a run to be the next Governor of South Carolina.
I wasn’t born into power — I fought my way into it. I'm not a career politician or a wealthy insider. I'm a husband, father, and fighter who knows what it’s like to grow up with nothing and still keep pushing forward.
Chip in now as we prepare for the fight ahead » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jjsc_footer]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jjsc_footer]

Johnson for South Carolina
PO BOX 461
Hopkins, SC 29061
United States

I know you’re likely getting a ton of emails from candidates and causes right now, friend.

**But I have to ask:[Is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $10 between Lisa Blunt Rochester and my Senate campaign in Ohio?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117979489/578264491/-984392851?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.25_Sherrod-Brown_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmI3YTY0Yy1iM2IxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=prlCASdhFaU9ch6SnFQa2cketjDUZwVKPkFy1rrQvjc=)**

What if I told you that right after I joined this race, experts at _The Cook Political Report_ increased our odds of winning?

What if I told you that _CNN_ and _The New York Times_ report that Ohio is “in play” – but that corporate special interests are gearing up to spend millions against me?

name: Brad Finstad
subject: He’s Gone Full Radical…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Dear Friend, Over the weekend my Democrat opponent participated in a “No Kings” protest. You can see the signs for yourself: these were anti-Trump, anti-Republican rallies filled with liberal activists attacking conservatives and mocking anyone who stands with President Trump.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| My opponent didn’t just attend. He _stood shoulder-to-shoulder_ with those calling conservatives “parasites” and “fascists.” He stood with the same people who threatened President Trump with the chant “86 / 47.” These are the same people who want to abolish ICE and even our local police departments. That’s who the Democrat Party is today. They don’t want to fix the border. They don’t want to lower costs for working families. They want more government spending that will bankrupt our children. With Republicans holding the line on spending, they don’t know what to do other than shout, protest, and divide. I’m proud to stand with President Trump and fight for our farmers, small businesses, families, and Minnesota values... not liberal mobs in the street. Can I count on you to chip in today to help me continue the fight to keep southern Minnesota red?
---
| | [Chip in $10](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)
---
| | [Chip in $25](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)
---
| | [Chip in $50](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)
---
| | [Chip in $100](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)
---
| Thank you for standing with me,
**– Brad**

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Every single one of us has a reason why we keep going
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
I want to know your story |
#
---
Team — I launched Fight Like Hell PAC because I believe we can win anywhere, even in the toughest places, by staying focused on what matters most in people’s lives. That means working with anyone willing to get things done, standing strong against those who won’t, and always putting people first. It’s the same approach that’s helped me lower costs, protect freedoms, and deliver for Michigan families. **Every single one of us has a reason why we keep going, even when the odds are tough.** For some, it’s protecting reproductive freedom. For others, it’s making sure families can afford groceries, health care, and housing. clean_body: I want to know your story | Team — I launched Fight Like Hell PAC because I believe we can win anywhere, even in the toughest places, by staying focused on what matters most in people’s lives. That means working with anyone willing to get things done, standing strong against those who won’t, and always putting people first. It’s the same approach that’s helped me lower costs, protect freedoms, and deliver for Michigan families. Every single one of us has a reason why we keep going, even when the odds are tough. For some, it’s protecting reproductive freedom. For others, it’s making sure families can afford groceries, health care, and housing. For all of us, it’s about leaving a better future for the people we love. | | When we share our stories, we show the strength of this grassroots movement, and we remind each other what’s at stake. Thank you for sharing yours. — Gretchen Whitmer Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117980340/578267255/-1903415953?&refcode=E15855-20251025-WarnerServeVA-Image-SplitSend&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2I3YTY0Yy1iM2IxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NJwk4-E84vVS8nhoFM9CnbvbgBdfdPQrClwQS5r4zRU=) Peter — For me, Virginia means everything. It’s a place that took me in and allowed me to call it home. I’ve spent decades in business here, creating jobs in Virginia. And it’s been the greatest honor of my life to serve Virginia, first as Governor and now as Senator. I could go on and on about what makes Virginia so special, but this year the Commonwealth has a unique opportunity: In 10 days, Virginia voters will send President Trump his first report card. If we flip the Governorship and expand our razor-thin majority in the House of Delegates – and do it by voting in record numbers – we will send Trump and Republicans in Congress a huge wakeup call. Then next year, frankly, will be a big moment for us again: Senate Republicans think they can expand their majority by defeating me. And simply put, there’s no Senate majority for Democrats if we lose this seat. So, Peter, we've got a lot of work to do over the next few weeks to hand Trump a devastating defeat in Virginia, and I am asking you to join me in this work. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I’m launching an investigation into the demolition of the White House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2685%2E4032634%2EyLlxvs)
---
This is the Trump administration summed up in one image: illegal, destructive, and not helping you. | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-east-wing-investigation?source=EMZ28D_GOP_E_20251025_V1S1&t=8&akid=2685%2E4032634%2EyLlxvs)
---
Americans are losing their health care, families are paying more for groceries, federal workers are missing their paychecks, but Donald Trump has prioritized wining and dining corporate executives from Meta, Comcast, Microsoft, Palantir, Lockheed Martin, Amazon, and Google (just to name a few) to fundraise for his new $300+ million gold encrusted ballroom at the White House.
Five days after this fundraising dinner, demolition started.
Here’s the thing: Many of the corporations donating to Trump’s ballroom are regulated by federal agencies, seeking regulatory approvals, or are currently under investigation by the Department of Justice — raising serious ethics concerns over any backroom deals and special favors being offered in exchange for donations. Do they really think we're dumb enough to believe they're not getting something in return for their donations?
And the organizations involved with overseeing this project — the National Park Service and the nonpartisan Trust for the National Mall — have seemingly become vehicles for politicized fundraising, putting aside established processes when it comes to approving construction on the White House.
**The American people deserve answers. So I've launched an investigation into the contracting and approval process for the demolition of the White House and whether the corporate donors funding Trump's ballroom are seeking favors with the Administration.**
[**Add your name if you support this investigation****. Help show that the American people demand transparency about the agreements behind this vanity project.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-east-wing-investigation?source=EMZ28D_GOP_E_20251025_V1S1&t=9&akid=2685%2E4032634%2EyLlxvs)
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-east-wing-investigation?source=EMZ28D_GOP_E_20251025_V1S1&t=10&akid=2685%2E4032634%2EyLlxvs)
---
Trump’s priorities are on full display right now:
Instead of cutting health care costs, he is cutting off a wing of the White House.
Instead of helping Americans afford their groceries, he is paving the Rose Garden with concrete.
Instead of bringing down inflation, he is wining and dining corporate donors to bankroll his vanity project.
It’s a slap in the face to the American people. I’m not going to just stand by and watch this happen.
[**We need to investigate any form of potential corruption surrounding the building of this ballroom and the source of donations. Add your name to join me in pressing for answers.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-east-wing-investigation?source=EMZ28D_GOP_E_20251025_V1S1&t=11&akid=2685%2E4032634%2EyLlxvs)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

name: Sharice Davids
subject: We’ve reached a boiling point
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’m sorry to reach out over the weekend, but I wanted to make sure you heard the update

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117983815/578271479/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzU1MTViMS1iNGIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_0-DSzs2NjnkB6QjjOPfETPEJIPlIJqQA1M9Fp_yGo=) Hey there, it’s Sharice. I’m sorry to reach out over the weekend, but I wanted to make sure you heard the update: Remember that far-right dark money group that pledged to spend **$1 million** to gerrymander me and other Democrats out of Congress? Well, that was only the beginning. Here in Kansas, we’ve reached a boiling point — and right-wing attacks are coming at us from _every_ direction. **I hate to reach out again with another fundraising request, but given the staggering amount of money we’re up against right now, we can’t just sit back and hope things will go our way. We have to push back while we still have the opportunity. Can you chip in and help us out?** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117983817/578271480/-1213029538?refcode=email_102525_point&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzU1MTViMS1iNGIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_0-DSzs2NjnkB6QjjOPfETPEJIPlIJqQA1M9Fp_yGo=)
---
There’s a pretty simple reason why Kansas GOP leadership is working so hard to kick me out of Congress — and it’s not only because I’m the only federally elected Democrat from our state. It’s because they see me as an outsider to the ultra-exclusive country club that is Washington.
**And they’re not lying. At least not in this case.**
I am an outsider in Washington, and proud of it. Before I ran for Congress, I had never held elected office before. But I ran because I was fed up with what I was seeing, just like so many others: A small handful of powerful special interests dictating every part of the GOP’s agenda.
Let’s not beat around the bush here: I’m a red-state Democrat, a former MMA fighter, and an LGBTQ+ Native American woman. So it’s fair to say, I _definitely_ stick out in Congress. And that’s exactly why Kansas Republicans are working around the clock to replace me with another of their own — another far-right rubber stamp who cares more about currying favor with Donald Trump than doing what’s right for our state.
[_**So, if you believe a background like mine belongs in Congress, can you chip in right away? There is so much riding on the outcome of this gerrymandering battle here in Kansas, so we have to give this fight everything we’ve got until the final bell rings.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117983818/578271486/-1213029538?refcode=email_102525_point&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzU1MTViMS1iNGIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_0-DSzs2NjnkB6QjjOPfETPEJIPlIJqQA1M9Fp_yGo=)

Hi, null,

[**I’m writing today to ask if you’ll donate $25 to my campaign.**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7349?t=4&akid=1169%2E49239%2E03jBP-) But first, I want to tell you why your $25 matters so much – especially today.
I’m a proud Michigander. I grew up here, the daughter of two hardworking parents who ran a small landscaping business. **I love Michigan – and I’ve spent my whole life fighting for families like mine.**

When the auto industry was on the brink during the Great Recession, I helped save 200,000 Michigan jobs. Later, as a congresswoman, I played a leading role in passing legislation to rebuild American manufacturing.
And when Trump tried to use the military to silence protestors, I introduced the Stop Trump’s Abuse of Power Act – because I believe no one, not even a president, should be above the law.

**Now I’m running for U.S. Senate because I believe Michiganders deserve someone who will always put working people first – not politics, not billionaires, and definitely not Donald Trump.**
But here’s the truth: Trump and his MAGA allies are desperate to turn Michigan red, and GOP megadonors are gearing up to spend tens of millions to make that happen.

Trump has already endorsed my Republican opponent because he _knows_ our battleground race will likely decide what party controls the Senate – and what kind of country we wake up to after Election Day in 2026.
_Will the MAGA agenda become the law of the land in America? Or will Democrats flip the Senate and provide a real check on Donald Trump’s dangerous vision for our country?_

**We need to fight back, and I need you with me.**[**That’s why I’m personally asking you to donate $25 today, on Oct. 25, to help us hold the line in Michigan, flip the Senate, and put a real check on Trump’s chaos agenda.**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7349?t=5&akid=1169%2E49239%2E03jBP-)
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7348?t=6&akid=1169%2E49239%2E03jBP-)
---
Thank you for believing in this campaign – and in me – and our fight for a better future.

Haley
|

**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. body:
|
#
---
Peter, Donald Trump has always had a complex about his own wealth. For decades, he lied about how much money he had so he could stay on the _Forbes_ list of the wealthiest Americans. So it’s no surprise that he has already engaged in unprecedented levels of corruption to enrich himself during his second term. But the scale is mind-blowing. **According to _Forbes_ , Trump's net worth has increased by $3 billion since beginning his second term. Yes, three BILLION dollars.** His primary means of enriching himself has been crypto. This is especially corrupt considering that, while in office, he’s rolled back regulations on crypto and has vowed to make the U.S. the _“crypto capital of the world."_ Even before the Presidential inauguration, Trump introduced his own meme coin — a digital product that has no value — which netted him _hundreds of millions of dollars._ Then, his crypto company launched a stablecoin while simultaneously pushing stablecoin legislation that would directly benefit his financial interest. I was lead counsel in Donald Trump’s first impeachment for corruptly abusing his official power, and very little that he does surprises me. But I continue to be shocked by _how openly and brazenly he is doing it_. And how little his Republican lackeys care. I ran for Congress to protect our democracy and ensure that the rule of law continues to guide our nation. **That’s why I firmly believe that we must significantly beef up our public corruption laws to stop Trump’s rampant corruption.** I’ll never stop fighting to hold Trump and his enablers accountable. Together, we can continue to train the spotlight on Trump’s self-enriching agenda and repair trust in our democracy and elected officials. **[Will you join me with a donation of any amount today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117985055/578274746/-2144685249?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251025_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTlkYTAxNy1iNmIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OTRQOt9HvP1v2XWS6o4p1ZltFA7NCJyadLgN-NzwZkQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117985056/578274750/-2144685249?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251025_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTlkYTAxNy1iNmIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OTRQOt9HvP1v2XWS6o4p1ZltFA7NCJyadLgN-NzwZkQ=)

clean_body: | Peter, Donald Trump has always had a complex about his own wealth. For decades, he lied about how much money he had so he could stay on the Forbes list of the wealthiest Americans. So it’s no surprise that he has already engaged in unprecedented levels of corruption to enrich himself during his second term. But the scale is mind-blowing. According to Forbes , Trump's net worth has increased by $3 billion since beginning his second term. Yes, three BILLION dollars. His primary means of enriching himself has been crypto. This is especially corrupt considering that, while in office, he’s rolled back regulations on crypto and has vowed to make the U.S. the “crypto capital of the world." Even before the Presidential inauguration, Trump introduced his own meme coin — a digital product that has no value — which netted him hundreds of millions of dollars. Then, his crypto company launched a stablecoin while simultaneously pushing stablecoin legislation that would directly benefit his financial interest. I was lead counsel in Donald Trump’s first impeachment for corruptly abusing his official power, and very little that he does surprises me. But I continue to be shocked by how openly and brazenly he is doing it. And how little his Republican lackeys care. I ran for Congress to protect our democracy and ensure that the rule of law continues to guide our nation. That’s why I firmly believe that we must significantly beef up our public corruption laws to stop Trump’s rampant corruption. I’ll never stop fighting to hold Trump and his enablers accountable. Together, we can continue to train the spotlight on Trump’s self-enriching agenda and repair trust in our democracy and elected officials. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Phil Weiser
subject: We didn’t start this fight, but we must do our part to stop it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado
body:
Attacks on your right to representation can’t go unanswered.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117985862/578277473/1239926708?refcode=em_WEI_FR_Redistricting_102525_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NThhYTg3Ny1iN2IxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FB_WLKRZiYMC93moFqDcSgaM4l29Nex2sOVqapj_1pU=&emci=6421ac89-33b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=658aa877-b7b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=51844520) Here’s the way things are _supposed_ to work, Friend: Voters choose their leaders through fair elections. Constituents are organized into fairly-drawn Congressional districts that are reevaluated every ten years. That ten-year cycle safeguards everyone’s right to fair representation. I have long supported Colorado’s gold standard of redistricting by an independent commission, and I still do. I will also not stand idly by when rules protecting fairness are trampled on and yet another norm is broken by President Trump. Right now, the president has called for Republican-led states like Texas, Ohio, North Carolina, and Indiana to redraw their voting maps to favor Republicans in unprecedented mid-decade redistricting. The explicit goal is to hand-pick their voters into newly aligned districts, stack the deck for upcoming elections, and shift the balance of power in Congress. _Stated simply, it’s more norm-breaking, bullying behavior._ **[I’ve heard from Coloradans all across our state that our next governor must be ready to stand strong and to fight back against Trump’s attacks on our democracy. And I’m ready to act. If you’re with us, please support our campaign here>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117985865/578277479/-1377276739?refcode=em_WEI_FR_Redistricting_102525_B&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NThhYTg3Ny1iN2IxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FB_WLKRZiYMC93moFqDcSgaM4l29Nex2sOVqapj_1pU=)** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117985867/578277486/-1377276739?refcode=em_WEI_FR_Redistricting_102525_B&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NThhYTg3Ny1iN2IxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FB_WLKRZiYMC93moFqDcSgaM4l29Nex2sOVqapj_1pU=)
---
**Here’s the question for Colorado — do we sit idly by or do we prepare to take these challenges to our democracy head-on? I am on Team Democracy.**
To protect our democracy and fairness in districting, I support a “break the glass” in case of emergency option that would enable Colorado to redraw our maps mid-decade only if the Trump agenda is successful. And making clear that we are ready to counter efforts to gain an unfair advantage by Republicans is our best strategy for trying to stop them.
I recognize that adjusting our maps wouldn’t be a quick, one-step process. _And that’s a good thing._ Our state’s redistricting process puts you — the voters — in the driver’s seat.
Over 55% of voters would need to agree at the ballot box to amend our Constitution and allow for a narrow exception to the ten-year redistricting cycle, specifically to combat other states’ cynical tactics. Then, the soonest any new maps would be able to go into effect is 2028. That means any new maps will start with a clear mandate from Coloradans and time for proper implementation.
**[We didn’t pick this fight. And we cannot afford to be bystanders as Trump tries to stack the deck in upcoming elections. Please join our team and donate to our campaign, which is committed to our democracy and standing strong against the Trump agenda to undermine it>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117985869/578277492/-1377276739?refcode=em_WEI_FR_Redistricting_102525_B&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NThhYTg3Ny1iN2IxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FB_WLKRZiYMC93moFqDcSgaM4l29Nex2sOVqapj_1pU=)**
With you for democracy,
Phil
|

Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add teamphil@philforcolorado.com to your address book.

This campaign is powered by grassroots donations. You can **[click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117985870/578277494/2016161966?refcode=weiserfooter&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NThhYTg3Ny1iN2IxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FB_WLKRZiYMC93moFqDcSgaM4l29Nex2sOVqapj_1pU=)** to make a donation to support Phil's campaign to become Colorado's next governor. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to **[unsubscribe, click here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7heCwyGjAEycdp61lvM6xA2?unsubscribedata=uRwad7hlc%2BU7Zptq2Jf8gLKGQxsQmS9zl0uTr0kWLrfASWezObZAodthBBzBkyDXsEn9TQcvy69QRejN%2BLmxNmPfCagD78aOBWdKe84hke%2BSCwlYTD6UzRb8pE5cnXz3lXynUq29gjniyby62rlyXEbYKCz817mufVtkluA7Qm6d3sM8NycAxNfwYth4z3orcMc7DlKAe1eRzEiOD1L2Fub3Sv4knwBsruNqMJQ6oZQqKFm5WCtbiuI3aYfasTDCStAAzK2b9kNJ57HBd6GoDHEqxWBuk3GBT%2B3RnwkDrmyM%2FwTk40g%2FZZ%2FImJSR2ahdfsM%2BDzNovgfFeO3dzRT5OvXwKXRCoE%2Bk7DegwmFc90PqPHiOoUWewFK7qOxmndG0%2Brm2wMKUJlL8%2FxgTl5zlkNJzRZReXvs0gvX6PN9bkHFYmAvqsexYl4GWPzFTZxDX)**.

Stated simply, it’s more norm-breaking, bullying behavior. = | | = Here’s the question for Colorado — do we sit idly by or do we prepare to take these challenges to our democracy head-on? I am on Team Democracy. To protect our democracy and fairness in districting, I support a “break the glass” in case of emergency option that would enable Colorado to redraw our maps mid-decade only if the Trump agenda is successful. And making clear that we are ready to counter efforts to gain an unfair advantage by Republicans is our best strategy for trying to stop them. I recognize that adjusting our maps wouldn’t be a quick, one-step process. And that’s a good thing. Our state’s redistricting process puts you — the voters — in the driver’s seat. Over 55% of voters would need to agree at the ballot box to amend our Constitution and allow for a narrow exception to the ten-year redistricting cycle, specifically to combat other states’ cynical tactics. Then, the soonest any new maps would be able to go into effect is 2028. That means any new maps will start with a clear mandate from Coloradans and time for proper implementation. = With you for democracy, Phil | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add teamphil@philforcolorado.com to your address book. This campaign is powered by grassroots donations. You can = to make a donation to support Phil's campaign to become Colorado's next governor. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . | Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado. Anna Noschese, Registered Agent. Phil Weiser for Colorado PO Box 13644 Denver, CO 80201 United States

subject: They’re diluting Black voting power in North Carolina

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117985957/578277638/823540626?refcode=ea.5f3c4cc5-b7b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.5f3c4cc5-b7b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjNjNGNjNS1iN2IxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=24f0bVHaE1CkID2T9C7--64PK13COh8sJYSZffOaluM=&emci=5a3c4cc5-b7b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=5f3c4cc5-b7b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17205535)
Peter — This week, the North Carolina state legislature convened a special session to implement new, gerrymandered maps in our state, and redraw the district that elected NC’s first Black representative since the Jim Crow era. **All because Donald Trump told them to.** They didn’t come back to session to increase pay for our teachers, or even for our law enforcement officers, and despite Medicaid in North Carolina facing a budget shortfall, they didn’t come back to fix that, either. **Even though North Carolina is a 50/50 state, they came back to pass a map that all but locks in 11 of our 14 Congressional seats for Republicans and redraws the district that elected Eva Clayton, our first Black representative since 1901.** That’s right. These Republicans know that the Voting Rights Act very well may get gutted by the Supreme Court next year, and they’re ready to take full advantage by diluting Black voting power in NC. Here are the facts: Donald Trump won 51% of the vote in North Carolina in 2024, but these maps will give the GOP nearly 80% of our Congressional representation. The last time NC had court-ordered fair maps, we elected 7 Republicans and 7 Democrats, but these Republicans don’t care; when Donald Trump asks them to jump, they say, “How high?” Take my opponent, Michael Whatley, Trump’s hand-picked candidate in this race. **He went on the radio the other day to say that the new map is “very important.”** Well, here’s what I think is very important: North Carolinians having a choice in who represents them. Everyone deserves that choice, it’s what our democracy was built on. And here’s what I’ll pledge: When we win this race, I will fight to restore the full promise of the Voting Rights Act and defend every American’s right to have an equal voice in our democracy. I don’t think my opponent can say the same. **[But to make that a reality, we first need to win this race, and to win this race, I have to ask for your financial support. So if you’re able, please chip in $5, $10, or even $20 to help us flip this seat blue for the first time since 2008.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117985958/578277639/-1743631236?refcode=ea.5f3c4cc5-b7b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.5f3c4cc5-b7b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjNjNGNjNS1iN2IxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=24f0bVHaE1CkID2T9C7--64PK13COh8sJYSZffOaluM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117985959/578277640/-1743631236?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.5f3c4cc5-b7b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.5f3c4cc5-b7b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjNjNGNjNS1iN2IxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=24f0bVHaE1CkID2T9C7--64PK13COh8sJYSZffOaluM=)

name: Nico, United We Dream
subject: Help send a message to immigrant youth: Your home is here.
body:
You can help immigrant youth keep their status by donating to the DACA Renewal Fund today. | | | Peter, DACA recipients — and all immigrants — should be able to live with dignity and safety. But right now, DACA recipients and immigrant youth are being cruelly targeted, abducted, and disappeared. During these uncertain times, DACA recipients must navigate a complex immigration system to renew their DACA status. [**The cost of renewing DACA has increased to $555 online, and even more for paper applications. Please, help immigrant youth keep their status by making a donation to the DACA Renewal Fund today:**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvkqBZ6VW_VFbtBGGVx_RZ52aLACc5NTQqCP5X504wxrdz6vrNwwloiDpQ6m7jtb4AEbMaIGmMx4fWKYMi08pheB65ePJJB0b-C7qwKKjJBWXGZCOoBh9iW4yA5n5Pu2fce1QmHEYuwUOJWLMZ-_NB5A6Fcm8uMtHt95LQeQLYcl_71fjQMZBXzsKI_HkVD6HgFCLJJ9UADEmFTR6BtQG7slgn8450JDK_-uUWVnOHe9zOdBz0gEmJhIs0jsRpeusQXzSnUhmWCdgF_vnZ6YKSZDe943u9MLwCZUHNxb09arjMH8sWYCd9UhI-Fsln7Bh9IYzy6c-v6tTdlGta4ry65S2wJ3dN_mUVEe5QOxlYzIVwX6qOD_reVvyY6mDHWd0UlrLUvRDMcR7JgLVF5rUH4ScXcysM6F1pCXLwTryo-AQ/4l1/QfsQd4AgSViKdxK49f0asA/h0/h001.TEfwMp0s1eUJaxb1MNWQwAhlHxV3yNJaXaA_TWCaJAg) | | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvkqBZ6VW_VFbtBGGVx_RZ52aLACc5NTQqCP5X504wxrdz6vrNwwloiDpQ6m7jtb4AEbMaIGmMx4fWKYMi08pherj2KFfN3oI1hmkYge1V6egl1KJNbzkv6w1kHLCYZyRTrQycq2vGjgLCGyqzf5UEZmv0vJoNsHnakzF7qedETJ4C9K8U36ol1PtWv7OJG-lW_OFMVG43QDBQyS82ryitW94UfDkReVkEbrauhrQgHhOonZc0NK8T5htC-dyl6kn6yMRZT1BmoU5uNDKi7ISpE-fxcGPvQ5-cWKIDhSJOrMRb5hFZl3zvoFTAKufgr4F2AeUiexWwbrZHc83NUSPNPHIqgjLKQFmhzdV4S3TttPOsSePETBYLWPXb9e4PgxktcItcqDru1yf2nlJEyyI-hEC7FH56NJKYtCDMl6Eoupw/4l1/QfsQd4AgSViKdxK49f0asA/h1/h001.81fpY-F61bG7zGIvRByJSz84ybDAokIX3ItUMCyz2-s)

Food assistance for low-income families is being ripped away, and people across the country are set to lose access to affordable health care. Meanwhile, taxpayer dollars are being used to terrorize our communities.
They’re betting on us to stay scared and divided so their crusade against the people who power this country can continue. **It’s up to us to stand with and for each other.**

clean_body: You can help immigrant youth keep their status by donating to the DACA Renewal Fund today. | | | Peter, DACA recipients — and all immigrants — should be able to live with dignity and safety. But right now, DACA recipients and immigrant youth are being cruelly targeted, abducted, and disappeared. During these uncertain times, DACA recipients must navigate a complex immigration system to renew their DACA status. | | Food assistance for low-income families is being ripped away, and people across the country are set to lose access to affordable health care. Meanwhile, taxpayer dollars are being used to terrorize our communities. They’re betting on us to stay scared and divided so their crusade against the people who power this country can continue. It’s up to us to stand with and for each other. Our DACA renewal fund continues to support immigrant youth, but resources are limited and demand is growing as more DACA recipients turn to us for help renewing their DACA status. Your donation, of any amount, will help us send a message to immigrant youth: Your home is here. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. ** Stay informed as things evolve quickly by texting DACA INFO to 787-57** to stay in the loop. It’s up to us to fight with and for each other. Thank you. — Nico, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

clean_body: We need to know: Are you a MAGA Republican? | Friend, I’ve been with the America First movement since the very beginning, so there’s not much that surprises me anymore. But I’ll admit, this headline caught me off guard... Gallup: Democrats Regain Advantage in Party Affiliation “Americans’ party affiliation has flipped back toward the Democratic Party after the Republican Party held advantages for most of 2023 and 2024...[this] shift occurs even as Democratic Party favorability falls to record low.” We need to turn this around and regain the lead immediately! That’s why I’m helping the House GOP Leadership Chair confirm the party affiliation of every single American that we have on file. Your voter file was brought to my attention as one of those whose party affiliation is currently marked as“UNCONFIRMED” because it’s MISSING! We need immediate confirmation from you, Friend: Are you a MAGA Republican? Official House GOP Voter File Voter: dpwillis67@gmail.com Status: ACTIVE Party Affiliation: UNCONFIRMED Thank you, - Kellyanne Conway Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Wes Moore
subject: A coordinated Republican effort
body:
Here’s what’s really happening.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=815%2E1086043%2EBWjdyi)
Peter,
You may have heard some names in the news recently: Larry Hogan, Andy Harris, maybe even some guy named Ed Hale. **It seems like one or maybe all of them are going to be the next Republican to try to run against me.**
But here's what's really happening: Three years ago, we flipped this governor's seat from red to blue.
Now, there's a coordinated Republican effort to flip it right back, and no matter which Republican ends up running against me, you can bet the Republican establishment, Trump's mega donors, and all the dark money special interests are going to line up behind him to ensure they win.
**[If you’re able, will you help us fight back by chipping in today?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251025-1.5GS7g5&refcode=em-20251025-1&t=4&akid=815%2E1086043%2EBWjdyi)**
I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to show the strength of our movement right now. We need a big surge of small donations so we can keep pace with whoever they throw at us and whatever they spend.
While their donors are writing $100,000 checks, I need you to chip in $10 or $25. Nothing would send a stronger message than showing that this grassroots movement can go dollar-to-dollar with the Republicans' big money machine using nothing but people power.
**[Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can right now to show the power of our movement and show them what we’re made of?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251025-1.5GS7g5&refcode=em-20251025-1&t=5&akid=815%2E1086043%2EBWjdyi)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251025-1.5GS7g5&amount=5&refcode=em-20251025-1&t=24&akid=815%2E1086043%2EBWjdyi)**
I’m so grateful you’re on our team.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251025-1.5GS7g5&refcode=em-20251025-1&t=25&akid=815%2E1086043%2EBWjdyi)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251025-1&t=26&refcode2=815_1086043_BWjdyi&akid=815%2E1086043%2EBWjdyi)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=27&akid=815%2E1086043%2EBWjdyi)

BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

clean_body: We watched it so you don't have to. | Except for the first Earth Day in 1970, last Saturday’s No Kings rally was the largest one-day protest in American history. An estimated 7 million Americans made their voices heard for democracy, due process, affordable healthcare, and accountability for ICE. How did President Trump respond? He posted an AI-generated video of him dropping 💩 from a plane on No Kings protesters. (We watched it so you don’t have to.) That’s what he thinks of you and your opinion, Peter. It’s the kind of gross, childish, unserious action we’ve come to expect from Trump – and ZERO House Republicans will say one critical word about it. That’s why we’re pulling out all the stops to replace them in 2026 with leaders who will serve ALL of us, not (metaphorically) dump st on us! = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you for everything you do 💙 – the whole team at Emily Randall for Congress | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. Can you chip in $6 or any amount and join our team? = Want to maximize your impact?Become a monthly donor to help us flip the House from red to blue! = Follow on:** | | | | | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Box 1883 Port Orchard, WA 98366 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . name: Adelita Grijalva
subject: I came ready to take the oath, but Republicans are blocking me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jonathan Nez for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter, [](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/F3yQRG0-qIBTrpR2nbHdbA~~/AAPPABA~/aUWs7Fo9RzlzDr0ICA3Vg6xBIC58XHYZgAUTBiWZyMyoj5mfF5BEKNdJwulEVwgW08DVm61xAvUTz1YMkP4L2PRmlq1Ok97pXTGzh_MhY6JTTotmf469p1XAZ1Y1X3G1GssZPFlcn3c_dnpUbWc4qfbAHxDfPMG_Io9iqR47okllbHsWni39piDtfacdBg0a_iXaLzbSXp4CP0VboMcdzSCeyFkDmVS7Q0hTxFQfEmDqzEE01InxJfxjIb4jBfdE7ojGYY8zelYAdxENzAzSLE0IK0kWuJMseGJHT6raEspm_t3yBiR7OQai5pV5oHe3ZsHHZIj2iwNDCHRSA2XdOlNJcvAFkcLV5JmM2ZNPxmgb3Ga6dUCPyeQqjijPiX9z)it's Adelita Grijalva. I want to thank Jonathan Nez for giving me the chance to reach out to you directly. Last month, voters overwhelmingly rejected the MAGA agenda and chose me to represent them in Congress in Arizona's 7th District special election. With so much at stake, I came to Washington ready to get to work. But instead of swearing me in, Speaker Mike Johnson cancelled session and sent members home -- not only delaying my ability to take office, but also allowing the government to shut down without even letting the House work toward a solution. That's how far Republicans are willing to go to block me from serving. Republicans know that once I'm sworn in, it won't just chip away at their razor-thin majority -- I will become the decisive 218th signature to force a vote on releasing the Epstein files. This is nothing more than a desperate power play to protect Trump while denying the people of my district a voice in Congress when it's needed the most. As Speaker Johnson drags this out, we're going to prove that our grassroots power can't be silenced. Each day he continues to delay, we've set a goal of raising $10,000 to keep our momentum going as we work to take back the House in 2026. [**Peter, will you split a donation of $10 or whatever you can today between my campaign and Jonathan Nez to help us fight back and make sure their obstruction backfires?**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/dO4lQTjQfZ8MlAnmj8jHBQ~~/AAPPABA~/H42Go-2e7H9eO1hSa_52UHhBDQdIWrZmct8GEnY3ugUboBJD8d4J1QNAVCEYviJP5wrsSuqJgnZgPkNAGSmwfsQYxX5TLi5ybtAZf41-TY2FAyWcWtMGIFoD3Pd8bcP6Jddwl3XN2DIm4k4I9YznI5RW_uvJHyeaO3Ql4O52ENqtkmh6ZsB769Nvm9lP3u0QBHqvIQIxRvlPWILQhQuoJKIVFRPljEog8vOMsSsV116a9Atp8YiTlhbEaeSO-mGXiHH7dYsVtgOafQUCSrUmZXl2qHwjp4XhHNo5l4IIXeb0-pVvZPmPXapPTKZeCoUeZ-P2SDmuAIrIROyYQn9UQUWleLAMO1nar88BJE9Q5r1QZSnqzRJ0kuwppuJ6wxR8uYBDu2FXUQWW8op_ApeYmA~~)
