clean_body: Elections are coming up Tuesday Nov 4 and I’m endorsing local public servants. | | | Friend, Did you know that local and state elections are coming up soon? Don’t forget to vote on or by November 4th! In this time of federal gridlock, we’ve got to lift up champions for the people at all levels of government. We need more elected leaders who are rooted in their communities, and who will strengthen our democracy through deeply listening to their constituents. So I’m proudly endorsing progressive leaders running for public office at the local level, where they can make huge impacts in our communities. Stacy Jackson, who’s running for Southfield City Council to be a voice for the people. She’s been a grassroots leader serving her community for years as a champion for housing rights, equity and social justice, ending gun violence, better infrastructure, and a more responsive government. When I joined Stacy to knock on doors last week, her love for Southfield residents shone through as she spoke with her neighbors: I’m also proud to endorse Lisa Hicks-Clayton, who’s running for re-election as the Treasurer of Dearborn Heights. Lisa goes above and beyond to serve her community, including running food, clothing, and school supply drives for people in need. She regularly holds office hours and constituent service days, helping thousands of constituents with tax and water assistance, home foreclosure prevention, and free financial literacy programs. Both Lisa and Stacy are committed to building trust in government through transparency. We need them and leaders like them in government! But they’re running in competitive races, and with people voting right now by absentee ballot and early in-person voting, they urgently need our support. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Stacy Jackson and Rooted in Community PAC. If you'd like to donate to Lisa Hicks-Clayton, please mail checks made out to Committee to Elect Lisa Hicks-Clayton for Treasurer to: Rashida Tlaib for Congress, PO Box 32777, Detroit, MI 48232 | | | | | | | | | | Like me, Stacy Jackson grew up in Southwest Detroit and experienced environmental injustice firsthand. She’s lost relatives to health issues due to pollution, which sparked her passion for environmental justice. If elected, she’ll be a much-needed fighter for our rights—from our right to clean water and air, to healthcare and education, and constitutional rights such as free speech. A fighter for working families, Lisa Hicks-Clayton has been endorsed by unions like AFSCME Michigan and the Michigan Regional Council of Carpenters and Millwrights. Lisa also serves the people as a food pantry manager who delivers food to people who are home-bound, and as a board member for two local organizations: the Western Wayne County NAACP and the Dearborn-Dearborn Heights League of Women Voters. Photo of Lisa Hicks-Clayton In addition, Lisa has done such a great job as treasurer that the Wayne County Treasurers Association elected her President, and the Michigan Municipal League selected her to join their intensive training program for elected women leaders. Both Lisa and Stacy are the fighters for the people that our communities need and deserve. With a little over one week left until Election Day, and with absentee ballots in voters’ hands and early in-person voting available in many MI communities, these candidates urgently need our support. Thank you so much for supporting progressive champions at all levels of government. Together, we’re building a more inclusive, responsive, and representative democracy where everyone has what they need to thrive. In solidarity, Rashida | Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003, not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. | | Sent via . name: Patriot Cigars
subject: NEW PATRIOT PACK with ACCESSORIES
body:
** NEW PATRIOT PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
INCLUDES: TRAVEL CASE, CUTTER & CIGARS!

The Patriot Pack — Smoke for the Bold and the Free

Stand tall and light up freedom with The Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company — a powerful lineup built for true American patriots. Featuring The “Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case, the Old Glory Cigar Cutter, and three powerhouse blends — TNT, MOAB, and Sidewinder — this set is your all-American arsenal of premium, hand-rolled cigars. Crafted for quality. Fueled by liberty. Made for those who never back down.
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=af722d0eb0&e=fbf55fa623

**
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Patriot Pack
A Bold Salute to Liberty
------------------------------------------------------------

Raise your colors high — the Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company is the ultimate tribute to freedom, made for those who stand proud. This isn’t just a cigar set; it’s a declaration, a statement, and a smoke-filled salute to the red, white, and blue.

** Included Inside the Patriot Pack
------------------------------------------------------------

**
“The Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case
------------------------------------------------------------

Carry your cigars in patriotic style. This rugged yet elegant case is crafted in premium printed leather with the pledge of allegiance, built to safeguard your Patriot Cigars while projecting staunch American pride. Designed for travel, with room for three cigars up to a 60-ring size and a secure closure, it’s more than storage—it’s armor for your freedom smoke.

** Old Glory Cigar Cutter
------------------------------------------------------------

No patriot’s toolkit is complete without a sharp edge. The Old Glory Cigar Cutter is a dual-blade instrument worthy of the name. It slices clean and precise, honoring the flag with every snip (and making sure your draw is perfect).
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Finest Blends Under the Flag
------------------------------------------------------------

** TNT
------------------------------------------------------------

Explosive in flavor and bold in character, TNT is a powerhouse medium to full blend that commands your attention. From first light to the last ember, it burns with authority.

** MOAB (Mother of All Bombs)
------------------------------------------------------------

MOAB delivers a full-bodied punch, a maduro cigar that lives up to its name. Deep, rich, and intense — this is not for the faint of heart but for the true patriot who demands maximum firepower in flavor.

** Sidewinder
------------------------------------------------------------

Sleek, swift, and sly — the Sidewinder rounds out the pack with a medium blend that strikes with finesse. Balanced, bold, and full of character, it’s the curveball every patriotic smoker needs.

The Patriot Pack doesn’t stop there, you’ll also get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.
------------------------------------------------------------

** Why the Patriot Pack Matters
------------------------------------------------------------

This is not merely a sampler or gift set. The Patriot Pack is your on-demand arsenal of American spirit and premium craftsmanship. It’s a perfect companion for travel, a striking gift for fellow flag-bearers, or your own daily reminder that freedom is worth celebrating — one premium puff at a time.

Light up The Patriot Pack. Puff with pride. And let the smoke carry your pledge to liberty.

** Uncompromising Quality, Made for Patriots
------------------------------------------------------------

At Patriot Cigar Company, every cigar is handcrafted in Estelí, Nicaragua, using premium-aged tobacco (aged a minimum of three years). Our blends were born from the desire to bring together the love of premium smokes and the love of our country, forging a brand built on passion and pride.

** NEW PREMIUM
8 CIGAR SAMPLER PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
USE PROMO CODE: EAGLE FOR 20% OFF CIGARS
Experience true American freedom with 8 bold, premium cigars—including the gold-wrapped MOGUL and exclusive Operation Never Tell—only available in the Patriot Cigar Company Premium Sampler Pack.

Cigars Included

1xMOAB
1xTNT
1xMARK48
1xHellfire
1xSidewinder
1xSidewinder Maduro
1x24K Gold Wrapped Mogul
1xLimited Release Unbanded Operation Never Tell

https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=e620a4de70&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=16576b26e4&e=fbf55fa623

For the true American cigar patriot, this is the ultimate way to experience the full power, pride, and craftsmanship behind Patriot Cigar Company. The Premium Sampler Pack delivers 8 premium cigars that represent the heart and soul of our lineup—crafted for those who believe in freedom, hard work, and savoring every damn moment.

You’ll receive all 6 flagship blends that built our reputation for bold flavor and uncompromising quality, plus two standouts that make this sampler truly elite: the 24Kt Gold-Wrapped MOGUL, a cigar that radiates luxury and dominance with every draw, and the Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to this pack, and once these are gone, they’re gone.

The Premium Sampler Pack doesn’t stop there. Alongside your 8 cigars, you’ll get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.

8 Cigars. 1 Mission. 100% Patriot.
Light up, lean back, and let freedom burn.
NEW CIGAR LIMITED RELEASE
"OPERATION NEVER TELL"

The Unbanded Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to the Premium Sampler Pack available at MYPATRIOTCIGARS.COM (https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=d7e41e580a&e=fbf55fa623) , and once these are gone, they’re gone.

Don't miss this cigar!

NEW CIGAR ACCESSORIES!
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=bf14677462&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=30e6965fa8&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=4a06eaaf2a&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=314caa002c&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=455fb3adde&e=fbf55fa623

** FREE Shipping On Orders Over $100.00
------------------------------------------------------------

subject: Gerrymandering, ICE raids, and MAGA: the true wake-up call
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251025-1591-foote&t=1001&akid=1591%2E342411%2ERjafZ1 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

It’s spooky season — and no, we’re not talking about haunted houses or
creaky old mansions. The real threat is happening right now in our own
government.

A Republican majority in Congress isn’t just a political talking point —
it’s a wake-up call. MAGA extremism is rising, Republican gerrymandering
schemes are stripping power from voters, and ICE and even troops are
showing up in our communities, affecting real people every single day.

But here’s the thing: the Squad isn’t scared.

We’re fighting back — with grassroots power, not corporate PACs or
billionaire agendas. From standing up for working families to pushing back
against authoritarian policies, we are on the front lines defending
democracy and building real, progressive change.

Right now, we need your help to keep fighting. Every ounce of support
helps us amplify the voices of the people, counter extremism, fight for
justice, and make sure our communities are protected.

the Squad to make sure what’s happening now doesn’t become the new normal?

The Squad Victory Fund

name: Team WFP
subject: “Andrew Cuomo is a snake and aliar” - Eric Adams
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, A little over a month after calling the disgraced former Governor Cuomo a "snake and a liar" for trying to push him out of the race,1 **Eric Adams just endorsed him for Mayor of NYC.** We’re hardly surprised. For decades, political elites have clung to power by swapping favors, sharing donors, and protecting each other from accountability. And despite all of Adams’ posturing, he and Cuomo are lifelong power brokers too. **Zohran Mamdani is running a different kind of campaign.** And we’re building a different kind of movement to support him — one that is powered _by_ working families, _for_ working families, rather than handing out tax breaks to Trump billionaire donors. [We have just 11 days until Election Day, and early voting starts TOMORROW. Please make a donation to the Working Families Party today and help us out-organize Andrew Cuomo, Eric Adams, and their MAGA billionaires.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T966anOFnxLCk2AXJI73uxGduHCZJsvX4x96j7WarrqOMGpjEIEjKKEC2XfuyPzi0xLTE8AGEz6ESSD15yJwlFcqeTh3ZgXY3gVMJ4kmKwyiSOIIJSQtTagb5O__z25iIWI2rxFlYzzFWvoJY_pmIlxHOKDs7ivtWAKRxkVdmSGBL-BqxFTI66p6FH8OHrGZmYPFtuzrP02eazhYHoiELKaeRzbbMjyNNpXZMqIWnLmqb8TYB6YmrLVvcAFPjUNBZWi9HlfaqQKwEP62rzavtOdno_u-NWvNOUnGWOIbFRkTtgiBwwjOf1in0Wkvoq-nqWSFSrTlCq5Fv3WEFe1-yMIdCFLZSZuiojepTRWwUC8Eo/4l1/D6cifksnQXiczApQFl13qQ/h0/h001.WT5deDy1v5zuSD93xjW-uKKYIVZTuLeOvoNQQGdxjdQ) **[Donate »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T966anOFnxLCk2AXJI73uxGduHCZJsvX4x96j7WarrqOMpcMBDeKrDhLVWAhoKBFQHJ4bnc52MDdir1jQaxnOrL7com7FYDZMrPW-A9lcEdyUSWrnkHuIDvk0jtDGEiVc7nPjdfYUth4ymBj-whKsTBIi0iOD7aG0GYcImQIkGk34YrgoChQqBYyXCsq0nJEOlfzEQHDJey2AaCrRNq4jmeAqm_KmsB54wM7B-9Fb5tTyWB6mIAVkJsZycVQI7hByDm1zxyoati8YnDAhA1auzpc0flqWoLHv41fyT0zwYtfY9QnlWFa_BKtMCF1skzDwj70M7MTB_jfC9M8r0CCjYrfCAsd15X0Sz4g2K9CZ-XlVCTb0oxA-Il7836M89NisH/4l1/D6cifksnQXiczApQFl13qQ/h1/h001.6dmya_aiVTZvvMkJUDxIBzamg_QtiBenrn5PIC5y6Ro)** The enthusiasm we’re seeing in New York and around the country is about a hunger for a different kind of politics. That enthusiasm powered Zohran Mamdani to a historic win in the June primary. The rich and powerful took notice. They know if our movement wins, they won’t be able to loot and pillage working families in order to line their own pockets. It’s why billionaires have been pouring mountains of cash into super PACs. It’s why Trump officials have been pressuring Adams and Sliwa to drop out and rally behind Cuomo _for months_.2 And it’s why — earlier this week — they resorted to creating AI-generated, racist, and Islamaphobic ads.3 **There is no limit on how low they will go in order to cling to power. And we only have 11 days to give them another humiliating defeat.** [Please pitch in today and help fuel WFP’s critical work to elect Zohran Mamdani in New York City. We have a chance to make history together, Peter, but only if we put in the work.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T966anOFnxLCk2AXJI73uxGduHCZJsvX4x96j7WarrqOMGpjEIEjKKEC2XfuyPzi0xlXESz_IifS-p6l1QyRuvQt5IoX2vjzHvfk5L3C1wgrICMaLtbSQfzbrXNUFrJKDLZiC7jOPGYHbx86LQtiDTZ9WWAarWMk3XpCpwlGoaTgC0677VagP-vcetXLhGA69z278XwoP-8Sj-GE-CQwEilqWoiry6WpchxvTgCYjhUoOaVSm4RgUIhVXsM_DZ3ilwq3B-yYXDx5GEipPN0eCw7VnHGLWZyKG9ktPGsWT5GehnSazgLd7FD8UcafCbFrJuVXJ5cCZMC0UprhI3_sLZ2Yr7FRhIKC9B3INxIuFDKxo/4l1/D6cifksnQXiczApQFl13qQ/h2/h001.GKG6d7FKBSFnvdrsobMof6ntvL3yjLD4VKU2QjE2T2E) In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. clean_body: | | | Peter, A little over a month after calling the disgraced former Governor Cuomo a "snake and a liar" for trying to push him out of the race,1 Eric Adams just endorsed him for Mayor of NYC. We’re hardly surprised. For decades, political elites have clung to power by swapping favors, sharing donors, and protecting each other from accountability. And despite all of Adams’ posturing, he and Cuomo are lifelong power brokers too. Zohran Mamdani is running a different kind of campaign. And we’re building a different kind of movement to support him — one that is powered by working families, for working families, rather than handing out tax breaks to Trump billionaire donors. The enthusiasm we’re seeing in New York and around the country is about a hunger for a different kind of politics. That enthusiasm powered Zohran Mamdani to a historic win in the June primary. The rich and powerful took notice. They know if our movement wins, they won’t be able to loot and pillage working families in order to line their own pockets. It’s why billionaires have been pouring mountains of cash into super PACs. It’s why Trump officials have been pressuring Adams and Sliwa to drop out and rally behind Cuomo for months.2 And it’s why — earlier this week — they resorted to creating AI-generated, racist, and Islamaphobic ads.3 There is no limit on how low they will go in order to cling to power. And we only have 11 days to give them another humiliating defeat. In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , New York Magazine, September 5, 2025 2\. , The New York Times, September 3, 2025 2\. , The Guardian, October 22, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. name: Deb Haaland
subject: 📷 recent campaign photos from my camera roll
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Let me share some of my favorite moments on the campaign trail from last month.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5281%2E400544%2E1i_W9L)
Hey, it's Deb.
It’s been a packed few weeks on the campaign trail as we’ve continued to criss-cross the state! I’ve met so many New Mexicans, heard their powerful stories, and felt our campaign’s momentum growing with every visit.
I want to share a few of my favorite moments from the last weeks with you. 📷
**[But before I dive in, will you chip in $5 to help me continue to show up in every corner of New Mexico? Any amount of support helps me connect with New Mexicans face-to-face and start building a better future for our state.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251025_1_campaigntrail.LpjQjs&amount=5&refcode=em20251025-5281&t=2&akid=5281%2E400544%2E1i_W9L)**
[****](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251025_1_campaigntrail.LpjQjs&amount=5&refcode=em20251025-5281&t=3&akid=5281%2E400544%2E1i_W9L)
I'm committed to listening and making sure we address each community's unique needs together. I recently went to Corrales for a morning discussion about how **I plan to tackle New Mexico's toughest challenges, from public safety and education to healthcare and the economy.**
[****](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251025_1_campaigntrail.LpjQjs&amount=5&refcode=em20251025-5281&t=4&akid=5281%2E400544%2E1i_W9L)_Our healthcare workers take care of us — it's time we take care of them._
New Mexico has a severe shortage of healthcare workers — and UNMH’s resident doctors are overworked and undercompensated. That’s why **I proudly joined CIR/SEIU UNM in their fight for fair wages.** If we want to recruit and keep doctors caring for our communities, we must first ensure they can afford to live here.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251025_1_campaigntrail.LpjQjs&amount=5&refcode=em20251025-5281&t=5&akid=5281%2E400544%2E1i_W9L)_Agua es Vida — a statement that rings through New Mexico for generations._
**I went to the Embudo Valley community to celebrate 300 years of acequias** , the communities that sustain them, and the centuries of stewardship for our ecosystems. My grandparents taught me to care for our land, air, and water, and I bring those lessons to every position I've served in. >From empowering traditional communities and leading conservation initiatives to negotiating water rights, I will always fight to protect our water and New Mexico's beautiful traditions.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251025_1_campaigntrail.LpjQjs&amount=5&refcode=em20251025-5281&t=6&akid=5281%2E400544%2E1i_W9L)
**I spent an evening "chopping it up" with youth, business owners, and the community at All Eyes on Me Barbershop in Downtown Albuquerque.** Education, public safety, and daily struggles worry far too many of our friends and family members. As governor, I'm ready to roll up my sleeves to build a safer, more prosperous New Mexico for every community.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251025_1_campaigntrail.LpjQjs&amount=5&refcode=em20251025-5281&t=7&akid=5281%2E400544%2E1i_W9L)
**I stood alongside families impacted by fentanyl addiction** and built hygiene kits for our neighbors struggling with homelessness in Española. I’m ready to tackle this crisis head-on as governor, investing in addiction services, support for families, and law enforcement that makes our communities safer and gives them the help they need.
Thanks for taking the time to read about what my team and I have been up to recently! With the end of 2025 quickly approaching, we’re headed into our campaign’s most crucial stretch yet.
I’m relying on your support to keep fueling every conversation, every visit, and every step forward towards victory. **[Will you chip in $5 right now to fund future campaign stops for my team and me?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251025_1_campaigntrail.LpjQjs&amount=5&refcode=em20251025-5281&t=8&akid=5281%2E400544%2E1i_W9L)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251025_1_campaigntrail.LpjQjs&amount=5&refcode=em20251025-5281&t=27&akid=5281%2E400544%2E1i_W9L)**
Be fierce,
Deb
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251025-1&t=28&refcode2=5281_400544_1i_W9L&akid=5281%2E400544%2E1i_W9L)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=29&akid=5281%2E400544%2E1i_W9L)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=30&akid=5281%2E400544%2E1i_W9L)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

Thanks for taking the time to read about what my team and I have been up to recently! With the end of 2025 quickly approaching, we’re headed into our campaign’s most crucial stretch yet. I’m relying on your support to keep fueling every conversation, every visit, and every step forward towards victory. Be fierce, Deb

name: Tyler Bowyer, Turning Point Action
subject: Charlie built the machine. Let’s make him proud.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION
body:
Faith. Family. Freedom.
A tribute to Charlie & Turning Point Action—see how to help and double your impact today.
|
---
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8bcbde75052a433b97d62eaf850605b1&_e=x03RpuGvQ9DsVztjS_NM64_6CmEOhmuSsRMxnq09PZEyAYSErAztV3ET8JlaU0LVfCBZxCEuVYIuqOmIYkJgYzkfT4kQPzXh9YKkJ7jrvzBRheX5RLvbucwyCyrYAyOZiHC0TexQZjw__2jkKSoahbxd2toI7MOKJrH89BQPTl3ytS0SzuIv5WT8iM0DpGnnqVS6bgTDx0s5PxmbVFsVLwrTjfPiD8A4OPi8QQF3aX2zsIEfSZUqzXknN-5a-Cv9-fArSgVbsmChiC1xd2bLbRhz75nbpham1v0zHFuH-WZugF-S9xtSmoEPbOlEmfKce7IK0YOn1D3eyP4aQ0hXOxFD0g7xAny59d-6AwYSkqTTTgNxqtAXI2xGl5PKWuKrjoRyr90zz6FyVoQvgU2Scxpqg-OAbissYk-fshthcnDu3KjseRZsMnlxrse3qNjUFZBouSdLZpPfuaXGc94tKXHuOmAKV4oIMP7y5oTh1ICCKUxsdrLar-T5s5YR-eQ_J5Fr0DByci3N4dj4WPLZfbLkQFCJaVOWFmDFNx4y1vUJYronHmDhI-Iv_KgsbEwJz9MxXpotNyZJX6-EBmzYJJk4gBjOXW0NelLQDL8nc0AccN-EnD2p6vWKgXCfk4pldHYioiLRReGnO1nMjYpJyrBlzTaimWF8eFXDs0aKWBCRUiZ7p6Sgrk1gOCykRc3e1bhK1dpy8Tvg2MDqwVScxQ%3D%3D)
Peter, When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn't famous. He wasn't filling arenas. He wasn't a household name. A few people told me, _" You've gotta meet this guy -- he's doing something big out in Illinois."_ So I went. Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago suburbs -- surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still worth saving.
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8bcbde75052a433b97d62eaf850605b1&_e=x03RpuGvQ9DsVztjS_NM64_6CmEOhmuSsRMxnq09PZEyAYSErAztV3ET8JlaU0LVfCBZxCEuVYIuqOmIYkJgYzkfT4kQPzXh9YKkJ7jrvzBRheX5RLvbucwyCyrYAyOZiHC0TexQZjw__2jkKSoahbxd2toI7MOKJrH89BQPTl3ytS0SzuIv5WT8iM0DpGnnqVS6bgTDx0s5PxmbVFsVLwrTjfPiD8A4OPi8QQF3aX2zsIEfSZUqzXknN-5a-Cv9E0icm-HDsVlZgKllLYmxlEX4O3aR3sWpBiRLgTXkgaPlHNbvcld2vD7NNODaB0sO9TfLY4tPNK0DsSRZkLS16QERyh-mLreo4pkFzSs4NJLyDeSYY1d-Jxn8GbU-9J5HTVTe54RAfctwQ782qdN4taAAdWyo3LnYWxxeONMKt1h-Z-tBtj-3XUAhGF_aT2jj-lZGHurTOJxqUOAdiIBFzp9ot8YM7C5XFCwoi3I1y45OZpsm08piv-oyZdOIN_567ZzuGaJqHsyJpJm6xqJPD3RZ5vqgH5DT5lb9VJ5OpLlj6O937ERxZJPazs5x42rgWrt37a9xEXuajkQFJpM0jVcqrSmI7jEjKcpR_2RUFuw2Jn02sIPIKyOYhHLldeXQVKpooM6GGsYhtZI3DJ1uveLcayc8iXE7Ylzdi4HWJ8kAth8E4Sx_mSV4sYBi95BEPSWlPxNYUr8B3d1-vjFnOA%3D%3D)
_**Above:** The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is where it all began -- just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that changed everything. _
Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming about how to win back the culture. But when I first sat down with Charlie... _I knew._ Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of it. I jumped in and never looked back. From that moment on, I was there for all of it. The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The fights. In those days, our team didn't have much. But what we had was conviction -- and that was more than enough. Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something urgent. **Faith, family, freedom** -- and the absolute grit to go build something that could save this country. And Charlie? _He did it._ He didn't just build a brand... _He built a machine._ First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation -- a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it _from the start._ Charlie and I weren't just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together.
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8bcbde75052a433b97d62eaf850605b1&_e=x03RpuGvQ9DsVztjS_NM64_6CmEOhmuSsRMxnq09PZEyAYSErAztV3ET8JlaU0LVfCBZxCEuVYIuqOmIYkJgYzkfT4kQPzXh9YKkJ7jrvzBRheX5RLvbucwyCyrYAyOZiHC0TexQZjw__2jkKSoahbxd2toI7MOKJrH89BQPTl3ytS0SzuIv5WT8iM0DpGnnqVS6bgTDx0s5PxmbVFsVLwrTjfPiD8A4OPi8QQF3aX2zsIEfSZUqzXknN-5a-Cv97jkd_Zv9QGfYmFWD6c53HgU_GM5i3Vw5D-PHghYfbbL2bpp9G1bJcZ7gbCcWLGKJF4Wdvo13YZM0mhwsFvvB4a32gGx0TnXzYLVU8usdzk61gSTTwGKxxZ00aMZg-zgZOJBvlE95Mncb46khTa8uS-X2nmo3Ouk58vDY2h5T7kyiWrJa61nCaaVUgXOwMBYnUvpg6BKr69SZXvAYA6d0T1R1R8xUGfunMs9SjGfJGIv09stoGdG-AUnUIq1dxQvRAAV65gKHhYKlVw1D4-4mHcg0sIwbya3iOESeCPc7Na0JCci8btvyvd96Ljz7Cdy__GwVnUIB0ze-aqHQYlWV2Uuf1Eks5i91TD3Nljh93VVzIeRgjZeNAX_F2uqluVZPu9g7s0daxQqankttuq7rwWiFTmtfMGmzKEebhLvE-5GQKHelzw6exij0tlSZQckPpwD1qi8J3g8o5orcmGBAhQ%3D%3D)
We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us... We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense -- in the very states the GOP had given up on. **And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. ** We didn't just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right -- _and it delivered real results._ 10 for 10. **In every single state we operated in... Trump won.** In Arizona _alone,_ we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes -- well beyond the margin of victory. _In Wisconsin?_ 60,000+. _In Nevada?_ 6,000+ -- and we won back a district we hadn't carried in 20 years. _In Michigan?_ 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn't just make noise... _We made history. _
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8bcbde75052a433b97d62eaf850605b1&_e=x03RpuGvQ9DsVztjS_NM64_6CmEOhmuSsRMxnq09PZEyAYSErAztV3ET8JlaU0LVfCBZxCEuVYIuqOmIYkJgYzkfT4kQPzXh9YKkJ7jrvzBRheX5RLvbucwyCyrYAyOZiHC0TexQZjw__2jkKSoahbxd2toI7MOKJrH89BQPTl3ytS0SzuIv5WT8iM0DpGnnqVS6bgTDx0s5PxmbVFsVLwrTjfPiD8A4OPi8QQF3aX2zsIEfSZUqzXknN-5a-Cv9Hh-TbuaoVAax8_ZLcuwXtviBqp3ElThnHpmw6_3mI5qU5V5UIKAv2vZ8q80hpjFXAtUqU9qZZWJH9qmnBEWuquahp5bBrbygPIR-b4GR3z5mvzaD7r7bYCsIlcuu38HPXlKEyO4yo8HtehleKAZIvzH5QbuuCzAXEynpx7G9u4ApRfuIdY3F3udo3VV-50lmOxaegKnaEGi1I1PeEP8QrqMG-LgKaWWXN9sK8BnbIRzr0WzQNivoW4Cn7tk8Rw8UPXkruaspXU9cb19naDMr5ByxB0Ke0j74Rsx_8nfO2cTXfJXyM0HrX_e1jFW1gMSry6qGQRJcz7GVojl8kGsWdubNELY06HEr305IMqLEMTyYW2T9iryhEeYoOk940MaVZ9G2s4GbAIZR2CbpKWOE3UjleCgd4c03nrvQvtwv5oLqXrdhNbyUG4nI5BYfCNw8JiIwRGGqwe0OzugXu0bv3Q%3D%3D)
_**Above:** Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That's me on the left -- still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. _
Peter, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission. He lived on the road 300+ days a year. We never stopped. _Because Charlie never stopped. _ He didn't build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did it for this country. For all of us. For every parent who feels like they're losing their kid to the Left... For every student who's afraid to speak up... For every American who still believes in this country... Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you. And now? After he gave everything for that mission? **We have to carry the torch. We have to keep the machine running -- ****_and make it stronger than ever._** Everything we've felt since the day we lost Charlie -- _we must turn it into action._ He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time: _" What are we building next?"_ **Well, Peter, here 's the answer: We're building the next generation of grassroots power -- one voter, one precinct, one act of courage at a time.**
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8bcbde75052a433b97d62eaf850605b1&_e=x03RpuGvQ9DsVztjS_NM64_6CmEOhmuSsRMxnq09PZEyAYSErAztV3ET8JlaU0LVfCBZxCEuVYIuqOmIYkJgYzkfT4kQPzXh9YKkJ7jrvzBRheX5RLvbucwyCyrYAyOZiHC0TexQZjw__2jkKSoahbxd2toI7MOKJrH89BQPTl3ytS0SzuIv5WT8iM0DpGnnqVS6bgTDx0s5PxmbVFsVLwrTjfPiD8A4OPi8QQF3aX2zsIEfSZUqzXknN-5a-Cv9dF7otgMXyrnLzEL_7gdFKPhfz_5lOVtk-DfS7orz6spk0PNuPPS0XD92iVQcH9WMhuba6BvGkSQ5FqstWIK3ZPVbNrEP17PagPbEYIJunMT9-MyldWRcx0FtqxsMOQ7s0-9PquVniy-Z5iiRvGhsXpQF5mABZYeYZPWweA4xLNdZUJzw2jfH8eBJ3fCtIIUDZl1f8cM0npchZW65DLy4-LyRSVrghVp7A04WAKvtG_iBpN172m0_RQTaEBKkwLRsVHlFAwrbsJsft2_2uMZb3GWkLXPXxXeeDVRokLu2v5ytLL-90B_DhU5ixsmgWRZmZHVCpZnpWpOvsrWB9EaM3bvVv3OnSqQ_NtEFSk0NLET47Kcaud86xsRzlmqCItxqPAm8bSJCta8AljFMNsJLgp9JdwbZi9MuponTIFoLBZOOkY3sr9d6uo9jgywdqlYNQQc_HI1S4yx5xI85x3Wf6g%3D%3D)
**But it doesn 't happen without you.** _So, here 's my ask..._ Go to church for Charlie. Start a family for Charlie. Join a chapter or coalition for Charlie. Register to vote for Charlie. Chase votes for Charlie. Run for office for Charlie. Commit to WIN. Commit to FIGHT. Commit to FINISH what he started. That's what Charlie would've wanted. I'm not stopping until we save our country. I'm all in -- and if you're reading this, I'm betting that you are, too. If so, I'm honored to fight alongside you. And if you've already been with us for a while -- thank you. Now, let's get to work.
**For Charlie.** **God Bless,** **Tyler Bowyer**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point Action

First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation -- a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it from the start. Charlie and I weren't just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together. We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us... We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense -- in the very states the GOP had given up on. And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. We didn't just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right -- and it delivered real results. 10 for 10. In every single state we operated in... Trump won. In Arizona alone, we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes -- well beyond the margin of victory. In Wisconsin? 60,000+. In Nevada? 6,000+ -- and we won back a district we hadn't carried in 20 years. In Michigan? 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn't just make noise... We made history. Above: Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That's me on the left -- still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. Peter, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission. He lived on the road 300+ days a year. We never stopped. Because Charlie never stopped. He didn't build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did it for this country. For all of us. For every parent who feels like they're losing their kid to the Left... For every student who's afraid to speak up... For every American who still believes in this country... Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you. And now? After he gave everything for that mission? We have to carry the torch. We have to keep the machine running -- and make it stronger than ever. Everything we've felt since the day we lost Charlie -- we must turn it into action. He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time: " What are we building next?" Well, Peter, here 's the answer: We're building the next generation of grassroots power -- one voter, one precinct, one act of courage at a time. But it doesn 't happen without you. So, here 's my ask... Go to church for Charlie. Start a family for Charlie. Join a chapter or coalition for Charlie. Register to vote for Charlie. Chase votes for Charlie. Run for office for Charlie. Commit to WIN. Commit to FIGHT. Commit to FINISH what he started. That's what Charlie would've wanted. I'm not stopping until we save our country. I'm all in -- and if you're reading this, I'm betting that you are, too. If so, I'm honored to fight alongside you. And if you've already been with us for a while -- thank you. Now, let's get to work. For Charlie. God Bless, Tyler Bowyer Chief Operating Officer Turning Point Action P.S. I would give anything to have Charlie back. But he left us with something powerful -- a machine that works... a machine that's proven and battle-tested. Now it's time to run it -- and run it like never before. Bigger. Bolder. More battlegrounds. More victories. Because right now, thanks to a generous supporter of Turning Point Action, your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar -- up to $500,000, through October 31. That means, with your gift today: ✅ 2X the activists trained ✅ 2X the voters registered ✅ 2X the pressure on weak-kneed politicians ✅ 2X the ballot-chasing operations ✅ 2X the grassroots strength the Left can't stop We don't need to reinvent anything. Charlie already drew the blueprint and turned the key. So, if you've been wondering how to help... If you've been asking " what now?" Then, Peter, this is your moment to step in, fuel the fight, and take Charlie 's vision to the next level. Let's turn this energy -- this momentum -- into action. * * *
* * *
### The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication
### Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism
[Support What We Do](https://substack.com/redirect/5e9c75b2-c114-4204-b6cf-b267d67aa149?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
In the summer of 2023, a small law firm in Chicago makes a quiet but seismic decision. Facing rising costs and competitive pressure, the firm subscribed to an enterprise version of ChatGPT, the AI model developed by OpenAI.
Within months, the software had streamlined document review, legal research, and even client correspondence. The catch? The firm, which once employed 15 paralegals, now needed only two, whose sole job it is to feed their fallen co-workers workload into "the machine."
The rest were let go, their roles absorbed by an algorithm that worked faster, cheaper, and--arguably--better. Or as a brave young man once famously said to a young girl **["can't be bargained with, can't be reasoned with. It doesn't feel pity, or remorse, or fear. And it absolutely will not stop... ever" ](https://substack.com/redirect/65e0aa7e-d71b-483e-9832-0e1c222d9af7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/65e0aa7e-d71b-483e-9832-0e1c222d9af7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This story, shortly to be replicated across countless industries, reveals a troubling paradox at the heart of the AI revolution: the technology has likely passed the point of cannibalizing the very customers it was meant to aid and (more importantly, which is not being talked about at all by anyone) **bought by.**
The AI industry is racing forward with breathtaking ambition. Sam Altman, CEO of OpenAI, has articulated a vision to own the "full stack" of AI-- From making custom chips and building data centers, to creating the models and agents that run on them. Altman is even looking at building smartphones, browsers and wearables using his OpenAI tech.
* * *
* * *
**[Sponsored By Ring Clear](https://substack.com/redirect/22797f0e-e002-4804-a897-21fc7cb6a8e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Tinnitus Discovery Leaves Doctors Speechless (Try Tonight)](https://substack.com/redirect/4440ab1e-eb25-47fe-9c31-5f1997ef7da3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4440ab1e-eb25-47fe-9c31-5f1997ef7da3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[ Click here to try now](https://substack.com/redirect/4440ab1e-eb25-47fe-9c31-5f1997ef7da3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
Yet, a recent report from Deutsche Bank Research paints a sobering picture of the industry's financial trajectory. In Europe, **[the growth of paying AI accounts is stalling,](https://substack.com/redirect/4b1be7f2-61f3-40e0-bd33-6855b2cbbc96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/4b1be7f2-61f3-40e0-bd33-6855b2cbbc96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)with subscription rates showing a trend line down.
**[Deutsche Bank Research](https://substack.com/redirect/4b1be7f2-61f3-40e0-bd33-6855b2cbbc96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **reports that:****
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1d8d6882-cf69-4785-9d7a-c883ec60177b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
All that maybe true, but that trend line still exists:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/75f174c8-f253-48f3-b7c5-09f47f96cd6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The trend line is not a disaster, at least not yet, but it is very clearly moving down. Open AI remains bullish on its corporate customers and enterprise accounts but the core issue of how AI will generate sustainable revenue is still...vague. Altman himself has commented on this saying _**" We will have to monetize it somehow at some point. The compute costs are eye-watering"**_
"Some how" and "At some point" are concerning phrases. Especially when there is a bulk of evidence emerging that individual AI subscriptions are not fitting in to an easily marketable solution for private consumers.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4b1be7f2-61f3-40e0-bd33-6855b2cbbc96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Unlike the iPhone, which sold billions of units by creating a new consumer market, AI has not lent itself to mass individual subscriptions so far. Quite the opposite in fact.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6a15ddd2-2f06-4b99-a6ec-20a1c46e248a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Netflix's or Spotify's streaming model, another oft-cited analogy, also falters: while it can generate cat videos or write code, AI's most transformative application is in enterprise settings, where a single license can replace entire floors of people.
AI is not Grammerly. It doesnt help make you a better writer. It is not like autocorrect on a phone that helps corrects your spelling. It is fast becoming apparent that AI is not here to help you become better at what you do at all, it is here to replace you, and your colleagues, and what you all do ... entirely.
Let's consider the Chicago law firm example again. In a hypothetical world, each of those 15 original paralegals might have subscribed to ChatGPT to enhance their work (think Grammerly), creating 15 customers. In reality, the firm became the sole customer, slashing its workforce and leaving 13 potential users unemployed. This pattern repeats across industries as diverse as banking, coding, and writing. Far from assisting people in their jobs, AI's efficiency eliminates the jobs of its most likely adopters because, it turns out, the human component of the equation is the weak link and the machine does better without them.
This cannibalization is not a distant threat but a present reality. Estimates vary but some believe that generative AI could automate tasks equivalent to 30% of current white-collar jobs in developed economies within a decade. The same technology that empowers a coder to debug faster or a writer to draft quicker also renders their individual roles redundant when scaled. The societal implications are obviously profound, but the economic paradox is as equally stark.
AI's early adopters--professionals in knowledge-based industries--are increasingly replaced by the tool they once championed as a transformative enhancement of their value. The result is a shrinking pool of individual subscribers, as companies consolidate AI use into fewer and fewer, high-cost enterprise licenses.
AI's next frontier--conversational agents capable of passing the Turing test, where a machine's responses are _**truly**_ indistinguishable from a human's--looms closer than many realize.
Alan Turing proposed the original benchmark in 1950, imagining a future where machines could _**convincingly**_ mimic human dialogue. Sam Altman has argued that the original measurement of the Turing test has been surpassed and that the "Turing Test 2.0" is when AI can "do science" on its own.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a4486818-1819-4b58-977a-3e39217966e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
He may well be correct on the original definition of the Turing test having been passed. If you have ever stumbled into the comment sections of any of the AI generated E-girl influencers on Instagram, you would be forgiven for arguing that the Turing test has long since been consigned to history, given the way the commenters converse (and flirt) with a computer sprite. (Altman himself certainly appears to believe this with his controversial upcoming plans for "erotic content" in ChatGPT.)
However if he is correct with his assertion that soon AI will be able to make scientific breakthroughs on its own, you may soon be able to add "Scientist" next to paralegal and coder in the jobless column.
As AI moves from text to speech, its reach will expand even further. When you call customer service, you'll speak to an AI. When you visit a bank, an AI will process your loan. These interactions, seamless and cost-effective for businesses, will further erode the need for human employees.
Humans will certainly interact with AI, they will likely interact with AI a lot, but as individuals through corporate portals rather than by purchasing personal OpenAI subscriptions.
If AI continues to displace its potential consumer base as the trend line is beginning to suggest, companies like OpenAI may find themselves with cutting-edge technology but no mass market to sell it to.
**[The Deutsche Bank report](https://substack.com/redirect/4b1be7f2-61f3-40e0-bd33-6855b2cbbc96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** warns that the AI industry's current trajectory assumes widespread consumer uptake, but that may never emerge and if it does it may not arrive soon enough to save OpenAI from the skyscraper of debt they will have built for themselves and they are not the only ones in this boat.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f3cf267b-356d-4862-a2b4-7741f1307439?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For a populace that will soon be surrounded by AI in nearly everything they touch, the "it" factor, the "need" to subscribe personally to ChatGPT in particular just isn't there yet.
For the unemployed paralegal, coder, or call center worker sitting idly on the couch, the ability to make AI-generated cat videos may replace doom scrolling TikTok, but even then, the number of subscribers from that is unlikely to cover the _**" eye watering compute costs"**_ invested so far.
If this all sounds familiar it's because this dynamic echoes one of the great historical missteps in business: the collapse of Nortel Networks in the early 2000s.
Nortel, a telecommunications giant, overestimated demand for its optical switches, betting on an internet boom that never materialized at the scale and in the direction it predicted. While the internet did indeed eventually take over the world, it didn't help Nortel. By 2001, Nortel were going through their Icarus moment, the company's valuation plummeted towards it eventual demise, leaving in its wake a cautionary tale of overconfidence in future technological adoption.
History says that OpenAI risks a similar fate. Take for example "Internet on your phone."
"Mobile Browsing" was launched in the early 2000's with GPRS technology, but did not take off. Even with the widespread deployment of (and massive investment in) 3G technology in the mid 2000's, it wasn't until the original iPhone (launched in 2007) that "internet on your phone" captured the publics imagination. Even then, at it's launch Steve Job's announcement of "A breakthrough Internet communications device" (2:06) met with barely a smattering of applause.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/46b504fa-3176-4ff0-b6d5-bba797d4c2c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
(Ironic considering that the two announcements that received the biggest cheers and applause were "A widescreen Ipod with touch controls" (1:36) and "A Revolutionary mobile phone" (1:52) two things most of us barely use our phones for anymore.)
**What does this mean for AI 's future?**
The industry's current path--massive investments in infrastructure with uncertain returns--suggests a bubble that could rival Nortel's, and not to compound the issues but there are two other nasty looking storm clouds on the horizon for AI in general and OpenAI in particular.
Operationally the hardware underpinning AI's rise--specialized chips like NVIDIA's H100--faces a replacement cycle measured in just two to three years. Every upgrade to the next generation demands billions in capital expenditure. OpenAI's projected $60 billion annual spend on Oracle's data centers alone underscores the scale of this investment. (**[Thats more than the GDP of Jordan according to the IMF](https://substack.com/redirect/fdc60ddf-d87f-446e-ac47-14bdf4a3a370?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**)
That financial avalanche could bury even the most optimistic projections if the anticipated consumer base fails to materialize. Also, remember that it took nearly 7 years before "Internet on your phone" became "a thing." At current replacement rates, Open AI's costs by that point could be[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/fdc60ddf-d87f-446e-ac47-14bdf4a3a370?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[larger than the GDP of some developed nations!](https://substack.com/redirect/fdc60ddf-d87f-446e-ac47-14bdf4a3a370?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
The other storm cloud is the market mechanism. For now OpenAI can charge high prices for enterprise clients but those prices are only going to go one way. Down. Technology will get cheaper, emerging competition will drive down the cost of services further still.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4b1be7f2-61f3-40e0-bd33-6855b2cbbc96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
OpenAI may be the poster child for the tech revolution right now but very few of the firms that held claim to that title in late 1999 appear as anything other than footnotes in the history of the internet today. AOL, Netscape, Nortel, even Microsoft's Internet Explorer, once the de facto gateway to the internet for a generation, is now just a memory.
For now, the Chicago law firm's story is a microcosm of a larger reckoning. The paralegals who lost their jobs aren't buying AI subscriptions; their priority is searching for new (AI free) careers.
As AI's capabilities grow, so does its potential to reshape society--not as a democratizing force, but as a debt laden paradox that enriches a few while leaving many behind.
The question is not whether AI can pass the Turing test, but whether it can pass a more human one: creating a future where technology serves society, not just itself.
A Terminator with a heart, as it were.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/01db3d96-d2bf-4302-8b09-2d82aaf08031?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

clean_body: If everyone gets replaced with AI, why do you need to buy AI? | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? If everyone gets replaced with AI, why do you need to buy AI? | | | Oct 25| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism In the summer of 2023, a small law firm in Chicago makes a quiet but seismic decision. Facing rising costs and competitive pressure, the firm subscribed to an enterprise version of ChatGPT, the AI model developed by OpenAI. Within months, the software had streamlined document review, legal research, and even client correspondence. The catch? The firm, which once employed 15 paralegals, now needed only two, whose sole job it is to feed their fallen co-workers workload into "the machine." The rest were let go, their roles absorbed by an algorithm that worked faster, cheaper, and--arguably--better. Or as a brave young man once famously said to a young girl | | ---|---|--- This story, shortly to be replicated across countless industries, reveals a troubling paradox at the heart of the AI revolution: the technology has likely passed the point of cannibalizing the very customers it was meant to aid and (more importantly, which is not being talked about at all by anyone) bought by. The AI industry is racing forward with breathtaking ambition. Sam Altman, CEO of OpenAI, has articulated a vision to own the "full stack" of AI-- From making custom chips and building data centers, to creating the models and agents that run on them. Altman is even looking at building smartphones, browsers and wearables using his OpenAI tech. | | ---|---|--- Yet, a recent report from Deutsche Bank Research paints a sobering picture of the industry's financial trajectory. In Europe, subscription rates showing a trend line down. reports that:** | | ---|---|--- All that maybe true, but that trend line still exists: | | ---|---|--- The trend line is not a disaster, at least not yet, but it is very clearly moving down. Open AI remains bullish on its corporate customers and enterprise accounts but the core issue of how AI will generate sustainable revenue is still...vague. Altman himself has commented on this saying " We will have to monetize it somehow at some point. The compute costs are eye-watering" "Some how" and "At some point" are concerning phrases. Especially when there is a bulk of evidence emerging that individual AI subscriptions are not fitting in to an easily marketable solution for private consumers. | | ---|---|--- Unlike the iPhone, which sold billions of units by creating a new consumer market, AI has not lent itself to mass individual subscriptions so far. Quite the opposite in fact. | | ---|---|--- Netflix's or Spotify's streaming model, another oft-cited analogy, also falters: while it can generate cat videos or write code, AI's most transformative application is in enterprise settings, where a single license can replace entire floors of people. AI is not Grammerly. It doesnt help make you a better writer. It is not like autocorrect on a phone that helps corrects your spelling. It is fast becoming apparent that AI is not here to help you become better at what you do at all, it is here to replace you, and your colleagues, and what you all do ... entirely. Let's consider the Chicago law firm example again. In a hypothetical world, each of those 15 original paralegals might have subscribed to ChatGPT to enhance their work (think Grammerly), creating 15 customers. In reality, the firm became the sole customer, slashing its workforce and leaving 13 potential users unemployed. This pattern repeats across industries as diverse as banking, coding, and writing. Far from assisting people in their jobs, AI's efficiency eliminates the jobs of its most likely adopters because, it turns out, the human component of the equation is the weak link and the machine does better without them. This cannibalization is not a distant threat but a present reality. Estimates vary but some believe that generative AI could automate tasks equivalent to 30% of current white-collar jobs in developed economies within a decade. The same technology that empowers a coder to debug faster or a writer to draft quicker also renders their individual roles redundant when scaled. The societal implications are obviously profound, but the economic paradox is as equally stark. AI's early adopters--professionals in knowledge-based industries--are increasingly replaced by the tool they once championed as a transformative enhancement of their value. The result is a shrinking pool of individual subscribers, as companies consolidate AI use into fewer and fewer, high-cost enterprise licenses. AI's next frontier--conversational agents capable of passing the Turing test, where a machine's responses are truly indistinguishable from a human's--looms closer than many realize. Alan Turing proposed the original benchmark in 1950, imagining a future where machines could convincingly mimic human dialogue. Sam Altman has argued that the original measurement of the Turing test has been surpassed and that the "Turing Test 2.0" is when AI can "do science" on its own. He may well be correct on the original definition of the Turing test having been passed. If you have ever stumbled into the comment sections of any of the AI generated E-girl influencers on Instagram, you would be forgiven for arguing that the Turing test has long since been consigned to history, given the way the commenters converse (and flirt) with a computer sprite. (Altman himself certainly appears to believe this with his controversial upcoming plans for "erotic content" in ChatGPT.) However if he is correct with his assertion that soon AI will be able to make scientific breakthroughs on its own, you may soon be able to add "Scientist" next to paralegal and coder in the jobless column. As AI moves from text to speech, its reach will expand even further. When you call customer service, you'll speak to an AI. When you visit a bank, an AI will process your loan. These interactions, seamless and cost-effective for businesses, will further erode the need for human employees. Humans will certainly interact with AI, they will likely interact with AI a lot, but as individuals through corporate portals rather than by purchasing personal OpenAI subscriptions. If AI continues to displace its potential consumer base as the trend line is beginning to suggest, companies like OpenAI may find themselves with cutting-edge technology but no mass market to sell it to. warns that the AI industry's current trajectory assumes widespread consumer uptake, but that may never emerge and if it does it may not arrive soon enough to save OpenAI from the skyscraper of debt they will have built for themselves and they are not the only ones in this boat. | | ---|---|--- For a populace that will soon be surrounded by AI in nearly everything they touch, the "it" factor, the "need" to subscribe personally to ChatGPT in particular just isn't there yet. For the unemployed paralegal, coder, or call center worker sitting idly on the couch, the ability to make AI-generated cat videos may replace doom scrolling TikTok, but even then, the number of subscribers from that is unlikely to cover the " eye watering compute costs" invested so far. If this all sounds familiar it's because this dynamic echoes one of the great historical missteps in business: the collapse of Nortel Networks in the early 2000s. Nortel, a telecommunications giant, overestimated demand for its optical switches, betting on an internet boom that never materialized at the scale and in the direction it predicted. While the internet did indeed eventually take over the world, it didn't help Nortel. By 2001, Nortel were going through their Icarus moment, the company's valuation plummeted towards it eventual demise, leaving in its wake a cautionary tale of overconfidence in future technological adoption. History says that OpenAI risks a similar fate. Take for example "Internet on your phone." "Mobile Browsing" was launched in the early 2000's with GPRS technology, but did not take off. Even with the widespread deployment of (and massive investment in) 3G technology in the mid 2000's, it wasn't until the original iPhone (launched in 2007) that "internet on your phone" captured the publics imagination. Even then, at it's launch Steve Job's announcement of "A breakthrough Internet communications device" (2:06) met with barely a smattering of applause. (Ironic considering that the two announcements that received the biggest cheers and applause were "A widescreen Ipod with touch controls" (1:36) and "A Revolutionary mobile phone" (1:52) two things most of us barely use our phones for anymore.) What does this mean for AI 's future? The industry's current path--massive investments in infrastructure with uncertain returns--suggests a bubble that could rival Nortel's, and not to compound the issues but there are two other nasty looking storm clouds on the horizon for AI in general and OpenAI in particular. Operationally the hardware underpinning AI's rise--specialized chips like NVIDIA's H100--faces a replacement cycle measured in just two to three years. Every upgrade to the next generation demands billions in capital expenditure. OpenAI's projected $60 billion annual spend on Oracle's data centers alone underscores the scale of this investment. () That financial avalanche could bury even the most optimistic projections if the anticipated consumer base fails to materialize. Also, remember that it took nearly 7 years before "Internet on your phone" became "a thing." At current replacement rates, Open AI's costs by that point could be The other storm cloud is the market mechanism. For now OpenAI can charge high prices for enterprise clients but those prices are only going to go one way. Down. Technology will get cheaper, emerging competition will drive down the cost of services further still. | | ---|---|--- OpenAI may be the poster child for the tech revolution right now but very few of the firms that held claim to that title in late 1999 appear as anything other than footnotes in the history of the internet today. AOL, Netscape, Nortel, even Microsoft's Internet Explorer, once the de facto gateway to the internet for a generation, is now just a memory. For now, the Chicago law firm's story is a microcosm of a larger reckoning. The paralegals who lost their jobs aren't buying AI subscriptions; their priority is searching for new (AI free) careers. As AI's capabilities grow, so does its potential to reshape society--not as a democratizing force, but as a debt laden paradox that enriches a few while leaving many behind. The question is not whether AI can pass the Turing test, but whether it can pass a more human one: creating a future where technology serves society, not just itself. A Terminator with a heart, as it were. | | ---|---|--- * The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism | A guest post by| free markets and American enterprise. What if we told you that Republicans won in Virginia by less than 70,000 votes in 2021? And that a new poll shows Winsome Earle-Sears cutting our lead in half? And that far-right groups have spent millions this month to flood Virginia with negative ads? And that we need a surge of support for Abigail to stand up to their attacks? This is the biggest election since Trump retook the White House, and Trump just announced his endorsement for Winsome Earle-Sears. = If you are signed up for ActBlue Express, your contribution to Abigail Spanberger will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Grateful for your continued support, Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23543%2E4449941%2EJLgzM5) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23543%2E4449941%2EJLgzM5) [ [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69619?t=4&akid=23543%2E4449941%2EJLgzM5) ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69619?t=3&akid=23543%2E4449941%2EJLgzM5) **[It's pretty clear that Donald Trump is afraid of me.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69619?t=5&akid=23543%2E4449941%2EJLgzM5)**

Trump has publicly endorsed my opponent (after Jack shamelessly begged for his support). He's attacked me by name in an unhinged rant on social media. His administration _illegally leaked my private records to Jack 's campaign ally._

**[But team, Trump is even more afraid of the movement we've built together here in New Jersey -- because if we win, we will send a powerful message to the nation that the people do not support his destructive and incompetent presidency.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69619?t=6&akid=23543%2E4449941%2EJLgzM5)**

That's why he's doing _everything he can_ to stop us from winning this upcoming election, and is rallying the support of his deep-pocketed allies to flood this race with spending against us.

**[_Donald Trump knows that as governor, I 'm going to do everything in my power to fight back against his disastrous agenda. But polling shows a neck-and-neck race, team, which means we absolutely can't let Trump's attacks go unanswered. name: Chris Taylor HQ
subject: 2.3 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251025-746&t=1&akid=751%2E294397%2ED0RJ33)
Folks,
Over **2,300,000** people voted in the last Wisconsin Supreme Court election.
It was the most expensive judicial election in U.S. history _and_ set a Wisconsin record for the highest voter turnout in a nonpartisan spring election.
As you can imagine, reaching that many voters takes a lot of time and resources, and that’s why we need your support.
**Your donation helps us talk to voters across Wisconsin about what’s at stake: protecting reproductive healthcare access, workers’ rights, voting rights, and our democracy.**
So, we’re asking: [**Can you contribute $10 today to fuel our campaign operations and support Judge Chris Taylor?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251025_1_ak.YRiDfk&amount=10&refcode=em20251025-746&t=2&akid=751%2E294397%2ED0RJ33)

name: Team McBride
subject: Sarah refuses to stand by while Republicans hold paychecks and health care hostage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
House Republicans are still refusing to do their jobs while Americans pay the price.
#
We’re now in week four of the government shutdown — and House Republicans are still refusing to do their jobs while Americans pay the price.
They don’t care that federal workers are missing paychecks, families are worrying about making ends meet, or that millions risk losing their health care. Because for Republicans, this shutdown isn’t a crisis. It was their plan all along.
**Sarah refuses to stand by while Republicans hold paychecks and health care hostage.[Can you rush a donation of $5 to help Sarah fight back?](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251025-1.k3k1Dx&refcode=em20251025-2438&amount=5&t=1&akid=2438%2E21716%2EQwO8Wh)**
Right now, Sarah is working around the clock to call out the GOP’s cruelty and push forward legislation to:
👉 Guarantee pay for military service members and Coast Guard personnel
👉 Provide unemployment benefits for federal employees working without pay
👉 Keep SNAP benefits funded so families don’t go hungry
👉 Protect small businesses from losing critical support
👉 Ensure low-wage workers like cafeteria staff and janitors get the back-pay they’ve earned
👉 Keep the FAA and aviation safety programs fully funded
Sarah isn’t backing down. She’ll keep leading with compassion and courage to end this shutdown, protect health care, and deliver relief for working families — but she needs your help to do it.
**[If you can, please chip in to help Sarah fight for Delawareans and take on Republicans who sell out working families to serve their billionaire donors.](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251025-1.k3k1Dx&refcode=em20251025-2438&amount=5&t=2&akid=2438%2E21716%2EQwO8Wh)**

But first, I want to pull back the curtain and explain why this request is so important. October 31st marks our campaign’s final end-of-month fundraising deadline before we enter the last stretch of the year -- and several major factors will determine our path to victory. Election experts already call California’s 22nd one of the most competitive races in the country. If Proposition 50 passes, we could quickly become the #1 flip opportunity in California -- if not the entire nation. That’s why the GOP’s dark money machine is starting to pour money into this race. Noem drafts plan to dismantle election security** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117994634/578303991/-248329304?refcode=em-10.25.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2I0NWY5OS1jOGIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UqNlSw6TmC7TJtGFYdfsXo3zt6HE0NMmmTT_KDFwAyU=)**
* * *
We’ve been warning about this for months, friend: The Trump administration is quietly dismantling CISA – the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency – and replacing it with loyalists who will do their bidding. Now, it’s happening. A leaked draft strategy from Kristi Noem’s office revealed a dangerous plan to sideline CISA and hand control of election-related cybersecurity to political agencies like ICE and DHS. **CISA is the agency that helped protect the 2020 election and debunked Trump’s lies about widespread fraud. That’s why it’s in the crosshairs.** This plan would gut nonpartisan election protections and replace them with a politicized system designed to help Trump and his allies cling to power – no matter what the voters say. And unless we act now, they’ll get away with it. We’ve said it before and we’ll say it again: **Democratic Secretaries of State are our firewall against federal overreach.** While Trump’s DOJ and DHS rewrite the rules, it’s state officials who safeguard voter rolls, oversee election infrastructure, and stand up to unlawful interference. But they can’t do it alone. This is an all-hands-on-deck moment, and we need your help. **[If you chip in $3, you can to help us fight back against this authoritarian election plot, and defend democracy from this dangerous push to gut our elections.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117994635/578303992/-248329304?refcode=em-10.25.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2I0NWY5OS1jOGIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UqNlSw6TmC7TJtGFYdfsXo3zt6HE0NMmmTT_KDFwAyU=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117994636/578303993/-248329304?refcode=em-10.25.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2I0NWY5OS1jOGIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UqNlSw6TmC7TJtGFYdfsXo3zt6HE0NMmmTT_KDFwAyU=)**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: This race won’t be won on values alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
Right-wing special interests and billionaires like Elon Musk tried to buy seats on the Wisconsin Supreme Court — and nearly succeeded.
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6085?t=1&akid=5650%2E196590%2EMCWZpG)
---
Folks,

Last April, right-wing special interests and billionaires like Elon Musk tried to buy seats on the Wisconsin Supreme Court — and nearly succeeded.

They spent so much that they broke the record for the most expensive judicial election in _our nation’s history._

Now, they’re eyeballing Judge Chris Taylor’s race.

Without notice, right-wing special interests could start funneling money into Wisconsin to buy a seat on our state’s highest court. We can’t let that happen.

That’s why I’m reaching out today. Chris has spent her whole career on the side of people, from her years as a public servant to her work on the bench.

**But this race won’t be won on values alone. It’s going to take all of us coming together to stand up to right-wing special interests and protect our progressive majority.**

[_**Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can to Judge Chris Taylor’s campaign and The Long Run PAC? Every dollar helps.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6085?t=2&akid=5650%2E196590%2EMCWZpG)

Tammy

name: Brandon Herrera
subject: Influencer Range Day Winner Announced!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Friend,
First, I want to thank all of you who made a contribution during the Influencer Range Day giveaway. The day of the deadline was one of our biggest fundraising days ever. Your generosity humbles me.
I'm also pleased to announce that the winner, selected at random from tens of thousands of entries, is Shawn from Georgia. I'm looking forward to hanging out with him and his guest in Las Vegas in a few weeks. It's going to be a blast!
I'm also looking forward to announcing some of our upcoming donor premiums that are truly next-level experiences.
In the meantime, I encourage you to make a contribution today because, just as before, it will count toward our next soon-to-be-announced giveaway. Every $5 gets you an entry, so $20 is four entries, and so on.
Please donate at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/LjP4G4RQ892n0XvWFLlfsknQ/IdkmGXo89tPNKZaMWDrhSg).
Thank you for all your support in this difficult but worthwhile battle to defeat the most anti-2A "RINO" in Congress and replace him with someone who understands the meaning of "shall not be infringed."
Respectfully,

Brandon Herrera

Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/unsubscribe/M3dKmjvhR8CwRJ801N0zlTlDygVorb8PbaawXpI4LLQ/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg/IdkmGXo89tPNKZaMWDrhSg)
