name: News Update via Our Revolution
subject: LATEST: Mamdani Under Attack, the Fight to Stop ICE Flights, Making History, and much more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

NEWS FROM THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

HEADLINES: No Kings: History Made! | The People vs. Oligarchy | Stop
Deportation Flights | Mamdani Under Attack | GOP vs Adelita Grijalva
| Prop 50 w/ Ro Khanna | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

NO KINGS, NO OLIGARCHS

More than 7 million of us turned out for No Kings Day — the largest
protest in American history!

The world was watching and we sent a message loud and clear: the
American people reject Trump, his corrupt regime, and his cruel
agenda.

Trump’s authoritarianism is reaching a fever pitch as he deploys
troops into city after city, terrorizes communities with ICE, and
targets political opponents with lawfare.

Now is the time to turn this energy into action — which is why [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28759?t=1011&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]Our
Revolution is scaling up our Citizen Action Team to organize more
pressure campaigns and mobilize voter turnout for key races like
Zohran Mamdani for NYC mayor.

“Trump isn’t just trying to rule like a king — he’s fusing corporate
power with state power to entrench an oligarchy,” Our Revolution
leader Joseph Geevarghese said in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34437?t=1012&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]Amsterdam News. “From the shop
floor to city hall, working people are organizing to reclaim our
democracy.”

As Trump takes healthcare and food assistance from working-class
families, he’s brazenly enriching himself with crypto schemes and
handing out billions to his cronies.

“We know what democracy looks like and we know what it means to fight
oligarchs,” Our Revolution Chair Larry Cohen spoke to thousands at No
Kings in Maryland. “The oligarchs think they can just buy everything
in our country, but we’re not for sale!”

Our activists are on the streets every week — showing up on
billionaires' doorsteps in the Hamptons, confronting oligarchs like
Peter Thiel in San Francisco, bird-dogging politicians on Capitol
Hill, and rallying against deportation contractors like Avelo
Airlines.

We have to fight on every front. That’s why Our Revolution is focused
on building grassroots power to Fight Trump & the Oligarchs with our
targeted 3 Point Strategy:

1. Fight Trump’s Oligarch Agenda - from Capitol Hill to City Halls
2. Elect Anti-Oligarch Champions up and down the ballot
3. Get Oligarch Money out of Politics and uplift the grassroots

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34264?t=1013&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]And we’re just getting started. Chip in a donation of any amount
to help fuel this people-powered resistance.

★ ★ ★

[4]Fight Trump & The Oligarchs

★ ★ ★

Last night, Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese
delivered closing remarks at the CSU Law Review’s 2025 Symposium:
“Stress Fractures in Democracy and The People’s Response.”

He spoke powerfully about how grassroots movements are the key to
defending democracy, confronting oligarchic power, and empowering
ordinary people to reclaim our government.

“We’re in a struggle between citizens and oligarchs — between those
who would preserve our democracy and those who would plunder it,” he
said. “The verdict in Citizens v. Oligarchs will be written by what
We the People choose to do next.”

★ ★ ★

Today, Our Revolution and our allies are rallying at the State House
in Annapolis to demand that Governor Wes Moore stop ICE flights out
of Maryland.

Avelo Airlines, which quietly signed a contract with ICE to run
deportation flights, is now operating out of Maryland’s BWI Airport —
turning a public facility into a launchpad for tearing families
apart.

Because the airport is state-owned, Gov. Moore has the power to end
this partnership, and Our Revolution is helping lead a statewide
coalition to make it clear: Maryland must not be complicit in Trump’s
deportation machine.

Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese will speak at
the statewide rally — alongside partner groups with Indivisible.
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33959?t=1014&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]Sign the petition and join us in the fight.

★ ★ ★

CONFRONTING OLIGARCHS

After Our Revolution organized [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33956?t=1015&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]nationwide protests against
Palantir, we showed up every Monday for four weeks to protest outside
Peter Thiel’s bizarre ‘Antichrist’ book readings in San Francisco.

Peter Thiel, the Big Tech Oligarch behind Palantir, keeps cashing
taxpayer checks to build tools of surveillance and war.

It’s time to shine a light on Palantir’s shadowy operations: aiding
ICE’s real-time immigrant tracking, enabling deadly targeting in
Gaza, and using its tech to spy on us all.

★ ★ ★

From Wall Street to the Hamptons, we’re making it clear: Oligarchs
can't hide.

Our Revolution activists marched down Billionaires Lane — right past
the mansions of Trump and Cuomo’s oligarch donors to send a message:
the people are fighting back.

“The ultra rich should not be able to run away from the people they
are impacting with their political decisions,” Our Revolution
organizer Vincent Vertuccio told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34252?t=1016&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]Newsday.

This is people power vs. oligarchy — and we’re not backing down. Our
activists are taking the fight to oligarchs’ doorsteps and our
organizers are knocking doors to get out the vote for candidates who
will challenge their power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34264?t=1017&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]DONATE TO POWER OUR CITIZEN ACTION TEAM

★ ★ ★

[9]Elect Progressives

★ ★ ★

MAMDANI UNDER ATTACK

With just over a week until election day, Trump continues to meddle
in the NYC mayor’s race and billionaires are pouring in cash to try
to stop Zohran Mamdani — yet Democratic leaders still refuse to back
their party’s nominee.

That’s why Our Revolution organizers went straight to Capitol Hill to
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34253?t=1018&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]deliver 80,000 signatures to the offices of House Minority Leader
Hakeem Jeffries and Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer.

Meanwhile, our organizers will be joining Bernie Sanders, AOC, and
Zohran for a massive rally that will fill up the Forest Hills Stadium
in Queens tomorrow. We’ll be signing folks up to help with GOTV in
this homestretch to Election Day!

The pressure is on and we won’t let up until we get Zohran across the
finish line to fight for affordable housing, groceries, and
transportation for New Yorkers.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34428?t=1019&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]TELL DEM LEADERS TO BACK MAMDANI

★ ★ ★

HELP ELECT ZOHRAN!

Our Revolution organizers have been pounding the pavement across all
Five Boroughs: mobilizing votes on the streets, in the subways, and
in key neighborhoods we need to win this race.

But no matter where you are in the country, you can be part of our
voter turnout operation for Zohran Mamdani. Join us to make calls to
NYC voters Tuesdays, Thursdays, and Sundays through Election Day!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33961?t=1020&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]MAKE CALLS FOR MAMDANI

★ ★ ★

Mamdani isn’t the only progressive on the ballot on Election Day
November 4th. Our Revolution is backing dozens of candidates in key
races across the country!

NJ SLATE

Time to get out the vote in New Jersey! Our Revolution is backing an
exciting slate in Jersey City to grow our progressive footprint in
the Garden State:

James Solomon is running an exciting campaign for Mayor; joined by
At-Large candidates: Mamta Singh, Michael Griffin, and Roland
Lavarro; and City Council candidates: Denise Ridley in Ward A, Lorena
Loayza in Ward B; Dawn Giabalvo in Ward C; Veronica Akaezuwa in Ward
D; and Eleana Little in Ward E.

★ ★ ★

OHIO SLATE

We’re putting our endorsement behind three great candidates in
Dayton, Ohio, where progressives are building local power:

Shenise Turner-Sloss for Mayor, Darryl Fairchild for re-election as
City Commissioner, and Jacob Davis for City Commissioner.

★ ★ ★

PA SLATE

We have a great line up of candidates in Pennsylvania — and just 10
days left to get out the vote!

Our Revolution is proud to support Dylan Altemara for PA State House
District 39, Rich Forsman for Camp Hill Borough Council, Kyle
McIntyre for Upper Darby Township Council, and Nicki Williams for
Judge of Elections in District 2-1.

We’re also endorsing four progressives for Conestoga Valley School
District: Suze Louis, Sarah E. Kern, Melissa Clinton, and Tim Shea.

★ ★ ★

This is what Our Revolution was built for: electing bold progressives
at every level of government who will challenge the status quo and
put people over profit. Let’s show what grassroots power can do.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31227?t=1021&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]Help us ramp up our grassroots GOTV machine to elect progressives
up and down the ballot this November and hit the ground running for
2026 — every dollar helps!

★ ★ ★

STONEWALLING GRIJALVA

Adelita Grijalva won a major victory in Arizona’s 7th District —
carrying the legacy of her late father Rep. Raul Grijalva in the seat
to become the newest member of the Congressional Progressive Caucus.

But now House Speaker Mike Johnson is refusing to swear Adelita into
office — all to block her from being the 218th vote forcing release
of the Epstein files.

This isn’t bureaucracy. It’s a COVER-UP. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34256?t=1022&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]Demand Speaker Johnson
swear in Adelita Grijalva NOW!

★ ★ ★

[15]Elect Candidates

★ ★ ★

Last week, Our Revolution hosted a Live California Organizing Call
with U.S. Rep Ro Khanna to rally support for Prop 50 - the Election
Rigging Response Act.

Thousands of activists joined from across the state and around the
country to strategize against Trump’s authoritarian agenda, organize
resistance to ICE raids, and mobilize for fair elections.

Other inspiring speakers included Assemblyman Ash Kalra, actor and
Burbank Councilman Konstantine Anthony, activist Alfred Twu, and
labor leader Amy Scott-Slovick — lifting up the fight for workers’
rights, immigrant protections, and democracy rooted in people power —
not oligarchs.

Together, we’re building the grassroots momentum to pass Prop 50 and
prove that when we organize, we win.

★ ★ ★

[16]Action Center

★ ★ ★

Together, we’re building a massive nationwide coalition to fight back
and prove that people power — not oligarchs — will decide the future
of our democracy.

That’s why Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team (CAT) is organizing
volunteers across the country to pressure Congress, mobilize voters,
and push bold progressive policies that put people before profit.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28759?t=1023&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]Plug in with our movement and help turn grassroots energy into
real political power.

★ ★ ★

HOT NEW MERCH!

Coming off the massive No Kings events last weekend, we want to offer
up some of our crowd-favorite Defund Oligarchy Merch at a special
price.

Whether it’s a new black tee-shirt or some No Kings buttons, every
purchase helps support our organizers and get voters to the polls for
Zohran Mamdani and progressive candidates coast to coast.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?t=1024&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]GRAB YOUR MERCH!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31227?t=1025&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=revreport20251025.A53_fT&t=1007&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=revreport20251025.33IlYa&t=1008&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=revreport20251025.9Ste-D&t=1009&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=revreport20251025.OU-kA1&t=1010&akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9734%2E5885482%2Et8S19o

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

Kern, Melissa Clinton, and Tim Shea. ★ ★ ★ This is what Our Revolution was built for: electing bold progressives at every level of government who will challenge the status quo and put people over profit. Let’s show what grassroots power can do. [ ]Help us ramp up our grassroots GOTV machine to elect progressives up and down the ballot this November and hit the ground running for 2026 — every dollar helps! ★ ★ ★ STONEWALLING GRIJALVA Adelita Grijalva won a major victory in Arizona’s 7th District — carrying the legacy of her late father Rep. Raul Grijalva in the seat to become the newest member of the Congressional Progressive Caucus. But now House Speaker Mike Johnson is refusing to swear Adelita into office — all to block her from being the 218th vote forcing release of the Epstein files. This isn’t bureaucracy. It’s a COVER-UP. [ ]Demand Speaker Johnson swear in Adelita Grijalva NOW! ★ ★ ★ [15]Elect Candidates ★ ★ ★ Last week, Our Revolution hosted a Live California Organizing Call with U.S. Rep Ro Khanna to rally support for Prop 50 - the Election Rigging Response Act. Thousands of activists joined from across the state and around the country to strategize against Trump’s authoritarian agenda, organize resistance to ICE raids, and mobilize for fair elections. Other inspiring speakers included Assemblyman Ash Kalra, actor and Burbank Councilman Konstantine Anthony, activist Alfred Twu, and labor leader Amy Scott-Slovick — lifting up the fight for workers’ rights, immigrant protections, and democracy rooted in people power — not oligarchs. Together, we’re building the grassroots momentum to pass Prop 50 and prove that when we organize, we win. ★ ★ ★ [16]Action Center ★ ★ ★ Together, we’re building a massive nationwide coalition to fight back and prove that people power — not oligarchs — will decide the future of our democracy. That’s why Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team (CAT) is organizing volunteers across the country to pressure Congress, mobilize voters, and push bold progressive policies that put people before profit. [ ]Plug in with our movement and help turn grassroots energy into real political power. ★ ★ ★ HOT NEW MERCH! Coming off the massive No Kings events last weekend, we want to offer up some of our crowd-favorite Defund Oligarchy Merch at a special price. Whether it’s a new black tee-shirt or some No Kings buttons, every purchase helps support our organizers and get voters to the polls for Zohran Mamdani and progressive candidates coast to coast. [ ]GRAB YOUR MERCH! ★ ★ ★ [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! name: Abdul for U.S. Senate
subject: AIPAC isn’t going away quietly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251025-1165&t=1001&akid=1171%2E251025%2EolIztB ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251025-1165&t=1002&akid=1171%2E251025%2EolIztB ]Abdul for US Senate

This change didn’t happen overnight,
Peter:

[ The ]The New York Times: Democrats Pull Away From AIPAC, Reflecting a
Broader Shift

For years, the progressive movement has been rallying for a Democratic
party that stands for peace, justice, and accountability, not billionaire
influence and endless war.

Here in Michigan, Abdul has been ahead of that curve. He’s the only
candidate in this race who’s never pandered to AIPAC, and never will.

That’s because Abdul believes our tax dollars shouldn’t be spent on
weapons and bombs that fuel genocide overseas — they should be invested in
making life better here at home.

This is our moment to send a progressive to the U.S. Senate who will usher
in a new era for the Democratic Party.

But AIPAC isn’t going away quietly.

They’re already getting involved in our primary. They see our campaign for
what it is — a direct threat to their stranglehold on our democracy — and
they’ll spend whatever it takes to stop us.

This campaign is powered entirely by grassroots donors like
you, Peter.
That’s why your donation today matters so much.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251025-1-ak.rtX5wx&amount=10&refcode=em20251025-1165&t=1004&akid=1171%2E251025%2EolIztB ]Can you pitch in $10 or whatever you can to help us fight

Thank you,

Team Abdul

name: Ellen F., Campaign Manager
subject: I’m asking directly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
Hey Peter, it’s Ellen Foster — Jon Ossoff’s Campaign Manager.
I wanted to reach out directly because we have an important end-of-month fundraising deadline approaching, and we’re falling short of our goal.
These goals aren’t made up metrics to try and get donors like you to chip in — they are real benchmarks that determine if we’re able to hire new staff, print more yard signs, and budget to build the largest statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen.
And, Peter, we _really_ can’t afford to fall short now as the GOP and far-right Super PACs are preparing to unleash hundreds of millions of dollars to try to defeat Jon here in Georgia.
That’s why I’m asking you directly: Can you help us catch up on our critical end-of-month goal by chipping in to Jon’s campaign today? You can chip in here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-em-oct25](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251025-1-subs-a&t=1&akid=971%2E5691347%2Es5bqrr)**
Thank you for your generous support.
Ellen
Campaign Manager
Jon Ossoff for Senate

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: Tim Walz’s shadow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
Democrats have treated Minnesota like their personal fiefdom - but with your help, we can put those days behind us. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=eca374db5ddc4a6ca171fd25dcd54953&_e=lc1KsNP9tkPkiBU3DXx3eekSCpGJxVqwMHsvPuOIAvZVuMO8570GNB2QXhdBBwdSzUDNCkbjpn3adqgPmYIbcUWQVphLdCBIEBHva1dPmhb7Xwsm1aT8Vb2G0np1HGJH53pSNXh1E_DzvU1l33RVt_t4vUeq9HSoepIhsjZ1yKbaQUOOq-uMgVgzRDJLZ18T1WQNEUIE13rqDhf6KayA2BkLcR-LMCw4VLEg0VjYrJl51dLS66aQ2IanF63CucxksJgva0vPHWmlMq9DoOCI3RfJJG_lv_l5a33W_7BjWuzjVDOE1IJAvT_T1-42v7sDAy1QLq_cKKBtyHKWk-5q--0deoiRGOK4C7obKf46JRFvxtyPfybQv8zJMHWzILktJBJ5VV4cvBlZHCW0jSj-Qk8-edc8oKpn3KsE7JQogUQuHxB7NTivfLx9XGte6nK4n73z2kmcWWLCkAJlOojMLLXxHJkJNBL_avtDMoi3mILPUa5V9v4SoepfBl_MHDUt2qFaoUZzBZf7RmYafDfkryWXT1fJ3i0YmZR1JwJ5krDiN5aqWmxprroJcg8ecY5JE9clbeUU3HxHpBnDRIVf8SPImYzqhFqdQ-YCLDjIp0cmkZizTeFO0wdKHF0-_UbrZ7QS1_zEbG0OVZ4A93o0RMuy5iOlIltAGGNU0MTfn5iCx-fOMXPCIziVB7N1lFOcNTlv7rjOtXGww_KUo4MpXcF5WXSUV_zAdaEzZj56KZM-EDE5rxlf2EVtFafQaf4wwkwU1dp8XmCC7gENl12NFd24eXrs3kemhWlUCbzVtlU%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda.

Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back.

I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. **I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos.**

Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans.

_**Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe.

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN →**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=eca374db5ddc4a6ca171fd25dcd54953&_e=lc1KsNP9tkPkiBU3DXx3eekSCpGJxVqwMHsvPuOIAvZVuMO8570GNB2QXhdBBwdSzUDNCkbjpn3adqgPmYIbcUWQVphLdCBIEBHva1dPmhb7Xwsm1aT8Vb2G0np1HGJH53pSNXh1E_DzvU1l33RVt_t4vUeq9HSoepIhsjZ1yKbaQUOOq-uMgVgzRDJLZ18T1WQNEUIE13rqDhf6KayA2BkLcR-LMCw4VLEg0VjYrJl51dLS66aQ2IanF63CucxksJgva0vPHWmlMq9DoOCI3RfJJG_lv_l5a33W_7BjWuzzjNrgFLLVWN3eVMrA2FE1LI9HjBzRF5oyQaqgvZPIORC3MSh_cZmgHBVzHCZiUFxwK1GE1Nozd3CYUbQ6wU7pNQI2RT6ZiNLYLk8grfTNl1KLmGV6wy_JTvPQwNltHHSpGpYmgP0ixFYFwt7tYH0XO9v3P1luLGiBhvnQXYRGI1F9RkwQcP3YQ7sq2HPZEe6FB0zGPz_D9pmWLFQvh7becMm2inX8nOe6MtLVhnbAIB85bqTzSpwp9BBdOUTqVdQ6XL09DUeLTZMitwnoMY10NXGoy-Ay-dV6-jv4qfkn8KPdAC7FsHu4qXvh1OQG9lDwJZ5aGGtks9Yjr5sb1Loqj5ZFbq2X3c-41E5RVm9Ne8fl2_x5QcWcNC2zGW4__BmbMqmFmDKF55xcSXGZlnNS-u34rxtr3mz9tXthmCfIflRRjcUHi7_1qvsPxTeT5tBXfPk13eWAo7k2hYRtw072rUbbdBtF_VMWUYA2pIu44BVG3zXo5RAiWiLzuXqxUi8%3D)
**_ _[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=eca374db5ddc4a6ca171fd25dcd54953&_e=lc1KsNP9tkPkiBU3DXx3eekSCpGJxVqwMHsvPuOIAvZVuMO8570GNB2QXhdBBwdSzUDNCkbjpn3adqgPmYIbcUWQVphLdCBIEBHva1dPmhb7Xwsm1aT8Vb2G0np1HGJH53pSNXh1E_DzvU1l33RVt_t4vUeq9HSoepIhsjZ1yKbaQUOOq-uMgVgzRDJLZ18T1WQNEUIE13rqDhf6KayA2BkLcR-LMCw4VLEg0VjYrJl51dLS66aQ2IanF63CucxksJgva0vPHWmlMq9DoOCI3RfJJG_lv_l5a33W_7BjWuzbTLISnKZQG74bjvwFfqI0idVvK5l-KNjMmGHDm_b4PdBkOyE5GKPTXWS2xHr9ymuMlPuSskPj7LhIc_CjLvtsLb5SjvK-SujEyVweOzWarykY3lJkmXtZzqvjrpIkeClFW0PrM-pjltYWaudVWvxLOzUvMaEX3wqn5bJTtekbaQNUeO-250SAFwP9MAkX86ynp6ETMfKtEDCazmX9stC6BxnjQSMuGdZ96ls3NcLIpfREuNYBWu3lMw7XLYZRsRThoNbTUGpNKdHEtmhZ0vdXLwJyC-NkLBG-8VTT0kZMtm_CgmaVu8nmQawgEs_CE0-bp3zkJMGd60u8MMwnBJ80nKmh7clWT1euAhxtPtwoB5HA2kXIOGr5Hwnl1dfmjWZ7YQ5Wvh4s4f3n0Zz_4ezrBw0MXeHNV86wtVWlXErOq64Ryf9-geCHh_Fr-bCTltm_s6N3kDZligHK2eCEel-FKMqpUk6_LaI6rW_rxvc7UwVcd3H9GSgDx3KZl-n1noo%3D)_
**Here’s the spark:** Recent polls from their own side show a generic Republican trailing by just two points. **With United States Senator Tina Smith retiring, this seat is open for the first time in decades.** Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential race since Nixon in ’72, but the tide’s turning—Trump’s legacy is firing up folks like you, retired patriots who’ve built lives on hard work and faith. We can flip this seat, secure the Republican Senate majority, and give President Trump the muscle to drain the swamp for good.

**I’m running to cut taxes, back our police, secure the border, and defend the values you’ve spent your life upholding—family, faith, and freedom.**

We’re the underdogs, no question. **Minnesota’s been blue since the days of dial-up internet.** But I’ve led missions through worse odds—high-stakes ops where one mistake meant everything.

_**[Now, I need you to join me.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=eca374db5ddc4a6ca171fd25dcd54953&_e=lc1KsNP9tkPkiBU3DXx3eekSCpGJxVqwMHsvPuOIAvZVuMO8570GNB2QXhdBBwdSzUDNCkbjpn3adqgPmYIbcUWQVphLdCBIEBHva1dPmhb7Xwsm1aT8Vb2G0np1HGJH53pSNXh1E_DzvU1l33RVt_t4vUeq9HSoepIhsjZ1yKbaQUOOq-uMgVgzRDJLZ18T1WQNEUIE13rqDhf6KayA2BkLcR-LMCw4VLEg0VjYrJl51dLS66aQ2IanF63CucxksJgva0vPHWmlMq9DoOCI3RfJJG_lv_l5a33W_7BjWuytHyMRzXRb4hAU3fn220L2xcNuDIpoftbwWvqnlEmeXeXCCt6ETpCES--byBJ2oz_AB1GoPbCpWwGRefq1WFbGk1dB__zyper7AOdZF2W5aNpAgwiIcPDXmDJ86K7amE0psU_H_AcZuQBj0MjDdgSfkLnKYj6Nf1lZ35zy2-F94qcN8ODH-SJNEjQB2_9qI-p-FI2YNZQ6eSF_ssdRPllOBUL2ZwUSFyuIDOUM4d3kWt8xY9Suio-OkXHITx9tD6AO7EXevSu2Nii_vNxLdRvgqjL9Qll0QQl09N5H3Y5-0vWdu3zktN1xJEd4orumJK4oD2fjyEfPX_uz6ubb3CI5rWwwAX3VH15KFHv-xDnPs7PrePvu3or_ymP44Z-zbCUr-I_oLj7SOjtM3g9dcWkutQkq3bBpHgIOiAIKOP5IQ8EwxfY2baOBeUZ0HvkjnX0wIOj4A_U1uYZKZagbkT1tghVz8tHiUo8pURg-Lx-qxoIjbCfcKqapwBx-8nRw0rU%3D)**_

clean_body: Democrats have treated Minnesota like their personal fiefdom - but with your help, we can put those days behind us. | Fellow Conservative, Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda. Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back. I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos. Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans. Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe. Here’s the spark: Recent polls from their own side show a generic Republican trailing by just two points. With United States Senator Tina Smith retiring, this seat is open for the first time in decades. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential race since Nixon in ’72, but the tide’s turning—Trump’s legacy is firing up folks like you, retired patriots who’ve built lives on hard work and faith. We can flip this seat, secure the Republican Senate majority, and give President Trump the muscle to drain the swamp for good. I’m running to cut taxes, back our police, secure the border, and defend the values you’ve spent your life upholding—family, faith, and freedom. We’re the underdogs, no question. Minnesota’s been blue since the days of dial-up internet. But I’ve led missions through worse odds—high-stakes ops where one mistake meant everything. Our last fundraising push got us halfway to our goal, but with Q4 filings looming and Flanagan raking in cash from coastal elites, You—retired vets, churchgoers, grandparents who’ve paid your dues—can fuel the ads, the door-knockers, the momentum to shock the system. You’ve got a choice. Delete this and let Democrats keep choking our future. Or stand with a battle-hardened SEAL ready to fight—not with noise, but with the quiet professionalism that wins wars. Help me make it real. Because we built this country on sacrifice and resolve, and we’re not done fighting. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Make a Plan to Vote in the November 4th Election
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100170876.172576.414&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100170876.172576.414&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170876.172576.414&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15838)
#
# **Are You Ready to Vote on Nov. 4th?**
**** Senator Hughes recently hosted a second telephone townhall focused on the upcoming [November 4th election](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170876.172576.414&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15839). **[LISTEN TO THE TELEPHONE TOWNHALL HERE](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170876.172576.414&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15840)** The townhall highlighted how to learn more about what's on your ballot and important details about early voting.
* * *
## **Not Sure Who 's on the Ballot?**
[**View Philadelphia's sample ballot HERE**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170876.172576.414&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15841) [**View Montgomery County's sample ballot HERE**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170876.172576.414&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15842)
* * *
## **Important Dates**
* Election Day is **November 4th**
* Polls are open from 7AM to 8PM
* Deadline to request a mail-in or absentee ballot is **October 28th**
* You can [find your polling location by clicking here](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170876.172576.414&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15843)
* Register online at [https://www.pa.gov/agencies/vote](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170876.172576.414&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15844) or with your county election office
* If you have any questions, call Pennsylvania's voter hotline at **1-877-868-3772**
* If you have any questions or run into issues while voting, call the Philadelphia County Board of Elections at**215-686-3469**

* * *
## **Voting by Mail?**
* You must [apply for your mail-in ballot](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170876.172576.414&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15845) by **October 28th at 5PM**
* The deadline to return your mail-in ballot is **November 4th by 8PM**
* Return your ballot as soon as possible to make sure it is received by November 4th
* You can return your mail-in ballot by mail or at a drop off location
* Philadelphia has drop box and satellite election offices where you can drop off your ballot. [You can find your closest drop off location online.](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170876.172576.414&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15846)
* If you need help finding a drop off location or have questions about your mail in ballot, call our office at **215-879-7777**

**PRO-TIP: Utilize one of the city 's 10 satellite election offices to apply, complete, and return your mail-in ballot all at once. You can find a list of locations [HERE ONLINE](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170876.172576.414&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15832).**
* * *
## **Voting in Person?**
* Figure out where you'll be voting before election day.
* You can [look up your polling place online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170876.172576.414&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15843) or call our office at **215-879-7777** if you need assistance
* Polls will be open on **November 4th from 7AM to 8PM**
* The busiest times to vote are in the morning and evening, so plan ahead or try going at a less busy time
* If this is your first time voting, you must bring a photo or non-photo ID
* If you encounter any problems at the polls, call **1-877-868-3772**. The PA Department of State will be able to answer your questions and help with any issues.

* * *
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes

---

name: Katie Porter
subject: Can you spot these common political email scams?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40313%2E3422442%2E51_diD)
Peter,
You’ve probably seen them: political emails that try to shame or scare you into donating.
As a consumer protection attorney, I hate these scammy tactics. Let me break down some of the most common ones, so you can spot the BS (and share the knowledge with your friends and loved ones).
1. “We need 5,238 donors from YOUR zip code.” This is fake. Donations from different parts of the state or country can signal support, but campaigns aren’t doing crazy math like this to meet goals or deadlines.

2. “Donate $5 today and it will be triple matched.” There’s no mysterious fairy matching donations. Just look at how the match “offers” get higher and higher seemingly randomly the more they want you to donate.

3. “Warning: Payment incomplete.” These are the worst. There’s no excuse for campaigns misleading Americans into thinking they’ve missed a bill.

Our campaign has fundraising goals and timelines to keep ourselves on track to raise what we need to win next year and evaluate the volume of voter contact we can pay for.
Because I reject all donations from corporations and lobbyists, the only way this campaign hits its targets is by folks like you chipping in.
**[So please, I’m making a 100% BS-free ask. Will you donate $5 or whatever you can to help us keep our fundraising on track and scale our campaign across the Golden State?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251025_1_ak.CnxXqP&refcode=em20251025-40313&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40313%2E3422442%2E51_diD)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251025_1_ak.CnxXqP&refcode=em20251025-40313&t=22&akid=40313%2E3422442%2E51_diD)
More soon,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251025-40313&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40313_3422442_51_diD&akid=40313%2E3422442%2E51_diD)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40313&t=24&akid=40313%2E3422442%2E51_diD)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40313)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40313&t=25&akid=40313%2E3422442%2E51_diD)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026

Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Jacob Carrel, AOTL
subject: We need to be ready for whatever happens next
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This case has enormous consequences for the future of a fair democracy.
|
---

Peter,
The other day, I was in the courtroom as the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in a case that will determine so much about the future of our democracy.
That’s no exaggeration. The Supreme Court is scrutinizing a map Louisiana drew, which conservative activists are claiming is racially gerrymandered — even though it was drawn to fix districts that multiple federal courts determined likely violated the Voting Rights Act. At the heart of this case is Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act (VRA), the provision that safeguards people of color’s ability to vote for candidates that represent them — and one of the only major parts of the VRA still in effect after the Supreme Court significantly weakened the landmark law in 2013. The Voting Rights Act is the crown jewel of civil rights legislation, and Section 2 is the skeleton key that unlocks fair maps for millions of Americans.
And if anti-democracy forces get their way, the Voting Rights Act could be forever gutted through this case.
**All On The Line must be prepared for every possible outcome and stay ready to respond on the ground — whether new maps need to be drawn or voters need to be educated about what’s next.[YOU can equip us with the necessary resources and tools to organize, make voters’ voices heard, and fight for fairness in democracy. clean_body: This case has enormous consequences for the future of a fair democracy. | Peter, The other day, I was in the courtroom as the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in a case that will determine so much about the future of our democracy. That’s no exaggeration. The Supreme Court is scrutinizing a map Louisiana drew, which conservative activists are claiming is racially gerrymandered — even though it was drawn to fix districts that multiple federal courts determined likely violated the Voting Rights Act. At the heart of this case is Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act (VRA), the provision that safeguards people of color’s ability to vote for candidates that represent them — and one of the only major parts of the VRA still in effect after the Supreme Court significantly weakened the landmark law in 2013. The Voting Rights Act is the crown jewel of civil rights legislation, and Section 2 is the skeleton key that unlocks fair maps for millions of Americans. And if anti-democracy forces get their way, the Voting Rights Act could be forever gutted through this case. All On The Line must be prepared for every possible outcome and stay ready to respond on the ground — whether new maps need to be drawn or voters need to be educated about what’s next.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, is part of a legal effort arguing in front of the Supreme Court to save the VRA, what many believe to be the most effective civil rights statute in our nation’s history. It is deeply worrying to consider what our democracy might look like without it. Meanwhile, All On The Line is also laser-focused on pushing back on the seemingly never-ending attempts to rig maps ahead of the 2026 midterms — working around the clock in states like Ohio, Indiana, and Missouri. Democracy’s opponents are fighting on all fronts, and so we have to fight just as fiercely. We can’t just hope for the best — not when it comes to the Voting Rights Act, and not when it comes to state gerrymanders. We must be ready to respond. = Thanks so much, Jacob Carrel Deputy Director of Litigation and Policy All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. body:
Demand workers earn a living wage... | | |
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_si4nyLnnzT7k-NaWVKlCUL5lGovB8xtSMOOQxWcQXurIfuU5eOUWMR4fb9soe7d2k-lF6zc9OC196RpDnaX_tBq8RcaZlo490pJ0yRVSCJjvs5N_c5N1kxb_wNn1kgqekOo0FVDv3lLfRgF6Nmn-DQttus8C4ARAvr1B6Ezi2x7QfBTEEdYyh8Af70giTb3z6ny65n4s3oCU55or-nVnBr1lRUZ-t4zpVBZlyaJ4BMFrfzie-NoQ67__cfTSKgPrST4KTYKycvy2kczi2a9DZpUP-h-8axDK7MXCtrMeQ4KXLWbevPq6ljkmZ-__fe0vxBa6dFgkt7juGmhnUeuPjaI-X1xxkvtp8icLXLTMXBTUX9qz82irVh55HPomFV7Wth763DOp8PMEXtRPdbQ8jxWd0aQq1D_sX75Ok0XW3b1m7S2ozVGoHp4R92qHAbWQR339c6sHCiLiV6EH-pD-igR8T-YBlSOeUDm09eAyNupc6IuExcg-khhvezjdX8oTcZ2-lYQ3ISvlxyafNHSei/4l1/B9amJa1fRn6h45ZEbquorg/h0/h001.OWGhfLU9C-UOI4q8szc9sQipiCSjGtp9EvbI2T9HmgM)Peter, For decades, working Americans have heard that prosperity “trickles down” from the top. But it doesn’t - it never has. Wages have stagnated while the cost of living has soared, leaving millions of people working full-time and still unable to afford rent, groceries, or child care. The federal minimum wage has been stuck at $7.25 an hour since 2009. That’s less than $16,000 a year for someone working full time - not even enough to keep a single person above the poverty line in most states, let alone a family. Meanwhile, corporate profits and CEO pay have exploded. **The time is now. We urge Congress to raise the federal minimum wage to reflect the real cost of living and to reject trickle-down lies and build a fairer economy for everyone.** [**Add your name to demand that Congress raise the wage, rebuild the middle class, and ensure that hard work truly pays off.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_si4nyLnnzT7k-NaWVKlCUL5lGovB8xtSMOOQxWcQXurIfuU5eOUWMR4fb9soe7d2k-lF6zc9OC196RpDnaX_tBq8RcaZlo490pJ0yRVSCJjvs5N_c5N1kxb_wNn1kgqekOo0FVDv3lLfRgF6Nmn-DQttus8C4ARAvr1B6Ezi2x7QfBTEEdYyh8Af70giTb3z6ny65n4s3oCU55or-nVnBr1lRUZ-t4zpVBZlyaJ4BMFrfzie-NoQ67__cfTSKgPrST4KTYKycvy2kczi2a9DZ6mg9NJrQQD38BwrgsHTxnxJ7uXDAxsxLV2mzZmXyJ9G0vQcKK7nDfEFoEglFMCL6E8Y1xKRXAW26AWo5UgQnnhNBFPhzOuAiFugfK0ohYWRKzsaQ9K_-dGIjo9v2_BFutmrMbiRmldtphROxfCIs_QWwII95E3v8l3oHG4RAUClxNVDSfkr6ZZT4a0xN9onkTQ0GPZITfSlaMgZl4DCJJRiYEJtVyrrq3BhC9SA9-x5Z3NzFtCsQTyJ8Glf4_gSD/4l1/B9amJa1fRn6h45ZEbquorg/h1/h001.xUtU2Plhr3NzPJF180p1Et1f_bO8Ra0L0YraNL3G1NM) [Sign On](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_si4nyLnnzT7k-NaWVKlCUL5lGovB8xtSMOOQxWcQXurIfuU5eOUWMR4fb9soe7d2k-lF6zc9OC196RpDnaX_tBq8RcaZlo490pJ0yRVSCJjvs5N_c5N1kxb_wNn1kgqekOo0FVDv3lLfRgF6Nmn-DQttus8C4ARAvr1B6Ezi2x7QfBTEEdYyh8Af70giTb3z6ny65n4s3oCU55or-nVnBr1lRUZ-t4zpVBZlyaJ4BMFrfzie-NoQ67__cfTSKgPrST4KTYKycvy2kczi2a9DZd6XronblsnFzd1u322Q9WmSmek9Oe-euVuwg513D5x4YUU968gNJwQ-nfgDq_d0RtbkbGIA4GF3oKqKimaldFS4OENaHpxqlQtaPFOdgimS02EgH1GLQ8MSBiHDt4wkdkZFntxVDFvEovFeV8o7d7pt0_nKgK4pEScUEALMinYmkcoI_FiZnx4owqz0-xTmpJo15zy1bh_h3-2oYqFZaIn0DuvMz5_O5ex6c50Wr6kJ5dfUH7h3tbmP4QoRFKmEr/4l1/B9amJa1fRn6h45ZEbquorg/h2/h001.TgZF90LjEbytr46_-ZDy_ebX1l0y0QNUxtrr9jZNy9w) Raising the minimum wage isn’t just about fairness - it’s about building a stronger, more stable economy. When workers earn more, they spend more in their communities, supporting small businesses and driving local growth. Studies consistently show that moderate wage increases boost employment and reduce reliance on public assistance. A higher minimum wage also honors the dignity of work. No one should have to work two or three jobs just to survive in the richest nation on Earth. **It is about time Congress stood up for us, the workers that keep this country running.** [**Sign this petition now - raise the minimum wage for working people.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_si4nyLnnzT7k-NaWVKlCUL5lGovB8xtSMOOQxWcQXurIfuU5eOUWMR4fb9soe7d2k-lF6zc9OC196RpDnaX_tBq8RcaZlo490pJ0yRVSCJjvs5N_c5N1kxb_wNn1kgqekOo0FVDv3lLfRgF6Nmn-DQttus8C4ARAvr1B6Ezi2x7QfBTEEdYyh8Af70giTb3z6ny65n4s3oCU55or-nVnBr1lRUZ-t4zpVBZlyaJ4BMFrfzie-NoQ67__cfTSKgPrST4KTYKycvy2kczi2a9DZYz_VjxRxzQoqWJ4r1YHOcjQJRg6bl-IuV4h4fJB1ZnEAq9xBgFViJY-EYNeNcLVp1VmTCmNL9CXdMmp5FRSPI8eRE7ZHG0j5VB_ktIyYP1NyEFcLK9PtXkrM8B7KOiTQLfWYuXTS3K8nKb2Oa8ytRUbk4RDnWW3UhO-V3Gn--9F50bNjH3zCJmuoJm54HOjjsfJJ4sOJuHJtfYxiplv7y-94LlW2-iw-hM_YtuHP8Fqso6pMojNyL_UjLsDzBPnP/4l1/B9amJa1fRn6h45ZEbquorg/h3/h001.FB-3qLq7Jn9JMVgRBVfSDfcjgam0RweSBJTUZ8xJOCI) Thanks for your support.

clean_body: Demand workers earn a living wage... | | | , For decades, working Americans have heard that prosperity “trickles down” from the top. But it doesn’t - it never has. Wages have stagnated while the cost of living has soared, leaving millions of people working full-time and still unable to afford rent, groceries, or child care. The federal minimum wage has been stuck at $7.25 an hour since 2009. That’s less than $16,000 a year for someone working full time - not even enough to keep a single person above the poverty line in most states, let alone a family. Meanwhile, corporate profits and CEO pay have exploded. The time is now. We urge Congress to raise the federal minimum wage to reflect the real cost of living and to reject trickle-down lies and build a fairer economy for everyone. Raising the minimum wage isn’t just about fairness - it’s about building a stronger, more stable economy. When workers earn more, they spend more in their communities, supporting small businesses and driving local growth. Studies consistently show that moderate wage increases boost employment and reduce reliance on public assistance. A higher minimum wage also honors the dignity of work. No one should have to work two or three jobs just to survive in the richest nation on Earth. It is about time Congress stood up for us, the workers that keep this country running. Thanks for your support. \- Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. Contributions or gifts to Local Democracy Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . Trump wants to DISMANTLE USPS!?!
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20251025_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=21598%2E878179%2ECMgv-3) **Millions of Americans rely on the USPS for bills, Social Security checks, medication, mail-in ballots, and more — _but Trump doesn’t care._**

We can’t let him PRIVATIZE and DESTROY it — but we NEED your help!

[**As a top grassroots Democrat, will you sign our petition to stand with the USPS? We need 150 signatures from your state today! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20251025_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21598%2E878179%2ECMgv-3) | [ADD MY NAME: STAND WITH YOUR LOCAL USPS OFFICE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20251025_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21598%2E878179%2ECMgv-3)

**FACT #1:** Donald Trump has been foaming at the mouth to PRIVATIZE and DESTROY the U.S. Postal Service as we know it!

**FACT #2:** The USPS recently confirmed that more than 10,000+ postal workers will be laid off — _**your local post office could be next!**_

**FACT #3:** This is Trump’s latest attack on YOUR right to vote — he’s going after the USPS and mail-in ballots because he wants to RIG the 2026 election!

[**THAT’S WHY WE NEED A SURGE OF 150 TOP DEMOCRATS TO STAND WITH USPS: Add your name by MIDNIGHT and defend your local Post Office from MAGA destruction! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20251025_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=21598%2E878179%2ECMgv-3)

name: Team Schrier
subject: The Supreme Court is about to weaken our right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Our democracy is under attack [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117996552/578310765/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ1NGRjNi1kMGIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vc-7sRTeNqacEcJT_75rduaHSB4Qb3GkwewOCLq3Yrc=&emci=488e001d-16b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=11d54dc6-d0b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15820338)
---
There's no other way to say it, Peter: Right now, our democracy is under attack.

The Supreme Court, packed with Republicans by Donald Trump, is preparing to hand down a ruling that could gut the _Voting Rights Act,_ one of the most important laws protecting Americans' right to vote.

This time, they're targeting Section 2, **which prevents states from drawing maps that dilute the power of already disenfranchised voters.** That means they want to make gerrymandering legal–weakening millions of voices at the ballot box.

What's supposed to be a court that checks power is giving Trump and his allies a blank check to do their worst to our democracy. This isn't a theory or abstract; it's happening right now, in real-time.

Congress needs to step up and pass the _John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act_ to give our democracy the tools to protect every American's right to vote. Kim fought hard to pass this bill in the House, and now it's time to make sure it becomes law. When people can't vote, democracy stops working. We have to act now—before it's too late.

[**Add your name to stand up for our democracy and urge Congress to defend the right to vote.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117996556/578310769/2015412156?ms=em25_251025_vrapet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em25_251025_vrapet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em25_251025_vrapet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251025_vrapet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=T+VZ8N2x2Aif9xOaUdIv+ggpXjHKVIt3d2NRT932jhoP6RWgWeBhvnULqOg9iUtTP1sR9ZrLq7KGF6O5scyHsZFkVeKvxGs6ilASByyfLN9tWUKvZ6Is+GGlcH6jbVUunYxtJNAG1iwKSoMCY2mnLY+JSYU7Yq0GkwCAqFwoV6M=&refcode2=11d54dc6-d0b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ1NGRjNi1kMGIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vc-7sRTeNqacEcJT_75rduaHSB4Qb3GkwewOCLq3Yrc=&emci=488e001d-16b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=11d54dc6-d0b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15820338) [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117996557/578310773/2015412156?ms=em25_251025_vrapet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em25_251025_vrapet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em25_251025_vrapet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251025_vrapet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=T+VZ8N2x2Aif9xOaUdIv+ggpXjHKVIt3d2NRT932jhoP6RWgWeBhvnULqOg9iUtTP1sR9ZrLq7KGF6O5scyHsZFkVeKvxGs6ilASByyfLN9tWUKvZ6Is+GGlcH6jbVUunYxtJNAG1iwKSoMCY2mnLY+JSYU7Yq0GkwCAqFwoV6M=&refcode2=11d54dc6-d0b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ1NGRjNi1kMGIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vc-7sRTeNqacEcJT_75rduaHSB4Qb3GkwewOCLq3Yrc=&emci=488e001d-16b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=11d54dc6-d0b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15820338) Thank you,

clean_body: Our democracy is under attack There's no other way to say it, Peter: Right now, our democracy is under attack. The Supreme Court, packed with Republicans by Donald Trump, is preparing to hand down a ruling that could gut the Voting Rights Act, one of the most important laws protecting Americans' right to vote. This time, they're targeting Section 2, which prevents states from drawing maps that dilute the power of already disenfranchised voters. That means they want to make gerrymandering legal–weakening millions of voices at the ballot box. What's supposed to be a court that checks power is giving Trump and his allies a blank check to do their worst to our democracy. This isn't a theory or abstract; it's happening right now, in real-time. Congress needs to step up and pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act to give our democracy the tools to protect every American's right to vote. Kim fought hard to pass this bill in the House, and now it's time to make sure it becomes law. When people can't vote, democracy stops working. We have to act now—before it's too late. Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

The plan Bannon is referring to likely hinges on MAGA seizing control over Pennsylvania's Supreme Court on November 4th.
If MAGA succeeds in toppling the 3 Democrats on the court, Trump will control the court that decides how elections are run in the most important swing state in America, allowing him rig the upcoming '28 election in his favor--banning mail-in voting, invalidating Democratic ballots, and extreme suppression laws.

name: AOC
subject: Community defense.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
If they want to be criminals that use blunt force, we have to be good Samaritans.
#
So I was seeing some of the footage on Wednesday of the community coming to defend itself when ICE tried to plow into Canal Street and nab up a bunch of people.
**I want to describe why this is important, and how it disrupts what ICE is doing in a very real way.**
It is important to note that what ICE is doing is illegal, in many different ways.
And before you accuse me of being one of those Democrats that just says, “Oh, they can’t do that, it’s illegal,” I want to describe why that’s relevant:
Knowing that it’s illegal, ICE and all of these agencies know that _they are likely not going to be backed up._ In fact, that kind of bore itself out on Wednesday.
ICE had done a bunch of arrests — and they needed people to feel like they were arresting a bunch of people — but they ended up releasing a lot of them, because they know they don’t have a leg to stand on.
They rely on the show of force, on us being afraid, because they don’t have anyone backing them up.
And the reason that’s important, is because they know this is illegal, the tactic that they rely on is just smash and grab — see what you can get away with.
What they do is just round people up, deport people, and even if the judge says that they can’t do that, they just say, “Well too late, we already sent them out and that’s it.”
Use of force. Blunt instrument.
So if they want to be criminals that are using blunt force, and don’t want to be held accountable to the law, **we have to be good Samaritans.**
Because if the law is not something that they are going to respond to, what they will respond to is literally not being able to complete the illegal behavior.
That means community defense.
We can’t allow people to commit crimes and break the law in public. We have to defend each other.
If you notice, they will issue a lot of threats. **The Acting Director of ICE at one point threatened to lock me up.**
The best response you can do? Show up for one another. Blow the whistle. Record any illegal behavior.
I’m not scared of you. We are not scared of you. Because we know you are not legitimate.
Governance requires the consent of the governed. And when people start not complying en masse, then they are not able to get away with it.
We can’t wait for them to commit a crime, and then for a judge to say that was illegal. We have to stop the crime in the act.
So when you see them wearing masks, and acting like unidentified thugs, how can you separate that from someone who is just trying to kidnap and assault a person?
You can’t. They have chosen to make themselves unidentifiable.
So if someone is going to come in and try to snatch up my neighbor with some Party City vest that they bought, I’m not going to let that happen. Are you going to let that happen?
**Hell no. We need to have order.**
And they are the pinnacle of disorder and disruption.
That is why it is important that we have a mass movement, our collective agreements, social contracts.
Yes we have to fight institutionally, but we also need to look out for one another.
We will not be afraid — because that’s what they want.
And we do not have to comply with illegal activity — **even if that illegal activity is coming from the President of the United States.**
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251025.dViL6L&refcode=em20251025-10062-P_FND_RES_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10062%2E2526796%2EXd4DpC)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251025.dViL6L&refcode=em20251025-10062-P_FND_RES_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10062%2E2526796%2EXd4DpC)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251025?refcode=em20251025-10062-P_FND_RES_CTR&t=21&refcode2=10062_2526796_Xd4DpC&akid=10062%2E2526796%2EXd4DpC)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251025-10062-P_FND_RES_CTR&t=22&akid=10062%2E2526796%2EXd4DpC)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=10062%2E2526796%2EXd4DpC) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=10062%2E2526796%2EXd4DpC) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=10062%2E2526796%2EXd4DpC) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=26&akid=10062%2E2526796%2EXd4DpC)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Nellie Pou
subject: Early voting has started
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Hi friend,

Early voting is officially open in New Jersey. It’s time to hit the polls and officially cast our vote for Mikie Sherrill and Democratic candidates up and down the ballot.

This election will decide who stands up for our values, protects our rights, and fights for working families. Mikie Sherrill is the leader we need to lower costs across New Jersey and protect our state from extremists and far-right special interests. Every single vote matters.

You can find your early voting location and hours here: [https://nj.gov/state/elections/vote-early-voting.shtml]

👉 VOTE TODAY [https://nj.gov/state/elections/vote-early-voting.shtml]

Do not wait until Election Day. Vote early, bring a friend, and let’s make our voices heard loud and clear.

Thank you,

Nellie
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Go back to Haiti? I’m from Jamaica & this isn’t the first time the so-called tolerant Left has viciously attacked my background
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=330ede7540ee4a969aed60d5156dbb31&_e=X2LAj0t_J3MxjPesasZynx_1XJu5s9D2aFPMjHQzGMeLe_UmtwLzkwlZf4LqehdiFN8W2tNNU0KeFDe1MjXlFipOJjCQyvCKoiPDeb9NzAnL294tm6fDsBk4beSYrWdUu9pmeEFxXvjI1UaNE_IBG30bLapf_1LWG12kAx8uBhbPv10CulaR61MSgockauQUSd5-4_KPbalnnoSd5BiidHV_nxpRl_o2wjdd4jbZKMLMiwPrEk-ijN1ij2hqiWola3YLdy2xr6xhmqFeXHfb-rxJO0GTWQZY0VlrH1s4siccb2j5PrezZmtTWf5LZ7Ddb81mGdk-657kigL0J8PwW8wbmwJ6V4DYel1upjCiRmpR2of8005KF54foadKkBPOy0GKveJeE8kX2p64m75IB77Z74TR0LQtNJhfa-T_SDlfeCFTLWmgfLuF1PIz_P4u-_3FlnPXetDRKNb0F-bQ36A7NJaYbBXUK0Vmxz2sLQ4IFTlOxVl13p_RH9HP8H8P30aSJwW8yvgyQa65ruvGJC5yEgqv1zRVJHjnJHnS2Y1VqDLWRJUdWapuZixASj1kvwYFbZYM2m6TFXE_xd4LtRFMtWlpbeGHCm04uewLS96RcrgCxxr9Hh3rUBbxxgiK3Q250dZaUJY_csqT9Cbg3gTVpKFLYXndrNx_bZ6qMOE6Nb17RuTzo-xgHBn3EJbMkQZdngClwRrFYtOetYiyx_ggcWJCxvI-jOpBcybhrSyZ00T-FuJEdigJXg9napfQbDFlDGIM84bpZN1g5MZqGraSJhN8wpFm9gsbnaJn_CstQFhVcxzCtM8wXPoQhpu-oqB8Sns9zNtu8Q3X0r5oEh8IJej5eAT9yF2cTOe3DHk-P_1E_RMxuDaM6nfJT2tuJEe8APyR21cbwx-8WCeR5Q%3D%3D)"Go back to Haiti."
Peter - I've been called names no one should ever hear, and I've watched people hold racist signs meant to shame me. And because I have an R next to my name, few care.
But I am no victim. Words won't break me, and they won't stop this campaign.
We are going to win.
The so-called tolerant Left can't fathom for even a second that a black conservative woman could become Governor in the former capital of the Confederacy.

I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[ That’s why I’m reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=330ede7540ee4a969aed60d5156dbb31&_e=X2LAj0t_J3MxjPesasZynx_1XJu5s9D2aFPMjHQzGMeLe_UmtwLzkwlZf4Lqehdii0w1Dlw6eCwZ_Kv7EKm9ZhMhHv7pwQQexGZfwTkhypm6Ki-6TQURUWcC8W6yv5QJKzYLEfmMHmwiNZvtD_XQf9GnwN2TIQ90yRVrqrRFW1JtcoNIliNOTHuuXVSrRmiYamZhSd56WV7AA1SbOFCVxfMAIAbnty4CSGFLnBacyoxd8XpaJwNPMqKmBTpX4vbrmw1S6Ds_qiQhJdqqzKdEjk6TaHWt1hIBEqnHnrxONaugwXc-NBmtlzzeFJErroL4uXM99eg4kMa8jNu3flx8yj50Jam8F2iG5t42paaH20p0GByuG8oZpn82-9i_W77YcG7K6huUW8ti-DKB45P0ODvcIg2Unzy8SwEU-Jjw1gbNXQJGN2_v94mzuIkx-r81_dDXEdnB_4gv-tKiEGT_8r0JIs42WXeg53bXXTNl5FyuQNNP-Lr4e_69jk5GlQL0wNicO4SeQRI0GAI_mkYUtxkNy69uGK28ozZPCZFcm-vcTOJXyuRO56PR7Jl-ghgrOOzoamRHJptq7afDvHVNS0Ag9JS51McLCCXFlvqgCX-WofPeP3dwp0FoXZO9nsxVrtcpXC7fVuNPx7CYMfdmfLZu3Hdru1FCaLKPB6bPkeNoJybLWFfc0nZshZysOChCcd5N71YwAS1QYQeGxByQqdUc_WYV7CtNjPXMOXDJ2Pa22CEZ52xaPh1iMZ0nYEXAr4SgVsA4HePs47nIM0rezpZ_BrR3szCwiTuCvJsKuKETJJouuupHKiXwd1D-LmJd3H6sNORm9EAfUSzSvxUk8Q%3D%3D)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.[LEND A HAND

clean_body: "Go back to Haiti." Peter - I've been called names no one should ever hear, and I've watched people hold racist signs meant to shame me. And because I have an R next to my name, few care. But I am no victim. Words won't break me, and they won't stop this campaign. We are going to win. The so-called tolerant Left can't fathom for even a second that a black conservative woman could become Governor in the former capital of the Confederacy. We've seen this before - and we aren't going to back down now. Our race is tied and we are in the CRITICAL final weeks of this campaign. My opponent is still raising millions of dollars and outspending us every single day. thought Democrats were supposed to love everyone, but this campaign has exposed their hatred for anyone who dares to think differently. And just to be clear, I'm originally from Jamaica. But I have nowhere to go back to -- because America is my HOME! I've worn the uniform to protect our country, and I won't let the hateful Left stop me from fighting for the land that I love. Earle-Sears | . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. name: Alaskans for Nick Begich
subject: Speaker Johnson—or Speaker Jeffries? It comes down to Alaska.
body:
A win preserves Alaska’s wins. Early help decides it. | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friend,

Here’s the blunt truth: **our race may decide the next Speaker.** Do we keep Speaker Johnson and an America First majority or hand Alaska’s future to New York Democrat Hakeem Jeffries?

National Democrats are already targeting Alaska with outside cash. They know if they flip **this seat** , they can reverse Alaska’s successes. We can’t let that happen.

I’m asking you to invest **now** so we build the firewall Alaska and America needs.
* **$25** helps us reach targeted swing voters
* **$50** powers early digital and text outreach
* **$100+** locks in crucial ad buys and voter ID

Chip in: [**$25**](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=3263ba7046&e=6679001ba0) | [**$50**](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=03888e4153&e=6679001ba0) | [**$100**](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=c774b615fa&e=6679001ba0) | [**Other**](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=22568e72a5&e=6679001ba0)
I ran to put Alaska first: unlocking our resources, defending our way of life, and standing up to the D.C. special-interest machine. The other side wants to shut down Alaska’s opportunity and rubber-stamp a radical socialist agenda. Not on my watch.

Early money is the difference between playing defense and setting the terms of this race. Let’s set the terms.
Stand with me today—**$25, $50, $100 or more** —and let’s keep the gavel out of Jeffries’ hands.

» [D](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=e4eb175cee&e=6679001ba0)[ONATE](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=cf5b6c9f4d&e=6679001ba0)

For Alaska,
.

P.S. Every day we wait, the D.C. machine gets louder. Let’s end that—**give now** to protect the majority.

» [R](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=1ab8c45e0c&e=6679001ba0)[USH A DONATION](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=c2c39e15bf&e=6679001ba0)

name: General Flynn
subject: Our Fight for America Is Just Beginning
body:
| | | | | [ View in browser](https://7bnf5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/mr/sh/7nVTPdZCTJDXPII8DUMpiBCEjvj205U/nIYNSmXF8Ub_)
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
# **October 25th**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://7bnf5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/7nVU1aA2nfsTSz8RGi5AzluOYZOyvEi/PtWgu0Fa5Kk8)
---
We are now about eight months from the 250th anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence, which gave birth to our nation. The technical term for our nation’s 250th birthday is our “semi-quincentennial,” or half of five centuries. Many have observed that today America’s period of ascendency is over, and its decline is obvious and inevitable. They certainly could make a good case that as a nation that we are in decline.

### **The Hard Facts**

Our national government just passed the point where our stated debt has exceeded $38 trillion, and that is just a fraction of all of the commitments our nation has made to spend money we do not have. We live in a country where half of American adults pay no federal income tax, and yet demand more and more benefits. We are reaching the point warned of, that “a democracy can only exist until the voters discover that they can vote themselves largess from the public treasury. From that moment on, the majority always votes for the candidates promising the most benefits.” That excessive spending is then followed by dictatorship.
The top 1 percent of earners (earning over $650,000 annually) pay about 40 percent of all federal income tax. We have the highest disparity of wealth in the history of our country as well as the developed world. The top 1 percent own 31 percent of the privately held wealth, while the bottom half own only 2.5 percent. America has about 905 billionaires, worth almost $8 trillion, or 5 percent of the nation’s privately held wealth.
We have about one-quarter of children are growing up in single family homes, and over half of black children in this condition. Most children can gorge on pornography almost at will. Child abuse and child trafficking are rampant. Half of marriages end in divorce. Off- year elections generate pitiful levels of participation. Church attendance is down considerably. We have the highest incarceration rates in the world. Young adults graduate college with huge personal, nondischargeable debt, with degrees that prepare them for jobs that don’t exist. Robotics and Artificial Intelligence threaten the jobs which do exist. America is flirting with war in at least three theatres of the world — Eastern Europe, the Middle East, and South America. There appears to be an establishment that controls the direction of the nation, regardless of what the people want, or who they elect. And the list of bad news goes on and on.

name: Jason Crow
subject: Washington is broken

body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
I'll admit it, team: Washington is broken.

There are too many politicians who prioritize their stock portfolios over the people they serve. Enriching themselves while American families are putting in overtime to make ends meet — it’s not right.

That's why I introduced the End Dark Money Act to fight corruption and crack down on dark money influencing U.S. elections, and it's why I’m fighting to help elect true servant leaders to Congress in 2026.

And I’m the only Colorado member of Congress to support the following:

➡️ Ban elected officials from stock trading

➡️ No corporate PAC campaign contributions

➡️ Crack down on dark money

Your support helps us to elevate the leaders who will stand up to dark money and reject corruption. Will you make a contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-oct25]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-oct25]

The power of our offices is great and it should not be used for personal gain. I’ve never taken a cent from corporate PACs or special interests, and I’m not going to start now. I’m proud to fight for the everyday people I’ve sworn to serve.

Thanks for standing with me,

Jason

It's Janelle Stelson. There's an old saying that goes something like this: When we are walking with heavy bags, we wish someone would help us and keep us safe. I know I do. It is part of being in a community where we look out for each other, and I value that. Meanwhile, Congressman Scott Perry is only looking out for himself and his agenda, and he is bought and paid for by other extremists in his party. We deserve a leader we can trust to help us lift what’s heavy. We deserve someone who cares for their neighbors and puts them first. That is not what we will ever get from Scott Perry, and 7 terms of selling us out in Congress is more than enough. **[Who do you trust to help you? If you want me looking out for you in Congress, please consider chipping in to our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117997750/578315465/609406852?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_102525_HeavyBags_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWU3YWY3ZWItZDZiMS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=coOqkveCacL87iPbnaOzN-keq4_NUAUpiO-28Vo4iBM=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

name: Letitia James
subject: This morning I was arraigned on baseless charges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Austin Davis
body:
Donate now to help me keep fighting for our shared values.

Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XrGKMtCcbE2djJaqLq6C9g2?unsubscribedata=8r4TjpadAl%2FmbH5k%2FhQWyS%2FsmoYwWrdpmfvuhKh9THDv9LWjPCwpwpNv0qppa7G31iErBx%2BFbxvmcHeIWgFVEcOTHKR6cLdssxfIGKVMyaJa7bBcN8Wjrj9ei9luOLa%2BpH27j6SDJZUdsaxWlO64fOq27gTaEKipQxwQZNHydDVxfcQJxjeplto32NosS235alVnQJT9zQJtpyN%2BnN9D8t9P%2BAcfHtHu7Q7yOEvgE%2BE8dH62%2BrW1pcV0bIS7gi7e2F%2FkD366jNRT61%2FK9DCU3AuqiDuAp9MzC%2BTRQJLxlPRmd2uizXM9ODk84%2B0UfjbC1HlD4BphwNaZsRWO%2BZ6rC5fSiDpv0JCprnWvMpGJfK%2Fee7SXSD9IpteBPlH5zD0yYhyJ9jiY7yh5enkcT7mAYInrZ36lagLtKWD6gcAJSWucZY1QSrTiBd5g3Rgzp%2B9D)
---
| | Peter, this morning, I walked into court to be arraigned for a baseless indictment — driven by politics, not justice or facts. **Let me be clear:** these charges are baseless. I am being targeted by Donald Trump and his allies for one simple reason — because I had the courage to hold him accountable for fraud, and for standing up to his destructive MAGA policies. And while they think this will stop me, I refuse to back down. **[They’re trying to silence me with this politically motivated indictment. I am fearless in this moment, but I need you to stand with me now to defend the truth and continue our fight for New York. Will you donate to my campaign and PA Lt. Gov. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I’m frustrated folks, and I bet you are too.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
So here's my promise to you: In this unprecedented and critical moment, we’re doing everything we can to fight back.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117997861/578315615/1435897075?refcode=email_102525_promise-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjdhZjdlYi1kNmIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UkyLQRhWW5lOlwhRQy5bLrY3IsfZtSwHgp--50f6p8=&emci=f5766ef9-a4ae-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a27af7eb-d6b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=7280715) Folks, we’ve been talking with folks all across Colorado – at town halls, at community events, and as we go about our days – and one thing is abundantly clear: People are just as frustrated as I am, and I bet you are too. **Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress have gutted Medicaid and SNAP, they’re wreaking havoc on our economy with reckless tariff-taxes, and their ridiculous shutdown is threatening critical services that so many Coloradans rely on.** Look, the people of Colorado sent me to Washington to stand up for you and deliver real results. **So this is my promise to you: In this unprecedented and critical moment, we’re doing everything we can to fight back.** We’re challenging Trump and extreme Republicans’ radical plans — like their plan to sell off millions of acres of Colorado’s public land — and making sure everyone understands the pain they’re causing. We’ll continue to do everything in our power to block their extreme agenda and defend working families. But we can’t do this alone. **We need to be united and create a massive grassroots effort to call out Trump’s reckless decisions and stop him from inflicting even more damage on our country.** **[So today, I’m coming to you. name: Tobias Read
subject: “Like living in hell”: President Trump says Portland will be next city to see National Guard on streets
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251025em-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251025em-portland-pet-rs]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
After weeks of attacking our state, President Trump ordered troops to Portland.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251025em-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251025em-portland-pet-rs]
In the weeks leading up to this decision, he has stood in the Oval Office and called Portland “like living in hell.” He has even attacked our neighbors as “paid terrorists.”
The Portland I know is a beautiful, vibrant, and resilient city. It’s a place where families build their futures, where communities come together, and where people stand up for justice.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251025em-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251025em-portland-pet-rs]
Like many other major cities across the country, Portland has faced its share of challenges. Denying this doesn’t help move Portland and Oregon forward.
At the same time, Portland is a city worth supporting — not demonizing.
Let me be clear: we do not need President Trump’s troops in Oregon. And his threats have nothing to do with protecting Oregonians. We do not need fear-mongering from Washington. What we need is support for our communities, respect for our rights, and pride in all that makes Portland strong.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me: Add your name today to say you love Portland and you reject President Trump’s hateful, divisive rhetoric. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
ADD YOUR NAME: I ♥️ PORTLAND [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
Oregon will always rise to meet the moment. And no matter what threats come from Washington, we will stand together, protect our communities, and defend our state’s values.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251025em-portland-pet-rs]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
