clean_body: [] Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read. After weeks of attacking our state, President Trump ordered troops to Portland. [] In the weeks leading up to this decision, he has stood in the Oval Office and called Portland “like living in hell.” He has even attacked our neighbors as “paid terrorists.” The Portland I know is a beautiful, vibrant, and resilient city. It’s a place where families build their futures, where communities come together, and where people stand up for justice. [] Like many other major cities across the country, Portland has faced its share of challenges. Denying this doesn’t help move Portland and Oregon forward. At the same time, Portland is a city worth supporting — not demonizing. Let me be clear: we do not need President Trump’s troops in Oregon. And his threats have nothing to do with protecting Oregonians. We do not need fear-mongering from Washington. What we need is support for our communities, respect for our rights, and pride in all that makes Portland strong. That’s why I’m asking you to join me: Add your name today to say you love Portland and you reject President Trump’s hateful, divisive rhetoric. [] ADD YOUR NAME: I ♥️ PORTLAND [] Oregon will always rise to meet the moment. And no matter what threats come from Washington, we will stand together, protect our communities, and defend our state’s values. Thank you, Tobias Read Secretary of State, Oregon CONTRIBUTE [] [] [] [] Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I don't take this lightly, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Your trust in me means the world.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce7249e8-81fd-44aa-a764-6272af956605/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| It’s pretty clear that Donald Trump is afraid of me. Trump has publicly endorsed my opponent (after Jack shamelessly begged for his support). He’s attacked me by name in an unhinged rant on social media. His administration illegally leaked my private records to Jack’s campaign ally. But Peter, Trump is even more afraid of the movement we’ve built together here in New Jersey — because if we win, we will send a powerful message to the nation that the people do not support his destructive and incompetent presidency. That’s why he’s doing everything he can to stop us from winning this upcoming election, and is rallying the support of his deep-pocketed allies to flood this race with spending against us. [Donald Trump knows that as governor, I’m going to do everything in my power to fight back against his disastrous agenda. But polling shows a neck-and-neck race, Peter, which means we absolutely can’t let Trump’s attacks go unanswered. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today to help me finish this race with the strength we need to win it?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95bb87c5-e698-455c-9ed6-fb74a4b16ac4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| Peter, what happens here in New Jersey will set the tone for what happens in our nation in 2026, 2028, and beyond. It will show the nation whether we’re passively accepting Trump’s authoritarianism and his attacks on working families — or whether we’re fighting back and ready to lead in a new direction. [The fact is, we are far from guaranteed a victory here. The race is a toss-up, and if we’re going to win, we’ll have to earn it. So I’m calling on the support of my grassroots team for help in this final stretch. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me pull ahead of Jack?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44d57ac5-eb80-434d-ac7c-75b11bc8ec1e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4pe1k&__onlt=h)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. Fellow American,

My name is Winsome Earle-Sears, and if you don't mind, I'd like to tell you a little about myself. **I 'm not your typical politician, and I never will be. _This is my story._**

In 2021, I won the General Election for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia by less than 60,000 votes. In doing so, I became the first black woman to hold this office--but that's not why I ran. I ran to effect real change and instill common-sense conservative leadership. That's exactly what we have done and will continue to do.
---

Before becoming the 2nd in command in Virginia, I beat a 20-year incumbent in 2001 to become the first Republican to win a seat in a majority black district in the Virginia House of Delegates since 1865. In the General Assembly, I focused on getting results for my constituents.

Prior to my career in politics, I had the distinct honor of serving as an electrician in the United States Marine Corps. It was here that I learned to be a leader--to improvise, adapt, and overcome. Looking back, my time in the Marines had a significant impact on who I am today, and for that, I'm ever grateful.

Looking even further back, when I was just 6 years old, my family and I came to the United States from Jamaica. We arrived in a new land with no money and different accents, but we made it work and got through the struggles - **only in America is something like this even possible. **

As you can see, I've lived a full life. There have been highs, lows, and everything in between, but I don't regret a single thing. I maintain, without a shadow of a doubt, that my story is only possible in America. I am the second most powerful person in the former capital of the Confederacy, and I am a black female. _I am the epitome of the boundless opportunity and freedom that can _**only**_ be found in America.__**But Fellow American, my story is far from over.**_ I'm running for Governor not only to break records but also to continue spreading my conservative message - to show the world that a black, female, immigrant - and anyone else for that matter - can go from absolutely nothing to the highest levels of American politics. Now, the support I have received for my campaign thus far has been amazing, **but the reality is that if we 're going to have a shot at winning this thing, then we must be well-funded. ** _**[So, after all you’ve learned about me today, can you take just a second to chip in to support my campaign, even if it’s just a few bucks? This road ahead will be difficult, but this is nothing I haven’t experienced before - and it would be an honor to have you by my side, Fellow American.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=ece05a738cbc4bee9331eea603f18946&_e=DMZPjO0fz9E04KO-8D6L8puE9uUI0BQdEjG66hf-FIHl4Ete_Mr8dub2LL5SpEVFNeOWNm_kJZp7uAopUZX3x9-IroDtWnpYxL8Lqo9hahEnbVIVItwnJHgNX4odXFK46BT_snGM1rA0CpkqsZ9KUfNH-2riTE0yki9XlPMp0ITVQ0qQXlBfStQB8otk-ZmBIHmB4eC0E9yy89R5Tcxsj0AieMBA1dEtInxtQnPFqINU-u8SdRpwMhFFwpw9PgwqL6-r1nrHLmD9ubBw3__ehydD8QNPsTrFfxChAZNtS04Ar-pC_sdnucrd0TMf1x85pdAoszIFXo6qIZlB7IVJhJV0P-UqSFCDa94-xG_XrniAFCOXXoZ6n8ylRz5VqHJbK0FFBAjwZOp_EtNteedCETpdtlYIZHTWohHZ3ERbTBl34Asd756ZCdKwPxDjnFzcL27v2ogp-DW1R81kI6EpHgMotOk8uY-GVcg9HY4_9-p7NDdnsO3SdOlXXnogQSHqdJyquXbL-xvWGfOa680MBlGrDtSJzGTuhnS5vFMCl85LW5lQzupjMOsu-gNAyOq2u__6ps94WZAl09zAU_vwfPm5a4B_ZxhlWG9Nzgaz_Vm4nkglztxH2joFeU9gGJXmIUVAeuZ49Oc341Blr02_0sZ5gwnvi10HixJp6lOYrNGoFr5Ii4vSEUs4n5Wchp9WvnRukl7PhsOXjo2cXogaAJ10Wm0a810hfNFuvxHkmhJW7J_-ruJJd6PHjobfPBxOCgw-iJ-f-SLfpbY7qOXfbN57m4-TG7Sy5gUxUKGBIpBnIBMtktazL2zj0opzxUnD)**_

This is my story.| | | | Fellow American, My name is Winsome Earle-Sears, and if you don't mind, I'd like to tell you a little about myself. I 'm not your typical politician, and I never will be. This is my story. In 2021, I won the General Election for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia by less than 60,000 votes. In doing so, I became the first black woman to hold this office--but that's not why I ran. I ran to effect real change and instill common-sense conservative leadership. That's exactly what we have done and will continue to do. Before becoming the 2nd in command in Virginia, I beat a 20-year incumbent in 2001 to become the first Republican to win a seat in a majority black district in the Virginia House of Delegates since 1865. In the General Assembly, I focused on getting results for my constituents. Prior to my career in politics, I had the distinct honor of serving as an electrician in the United States Marine Corps. It was here that I learned to be a leader--to improvise, adapt, and overcome. Looking back, my time in the Marines had a significant impact on who I am today, and for that, I'm ever grateful. Looking even further back, when I was just 6 years old, my family and I came to the United States from Jamaica. We arrived in a new land with no money and different accents, but we made it work and got through the struggles - only in America is something like this even possible. Of course, none of this would have been possible without my husband, Terence, and my amazing daughters. Throughout all of this, they have been my rock, and I owe them everything - they have kept me grounded, confident, and optimistic for the future. As you can see, I've lived a full life. There have been highs, lows, and everything in between, but I don't regret a single thing. I maintain, without a shadow of a doubt, that my story is only possible in America. I am the second most powerful person in the former capital of the Confederacy, and I am a black female. I am the epitome of the boundless opportunity and freedom that can only be found in America.But Fellow American, my story is far from over. I'm running for Governor not only to break records but also to continue spreading my conservative message - to show the world that a black, female, immigrant - and anyone else for that matter - can go from absolutely nothing to the highest levels of American politics. Now, the support I have received for my campaign thus far has been amazing, but the reality is that if we 're going to have a shot at winning this thing, then we must be well-funded. Thank you for your time, and may God Bless the United States of America, Winsome Earle-Sears (R-VA)| * Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: As New Jersey goes, so goes the nation
body:
The entire country is watching this race
Peter, there are a couple of reasons why the entire country is watching this race:
**This is one of the first major elections after the presidential election last fall.** In that election, Donald Trump was just 6 points away from winning right here in New Jersey -- making it even more clear that New Jersey is no longer the safe blue state it once was.
**I’m showing our nation a new way forward.** My opponent has shown he’ll do anything Donald Trump tells him to -- no matter how much it hurts New Jersey families. I will ALWAYS put the people of this state first, Peter. Leadership isn’t just following along with what some Washington politician wants. It’s doing what’s right for the people you serve, even when you get attacked for it.
**As New Jersey goes, so goes the nation.** What we do here in New Jersey will set the trend for 2026, 2028, and beyond. It’s up to us here to take a stand against Donald Trump’s incompetence and authoritarianism -- and show the nation that there’s a better path forward.
**[All eyes are on New Jersey, Peter, and this race is a toss-up. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Wes Moore today to help me win and chart a better path forward for my state and our country?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251025-2.R5g4Rx&refcode=em-20251025-2&t=3&akid=821%2E1086043%2ESqDJ-x)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251025-2.R5g4Rx&amount=5&refcode=em-20251025-2&t=22&akid=821%2E1086043%2ESqDJ-x)**
Thank you,
Mikie

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: The shutdown crisis is getting worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Every day this shutdown drags on hurts families.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=9pXsWH8gIo9DM6aLZl8OiHgqceVLHunoRYz%2FweqJ16C3RAqoC8O4H%2Bc8%2FYxy45t%2FlQjcNJU04MQ7HNGyDXpIZt0x7XfQKN4XE58z5Nx09aKE4Zaf3WAZ%2BIR%2FNhNGJmWPhHallCYnXQuhrUl5am5YZ3cdDyg56y%2Bxx8DN0fb9kf3oyHi6zVv57AGE5PCLCFM8i%2BUmcL4I2%2BdYbh4FrDSo%2BOvS%2FrCTh1cX60O37eAGKozClnU8AK87tRVw8wbAwR5%2BkYB%2FoGcjatOjSVnOzn4hQuWPY4n9EvIfXhY1XenkNW09AMQ6URgyMH44tr6qxF8brQaYedirN%2FbtaY3LKD2FLcE%2FVqc5LMY6ta6WjHFNtwsNrS9LigEMBNDgqmDvrbCyHO%2BMqpdUXTmTkO8AmVgNVZWx6OP%2Fz5evbMPCqJQotY0%3D)
---
| |
---
It's Gabe Vasquez. Over his two terms, Donald Trump has officially overseen more days of government shutdown than any other president in U.S. history. He can add that to his list of “accomplishments.” Right now, we’re still stuck in the middle of a shutdown that Republicans created and refuse to end. For weeks, they’ve chosen politics over people — and every day they stall, families here in New Mexico are paying the price. Federal workers are missing paychecks. SNAP benefits are being delayed. Health care costs are climbing. And Speaker Mike Johnson STILL won’t bring the House back into session to turn the lights back on. Meanwhile, Donald Trump is busy trying to secure a $230 million payout from taxpayers and bulldozing part of the White House to build himself a $300 million vanity ballroom. **That tells you everything about their priorities.** Here in New Mexico, we know what real leadership looks like — it’s showing up, doing the work, and fighting for our communities no matter how tough things get. That’s exactly what I’ll keep doing. But I need you with me. 2026 is our chance to end this chaos once and for all. To start building a government that works for the families of NM-02 — not for billionaires and political insiders. [My team set a $8,000 end-of-month fundraising goal to keep our campaign strong and to keep pressure on Republicans to do their jobs. clean_body: Every day this shutdown drags on hurts families. Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It's Gabe Vasquez. Over his two terms, Donald Trump has officially overseen more days of government shutdown than any other president in U.S. history. He can add that to his list of “accomplishments.” Right now, we’re still stuck in the middle of a shutdown that Republicans created and refuse to end. For weeks, they’ve chosen politics over people — and every day they stall, families here in New Mexico are paying the price. Federal workers are missing paychecks. SNAP benefits are being delayed. Health care costs are climbing. And Speaker Mike Johnson STILL won’t bring the House back into session to turn the lights back on. Meanwhile, Donald Trump is busy trying to secure a $230 million payout from taxpayers and bulldozing part of the White House to build himself a $300 million vanity ballroom. That tells you everything about their priorities. Here in New Mexico, we know what real leadership looks like — it’s showing up, doing the work, and fighting for our communities no matter how tough things get. That’s exactly what I’ll keep doing. But I need you with me. 2026 is our chance to end this chaos once and for all. To start building a government that works for the families of NM-02 — not for billionaires and political insiders. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = In this fight together, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. subject: The most unusual interview David's ever done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
David’s making the case for our movement — and making it entertaining, too.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251025-1&t=1&akid=2774%2E587540%2E2AhZuK)
Peter, did you catch David on the _Adam Friedland Show?_
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251025_1_friedland.oJGIBM&refcode=em20251025-2774&amount=5&t=3&akid=2774%2E587540%2E2AhZuK)
It’s one of the most brutally honest conversations you’ll hear about what’s wrong with the Democratic Party — and what Leaders We Deserve is doing to fix it.
David and Adam covered it all — Trump, the DNC, right-wing trolls, break-up playlists, and more. If you’re frustrated or burnt out on politics, then this is the perfect watch for you. It's hilarious, unfiltered, and a reminder why we have to keep fighting, even when things suck as much as they do right now.
Don’t have time to watch the full interview? Here’s the bottom line: **saving the Democratic Party’s future depends on replacing out-of-touch insiders with leaders who will actually fight for us.[If you agree, chip in $5 now to help LWD keep growing this movement and pushing for change.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251025_1_friedland.oJGIBM&refcode=em20251025-2774&amount=5&t=4&akid=2774%2E587540%2E2AhZuK)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251025_1_friedland.oJGIBM&amount=5&refcode=em20251025-2774&t=5&akid=2774%2E587540%2E2AhZuK)**
David called out the establishment for protecting incumbents and catering to donors instead of backing candidates who can actually win and deliver the change voters are desperate for.
If we don’t step up, nothing changes. They’ll keep recycling the same tired B.S. talking points and strongly worded letters, and we’ll keep losing elections while working people pay the price.
That’s why Leaders We Deserve exists, Peter — to shake things up and elect bold leaders who actually believe in something and aren’t afraid to fight for it.
This interview marks another major moment for LWD. We’re proving that a new generation of young, progressive leaders _can_ take power, and we’re gaining traction thanks to interviews like this and a growing community of 220,000 individual donors.
**[Peter, will you chip in $5 to help power this movement, expand our reach, and bring more people into this fight?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251025_1_friedland.oJGIBM&refcode=em20251025-2774&amount=5&t=6&akid=2774%2E587540%2E2AhZuK)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251025_1_friedland.oJGIBM&amount=5&refcode=em20251025-2774&t=25&akid=2774%2E587540%2E2AhZuK)**
Thanks for being a part of this.
Leaders We Deserve

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Trump’s presidency is all about himself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=5068%2E35263%2EsHtLUJ ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| |
| |
| Trump accidentally posted message pressuring Pam Bondi to charge his |
| enemies, source says |
| — NBC News, October 2025 |
| |
| The prosecutions and investigations of Trump's rivals have raised |
| concerns from legal experts and critics about his use of the Justice |
|Department for potential retribution and the damage that could cause to |
| the rule of law. |
| |
| [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-oct25.unVopK&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251025_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=5068%2E35263%2EsHtLUJ ]PITCH IN TO FIGHT BACK |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------+

Donald Trump is weaponizing the Department of Justice to go after the
political opponents who dare to hold him accountable, rather than using it
for its true purpose: upholding the rule of law.

And his latest blunder proves it — he recently posted a public Truth
Social post that was meant to be sent in private to Attorney General Pam
Bondi, in which he urged her to take legal action against his political
enemies.

Instead of getting to work for the American people, Trump's presidency is
all about himself.

He's weaponizing the full force of the federal government to go after his
political enemies, he's using the presidency to enrich himself and his
billionaire buddies, and meanwhile, the party he leads is refusing to
negotiate to protect Americans' healthcare and paychecks.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-oct25.unVopK&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251025_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=5068%2E35263%2EsHtLUJ ]This is unacceptable. We need a Senate majority that is willing to
stand up to this corruption. Will you pitch in right now to help us
support Democrats from coast to coast and help us flip the Senate blue?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

body:

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/oregon-republican-party/stand-with-or-sheriffs-petition?utm_source=ac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20251022_ORGOP_StandwithSheriffs&utm_id=CE)

name: Troy Downing
subject: Deplorage garbage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I didn’t risk my life overseas just to watch a bunch of self-serving cowards run our country into the ground.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)If you hate BS political emails, good. You’re exactly who I want to talk to, Peter.
This is Troy Downing.
I’m a combat vet, not a career politician. I didn’t risk my life overseas just to watch a bunch of self-serving cowards run our country into the ground.
I ran for Congress — and won — because I tell the truth and fight for __We the People__ , not party bosses, lobbyists, or woke elites.**
****And because I refuse to play their games, the Left is coming after my GOP House seat.**[ RUSH HELP
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)They want me out because I call out their radical agenda, support President Trump, and won’t back down on the issues that matter.
In other words, I’m “ _deplorable._ ”
“ _Garbage_.”
“ _MAGA Extremist_.”
They can label me whatever they want, but I guarantee you it won’t stop me from standing up to open-border policy and the mutilation of our kids in the name of “gender ideology.”
But here's the real problem: **Democrats are pummeling us with cash. **
They’ve stockpiled a **_$40 MILLION advantage over Republicans_** , aiming it straight at flipping the House Majority.
If I don’t flip the switch on fundraising soon, defending this seat will be nearly impossible.
And if we lose it, we don’t just lose my seat. We’ll lose our only chance at advancing President Trump’s America First agenda.
I’m not asking for a handout. I’m asking for an ally. [If you’re ready to join this fight, will you chip in $15.50 today?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._QAFjxPBjHl9w)[JOIN THE FIGHT
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._ka31rGWYEUHFwMEQ)[DONATE TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Thank you for your patriotic support,
-Troy Downing** _Combat Veteran in Congress_**| |

Fellow American - I've been called names no one should ever hear, and I've watched people hold racist signs meant to shame me. And because I have an R next to my name, few care.
But I am no victim. Words won't break me, and they won't stop this campaign.
We are going to win.
The so-called tolerant Left can't fathom for even a second that a black conservative woman could become Governor in the former capital of the Confederacy.
We've seen this before - and we aren't going to back down now. Our race is tied and we are in the CRITICAL final weeks of this campaign.
My opponent is still raising millions of dollars and outspending us every single day.
[I am counting on grassroots supporters like you to dig deep and chip in whatever you can afford to help us shut down these hateful liberals once and for all!!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a91b884d681c424a911ed2b6f6c6b366&_e=PTHhw9i2_i6sfediALMQQyQH51fsDYc5IcACMiiaZhjfaK0cC7RmTjxN7YDcUbVWMyWK4FmgpN4kkn9kl4lkkcGczwjhPdhm4ZLJ-LXlCkd_fzRLH3v0shPH8VCT8LXbcppAe7BCxFcfAHLQMKLWKwAmvcMafL9EEa5g2yNWIRXA9cf5y1NAieNg94QKYT-DqFZ7CrR0TWTJ2rtkfs2ruXnS0JXfYFQPqrhLxpBg74__t-chsnn80JKVXkS4UcrAywWK9FuXmCOFqF9f9RTf1Hfg_dF9Hb0FHzJo04JcOjA4Yvwx5bqfo4GfcKeThdNd6ceWkwJqfo3AjPenr6Bmn3njHw7OBrdV1M4VZdCOJ-G2DQMAyvQWlPbu-zgFiTDxv1ftIYhgamKiBln49TrgcqmEqZA7kzKYxpTPYCsSBKrQBHbSTbbCGzKcNGzY1C72wvW5a5xYsHnSMHIxWYJCfKt_mTUAGXuKKmmv6FoZ9XnO6MW7TKE4JiLAVbSNUr1v8k6fKFOAvDghFOyDDiOerv6IeELSEdwQG6FQT0B839_Ze7UsKHdiDZ_pweWVnBvaSYdunhqRfB-et2E8qi1_vrolNLD62akyhmPzWWkp5pxOtDTAia7SWfxyZAMmoaQGQ3UUq9iPVxJ7-TyS0d0PVy5L6ztJGAnFBkF6HZ9_D5ggpaSwZId3hh7mD76iS9sMAGMT0JtvOTx3BPIdy5SYHPxiIDoAVXs1r3ycBn_hYJdZNuO3doPZHrIkV0Ykk4Srl52f2yPvkVxInOnfgHHwoQuynjIaD0f9-QejQNhdEwj2m1GZD2IIr131dRDr3cHI_5vCctUW6fetyZqomoqgj0VZlTRU44xFQubAS5koz4C2VNIw89M-VtZ-uVHWJKenM9PvCKLFF33IiAC5byyJV9qiiLD5S_La6RKai358VLw%3D)[Chip in $5

clean_body: "Go back to Haiti." Fellow American - I've been called names no one should ever hear, and I've watched people hold racist signs meant to shame me. And because I have an R next to my name, few care. But I am no victim. Words won't break me, and they won't stop this campaign. We are going to win. The so-called tolerant Left can't fathom for even a second that a black conservative woman could become Governor in the former capital of the Confederacy. We've seen this before - and we aren't going to back down now. Our race is tied and we are in the CRITICAL final weeks of this campaign. My opponent is still raising millions of dollars and outspending us every single day. thought Democrats were supposed to love everyone, but this campaign has exposed their hatred for anyone who dares to think differently. And just to be clear, I'm originally from Jamaica. But I have nowhere to go back to -- because America is my HOME! I've worn the uniform to protect our country, and I won't let the hateful Left stop me from fighting for the land that I love. Earle-Sears | . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Heidi Hall
subject: "Politics as usual" just won't cut it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251025_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251025_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Friend, I'm no stranger to tough political races, and I know how to win.
When I moved to Grass Valley in 2005, I started to work with the California State Water Resources Control Board and then the Department of Water Resources.
This time helped me learn more and more about Grass Valley and the unique problems that we were facing, and it was my job and my personal life that helped me see things from two different perspectives: from that of a resident and community member and that of a worker and problem solver.
Friend, I worked in the EPA. I'm used to bureaucracy and red tape, but when it came to the lack of economic opportunity and the challenges that workers, residents, and local business owners faced, we weren't getting any help from Sacramento or Washington.
That's why I stepped up to run for Nevada County Supervisor and won, flipping a seat— without a runoff. I knew that people were tired of the same "politics as usual" style of leadership and needed real change.
And I can see that same need today.
Kevin Kiley is nothing more than a puppet for establishment Republicans and doesn't understand that people are struggling. We don't need any more party-line votes. We need results.
Friend, I'm no stranger to tough races, and I'm ready to unseat Kevin Kiley and deliver results for our communities. But I need your help. Will you please chip in to our people-powered campaign and help us flip this seat? Your grassroots support is so important. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251025_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
MAKE A GRASSROOTS CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251025_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Thank you,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251025_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251025_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251025_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]

We're officially down to the wire: just 10 days left until voters in Pennsylvania decide the future of the state Supreme Court -- and with it, the future of our democracy.
MAGA billionaires have already poured millions into this race, hoping they can buy the court, gerrymander every blue district out of existence, and hand Trump the keys to rig 2026 and 2028.
But here's the truth: this race won't be decided by billionaires. It'll be decided by whether grassroots Democrats step up in these final 10 days.
That's why today, we're launching a special push: $10 for the last 10 days.
If every supporter chips in just $10 right now, we can keep canvassers in the field, flood voters with the truth before they return their ballots, and fight back against MAGA's disinformation in real time. Your $10 means:

* One more voter reached before Election Day.

* One more ad countering MAGA's lies.

* One more step to saving the court and defending democracy.

subject: Don’t let MAGA billionaires buy our courts

body:
| |
---
Hi Peter,

This November, your vote will play a crucial role in the retention of three Pennsylvania Supreme Court justices — **_Christine Donohue, Kevin Dougherty, and David Wecht_**. Your decision will determine whether they continue to serve on the bench for another 10 years.

These justices have protected our rights. But now, the same MAGA billionaires trying to control Congress are spending millions to take control of Pennsylvania’s courts too. **If they succeed, everything from abortion access to voting rights to fair district maps will be on the line.**

That’s why we’re calling on every Democrat, every independent, and _every Pennsylvanian_ who believes in fairness to vote YES on retaining these justices. Your vote is crucial and can make a difference.

Your “YES” vote means: **Keeping our courts independent and balanced.
Protecting fair elections and the right to vote.
Upholding reproductive freedom and equal justice under the law.** And Peter, we need resources to mobilize voters across the Commonwealth, making sure they’re registered, informed about these crucial retention elections, and ready with a plan to vote. name: Blake Gendebien
subject: introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
If you’re short on time and want to help us win this race, defeat Elise Stefanik, and elect new leadership here in the North Country, I hope you’ll consider splitting a donation between me and Heartland Patriots today.
Hi Peter, I’m Blake Gendebien.
Heartland Patriots said I could take a moment to introduce myself and fill you in on why I decided to run for Congress.
**[But, Peter, if you’re short on time and want to help us win this race, defeat Elise Stefanik, and elect new leadership here in the North Country, I hope you’ll consider splitting a donation between me and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96928?refcode=em20251025-9627&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9627%2E614464%2EeGrV9J)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96928?refcode=em20251025-9627&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9627%2E614464%2EeGrV9J)**
I’m a second-generation dairy farmer who was born and raised right here in the North Country. If I’m being honest, I never thought about getting into politics. But for too long, I’ve seen how our region has been sold out and forgotten by career politicians, and I can’t stand on the sidelines any longer.
As a father, husband, and farm owner, I know exactly what people in our community are facing. While farms are being forced to close their doors and families are struggling to make ends meet, our leaders in Washington are doing nothing to help us get by.
**[So, I’m running for Congress—not to just defeat Elise Stefanik, who’s failed us for years, but to be a voice for our region in Washington. If you’re with me, will you split a donation between me and Heartland Patriots today to join our team?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96928?refcode=em20251025-9627&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9627%2E614464%2EeGrV9J)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Blake Gendebien and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:

name: Swamp Digest
subject: Jen Psaki just insulted J.D. Vance’s wife will sicken you to the core

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/704b9c09-89f5-44e2-abc3-35e12f85d0c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
**🏛 ️💔[Furious about the East Wing? 🏛️💔 We are too! Join us!](https://substack.com/redirect/704b9c09-89f5-44e2-abc3-35e12f85d0c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.KWUhdsgf-NK_X1eZml0xq_lQb7_-_w_ELWwayJ_Z-hg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=177103779)
* * *
It was never enough for Donald Trump to defile decency, throttle the Constitution, and drag the presidency through every trough of vulgarity known to humanity. Now Trump is completing the desecration by turning the White House--_the People 's House_--into a gaudy Versailles knock-off, built not for governance, but for garish galas, self-worship, and pay-for-play corruption on steroids.
By now, you have probably heard about Trump's latest White House obscenity - **bulldozing the entire historic East Wing** to start construction on a ballroom annex.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9ba3de7e-7866-4f22-bd2e-9de6cbb9e734?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Lost in the disturbing images, the fine print details get even worse. Most architects and designers hate the Trump ballroom blueprints and plans, never mind that the process Trump has pursued is against the law.
Start with the architects. They call the Trump ballroom plan "tacky and horrifying." And that's putting it gently.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9ba3de7e-7866-4f22-bd2e-9de6cbb9e734?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/04594545-4955-4941-a273-1e5cb259aa8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
The 90,000 square foot structure will dwarf the existing 50,000 square foot White House, rupturing the symmetry and solemnity with a giant slab of neoclassical fakery.
The garish and ostentatious Trump ballroom will be the spiritual sibling of a Las Vegas hotel lobby (if Vegas had a dictator wing).
The architect responsible for the controversial ballroom design and overseeing the destruction/construction is a Trump friend - James McCrery.
McCrery specializes in religious architecture, with a portfolio that includes cathedrals in Tennessee, North Carolina, and Texas. Whatever. The American Institute of Architects recently sent a letter to the Committee for the Preservation of the White House, politely urging "adjustments that would align the proposed additions with the White House's historic character. "
McCrery's former mentor, famed architect Peter Eisenman, was less diplomatic. Eisenman called the McCrery design "bonkers" and said, "putting a portico at the end of a long façade and not in the center is what one might say is untutored."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9ba3de7e-7866-4f22-bd2e-9de6cbb9e734?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
#### ** 💥 Support fearless journalism that calls out corruption.💥
20% off memberships today.**
[Help Tear Down the Golden Cage.](https://substack.com/redirect/04594545-4955-4941-a273-1e5cb259aa8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Design critic Christopher Hawthorne was even more blunt. He said, "the ballroom design, a big-footed architectural presence stomping toward the southern edge of the White House grounds, violates the very standards of beauty and proportion that McCrery loves to rhapsodize about in interviews, to say nothing of the protocols long in place to guide changes to 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue."
Those protocols are also the law. And under the law, all changes or modifications to any federal government building, including the White House, must be reviewed and approved by the National Capital Planning Commission.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9ba3de7e-7866-4f22-bd2e-9de6cbb9e734?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump began demolishing the East Wing before giving the NCPC any submission or even communication about his McCrery plans.
Once again, the law is something for Trump to mock, evade, or rewrite, depending on which marble pillar stands in the way of His Orange Excellency's vision.
**This isn 't renovation. It's imperial cosplay.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/73eb35e3-76de-40b3-9e9e-1514d815a09d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And like countless imperialistic authoritarians before him, Old Man Orange keeps lying. A few months ago, Trump insisted that no part of the existing White House would be affected or touched by the ballroom project. Now, the entire east wing -- built in 1902 and home to the First Lady's office, protocol staff, and visitors center -- is being flattened.
There has been no review, no oversight, and not a peep from Republicans in Congress.
Because God forbid a GOP lawmaker [dares to speak the Truth about his Majesty](https://substack.com/redirect/236e6295-be5d-49e8-99db-984c5ba5133b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And the truth is that Trump has always treated public office like a failing casino -- drain the coffers, plaster your name in gold, and leave the wreckage behind for someone else to clean up.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/73eb35e3-76de-40b3-9e9e-1514d815a09d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Now Trump seeks to embed that pathology in stone and steel, building a party palace on sacred civic ground as if the White House were Mar-a-Lago North. The cost? Reportedly, [a quarter of a billion dollars, supposedly from private donors](https://substack.com/redirect/d25176b3-b419-4dec-83dc-60cd9321ab77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Who are these donors, and what will they expect in return -- aside from invitations to waltz under chandeliers in the shadow of constitutional collapse? Trump won't say.
Don't be distracted by the ornate gold and champagne flutes.
* * *
#### ** 💥 Support fearless journalism that calls out corruption.💥
20% off memberships today.**
[No Kings. No Ballrooms. No Bullshit.](https://substack.com/redirect/04594545-4955-4941-a273-1e5cb259aa8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9ba3de7e-7866-4f22-bd2e-9de6cbb9e734?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This project is not about events or hospitality. It is about permanence. The ballroom [is an architectural IOU to Trump's own ego](https://substack.com/redirect/a89fd525-9444-44b8-9903-a4ca125fbf41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- a monument not to America, but to a man who has never loved anything but his own reflection.
The symbolism is no less nauseating. At a time when democracy teeters, when citizens scrape to make ends meet, Trump wishes to pour gold leaf over the ruins of our civic trust. He is Nero with a spray tan, fiddling with blueprints as Rome rots.
* * *
** 🏛️💔 [Furious about the East Wing? 🏛️💔 Us too! Join us!](https://substack.com/redirect/704b9c09-89f5-44e2-abc3-35e12f85d0c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.KWUhdsgf-NK_X1eZml0xq_lQb7_-_w_ELWwayJ_Z-hg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=177103779)
* * *
Trump, ever the confidence man, understands one thing with brutal clarity: if you act with enough brazenness (along with a Republican House/Senate and a Conservative majority Supreme Court), the rules will dissolve before you.
And so we must ask: Is there any line Trump cannot or will not cross? If the literal foundations of the White House are not safe from his gaudy ambitions, what is?
If George Washington weeps, he weeps not because a ballroom is being built, but because the presidency has been hijacked by a man who views governance as nothing more than a red carpet opportunity for self-promotion, self-dealing, and family enrichment.
Trump's White House ballroom is not a national project. It is a desecration -- a monument to delusion, designed by sycophants, enabled by silence, and built on the demolished bones of law and legacy.
Let history record that when the People's House was defiled, most conservatives watched in silence as a clown king prepared to build his golden cage.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9ba3de7e-7866-4f22-bd2e-9de6cbb9e734?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But there will be a reckoning. Former Republican Congressman Joe Walsh is urging Democratic Presidential candidates to run on tearing down Trump's ballroom abomination. Hear hear.
#### Democrats should pledge to make it a public celebration. Invite all Americans to come to Washington, D.C., with sledgehammers and crowbars for a weekend after the 2029 inauguration.
(_If we are lucky enough to have a free/fair election in 2028_).
[Cleansing our nation of Trumpism](https://substack.com/redirect/63aa8e90-f497-4244-9991-ad72164effb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- emotionally, politically, culturally, and physically -- will be long and arduous.
Now is the time, though -- for our own sanity -- to start making the plans.
The Trump ballroom, like so much else Trump is inflicting, must not be allowed to stand.
* * *

clean_body: Families are choosing between medicine and meals -- and Trump's out here building Versailles with your democracy. 💀💰 | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Families are choosing between medicine and meals -- and Trump's out here building Versailles with your democracy. 💀💰 | | and | Oct 25 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- 🏛 ️💔 It was never enough for Donald Trump to defile decency, throttle the Constitution, and drag the presidency through every trough of vulgarity known to humanity. Now Trump is completing the desecration by turning the White House--the People 's House--into a gaudy Versailles knock-off, built not for governance, but for garish galas, self-worship, and pay-for-play corruption on steroids. By now, you have probably heard about Trump's latest White House obscenity - bulldozing the entire historic East Wing to start construction on a ballroom annex. | | ---|---|--- Lost in the disturbing images, the fine print details get even worse. Most architects and designers hate the Trump ballroom blueprints and plans, never mind that the process Trump has pursued is against the law. Start with the architects. They call the Trump ballroom plan "tacky and horrifying." And that's putting it gently. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- The 90,000 square foot structure will dwarf the existing 50,000 square foot White House, rupturing the symmetry and solemnity with a giant slab of neoclassical fakery. The garish and ostentatious Trump ballroom will be the spiritual sibling of a Las Vegas hotel lobby (if Vegas had a dictator wing). The architect responsible for the controversial ballroom design and overseeing the destruction/construction is a Trump friend - James McCrery. McCrery specializes in religious architecture, with a portfolio that includes cathedrals in Tennessee, North Carolina, and Texas. Whatever. The American Institute of Architects recently sent a letter to the Committee for the Preservation of the White House, politely urging "adjustments that would align the proposed additions with the White House's historic character. " McCrery's former mentor, famed architect Peter Eisenman, was less diplomatic. Eisenman called the McCrery design "bonkers" and said, "putting a portico at the end of a long façade and not in the center is what one might say is untutored." | | ---|---|--- 💥 Support fearless journalism that calls out corruption.💥 20% off memberships today. Design critic Christopher Hawthorne was even more blunt. He said, "the ballroom design, a big-footed architectural presence stomping toward the southern edge of the White House grounds, violates the very standards of beauty and proportion that McCrery loves to rhapsodize about in interviews, to say nothing of the protocols long in place to guide changes to 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue." Those protocols are also the law. And under the law, all changes or modifications to any federal government building, including the White House, must be reviewed and approved by the National Capital Planning Commission. | | ---|---|--- Trump began demolishing the East Wing before giving the NCPC any submission or even communication about his McCrery plans. Once again, the law is something for Trump to mock, evade, or rewrite, depending on which marble pillar stands in the way of His Orange Excellency's vision. This isn 't renovation. It's imperial cosplay. | | ---|---|--- And like countless imperialistic authoritarians before him, Old Man Orange keeps lying. A few months ago, Trump insisted that no part of the existing White House would be affected or touched by the ballroom project. Now, the entire east wing -- built in 1902 and home to the First Lady's office, protocol staff, and visitors center -- is being flattened. There has been no review, no oversight, and not a peep from Republicans in Congress. Because God forbid a GOP lawmaker . And the truth is that Trump has always treated public office like a failing casino -- drain the coffers, plaster your name in gold, and leave the wreckage behind for someone else to clean up. | | ---|---|--- Now Trump seeks to embed that pathology in stone and steel, building a party palace on sacred civic ground as if the White House were Mar-a-Lago North. The cost? Reportedly, . Who are these donors, and what will they expect in return -- aside from invitations to waltz under chandeliers in the shadow of constitutional collapse? Trump won't say. Don't be distracted by the ornate gold and champagne flutes. 💥 Support fearless journalism that calls out corruption.💥 20% off memberships today. | | ---|---|--- This project is not about events or hospitality. It is about permanence. The ballroom -- a monument not to America, but to a man who has never loved anything but his own reflection. The symbolism is no less nauseating. At a time when democracy teeters, when citizens scrape to make ends meet, Trump wishes to pour gold leaf over the ruins of our civic trust. He is Nero with a spray tan, fiddling with blueprints as Rome rots. 🏛️💔 Trump, ever the confidence man, understands one thing with brutal clarity: if you act with enough brazenness (along with a Republican House/Senate and a Conservative majority Supreme Court), the rules will dissolve before you. And so we must ask: Is there any line Trump cannot or will not cross? If the literal foundations of the White House are not safe from his gaudy ambitions, what is? If George Washington weeps, he weeps not because a ballroom is being built, but because the presidency has been hijacked by a man who views governance as nothing more than a red carpet opportunity for self-promotion, self-dealing, and family enrichment. Trump's White House ballroom is not a national project. It is a desecration -- a monument to delusion, designed by sycophants, enabled by silence, and built on the demolished bones of law and legacy. Let history record that when the People's House was defiled, most conservatives watched in silence as a clown king prepared to build his golden cage. | | ---|---|--- But there will be a reckoning. Former Republican Congressman Joe Walsh is urging Democratic Presidential candidates to run on tearing down Trump's ballroom abomination. Hear hear. Democrats should pledge to make it a public celebration. Invite all Americans to come to Washington, D.C., with sledgehammers and crowbars for a weekend after the 2029 inauguration. (If we are lucky enough to have a free/fair election in 2028). -- emotionally, politically, culturally, and physically -- will be long and arduous. Now is the time, though -- for our own sanity -- to start making the plans. The Trump ballroom, like so much else Trump is inflicting, must not be allowed to stand. | | ---|---|--- Invite your friends and earn rewards If you enjoy Blue Amp Media, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

Peter,

As the government shutdown drags into its fourth week, the damage is deepening far beyond Washington. Families are missing paychecks, and millions are being forced to worry about whether they’ll be able to afford their next doctor’s visit or prescription refill.

This isn’t abstract. It’s the direct result of a GOP majority that has chosen political theater over governing. Instead of working across the aisle to keep our government running, they are holding essential services hostage -- threatening everything from veterans’ care to affordable health coverage.

I decided to run for Congress because I’ve seen what happens when Washington’s dysfunction trickles down to our communities -- when rising costs, uncertainty, and gridlock leave working families to fend for themselves.

We deserve better.

**The House majority is must-win for Democrats, and the path to victory runs through CA-27. Election analysts including the _Cook Political Report_ and _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ rank this race as “Lean Democrat” – just one rating away from a toss-up.**

With redistricting in California potentially adding thousands of new voters to our district next month, the stakes -- and the costs of reaching them -- are about to rise sharply.

**[I don’t expect you to give to every message I send, but $3 today would go a long way toward preparing for the uncertainty in this race. Can I count on your support ahead of our end-of-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117999758/578321914/148511826?refcode=em-10.25.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDI5MTBjYy1lNWIxLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ERyqXuh_OLFf2HhDi41I9I3u2RkDNcDTT8LnRUw4NXY=)**

With redistricting in California potentially adding thousands of new voters to our district next month, the stakes -- and the costs of reaching them -- are about to rise sharply. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, GW | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: =?utf-8?q?Missing_Signature_=E2=9D=97=5Bprotectvoting=2Eorg=5D?=
subject: FWD: Thank Justice Sotomayor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You’re about to lose your signature spot!
| Trump’s Supreme Court majority is on the verge of DESTROYING the Voting Rights Act!

**Sonia Sotomayor is one of our ONLY fighters for democracy left on the Court, but you still haven’t signed our letter thanking her for her work.** [**We’re giving you ONE more chance to sign by 8am tomorrow, or you will lose your signature spot. THANK JUSTICE SOTOMAYOR NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95455?t=6&akid=21618%2E878179%2EJlpvbX) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95455?t=7&akid=21618%2E878179%2EJlpvbX)
---
Thank you,

_The Voter Protection Project_
**–BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE–**
_Justice Sotomayor just put the MAGA SCOTUS majority & Donald Trump to SHAME:_
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95455?t=8&akid=21618%2E878179%2EJlpvbX)
**If a member of the Supreme Court — _who is supposed to be impartial_ — is sounding the alarm, _we should ALL be listening._**

Team, we’re so grateful for Sotomayor’s BRAVE leadership — but Republicans are FURIOUS with Sotomayor, and they’re _plotting revenge._

We need to show Supreme Court Justice Sotomayor that Democrats (especially Democrats in your state) have her back!

[**As one of the FEW protectors of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. WE HAVE ONLY 18 SPOTS LEFT:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95455?t=9&akid=21618%2E878179%2EJlpvbX)
[**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95455?t=10&akid=21618%2E878179%2EJlpvbX)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda and blatant disregard of the Constitution.**

Your bravery continues to blow us away, time after time.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95455?t=11&akid=21618%2E878179%2EJlpvbX) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95455?t=12&akid=21618%2E878179%2EJlpvbX) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95455?t=13&akid=21618%2E878179%2EJlpvbX)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21618%2E878179%2EJlpvbX). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21618%2E878179%2EJlpvbX).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21618%2E878179%2EJlpvbX) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=21618%2E878179%2EJlpvbX). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21618%2E878179%2EJlpvbX)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21618%2E878179%2EJlpvbX)

subject: We’re reaching out as a courtesy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:

body:
The ferocity with which Catherine Connolly stood up for Palestinian dignity drew her heaps of criticism, but clearly helped her with the public.

# [Landslide win for Irish leftist presidential candidate; a new book recommendation](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1711&post_id=177123872&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc3MTIzODcyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjE0MjgxMDAsImV4cCI6MTc2NDAyMDEwMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE3MTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Nt-RWJKO1NTX53YfGxH4vCGvZ50MCXGQL7jql2TUj_o)

There's a new book out on foreign lobbying and corruption in Washington that I highly recommend, called [Devils' Advocates: The Hidden Story of Rudy Giuliani, Hunter Biden, and the Washington Insiders on the Payrolls of Corrupt Foreign Interests](https://substack.com/redirect/6dc11649-5c85-4d52-98c6-baef10831eca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
We interviewed the author, [Ken Vogel, this weekend for Breaking Points](https://substack.com/redirect/5f08cf51-9310-4352-98fa-50a7c74bf831?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**On Friday, Irish voters went to the polls to choose the country 's next president.** As it happens, this summer, I was in Ireland and had the opportunity to interview a lawmaker who had just launched a longshot bid for the presidency, Catherine Connolly. Along with my Drop Site colleague Abubaker Abed -- who had only left Gaza for the first time weeks earlier -- and The Ditch's Paulie Doyle, we gathered in a packed and sweltering pub in Dublin (not much air conditioning over there!) for a long conversation mostly focused on Ireland's conflicted relationship to Israel and Palestine; much of the country's population is supportive of the Palestinians and their struggle for independence; the government gives lip service to the question, while mostly going along with broader European policy.
Connolly needed a lot of things to fall into place, and one by one, they all did. [The ferocity with which she stood up for Palestinian dignity ](https://substack.com/redirect/64277aa8-da0c-4ea9-8189-c0dcbc9b33d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)drew her heaps of criticism throughout the campaign from the c[ountry's media and political call](https://substack.com/redirect/ee88e701-cf54-41ed-ad12-e11f7c76e894?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but clearly helped her with the public, who also approved of her social democratic politics. Her main opponent has conceded, and Connolly has won in a landslide. The Irish president is a fairly ceremonial position, though it does have some powers.
_**[Check out our interview here](https://substack.com/redirect/86cc8dd1-7787-41af-a7d0-bc195e5e4bd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**_
(This is my personal newsletter, not from Drop Site. [If you haven't signed up to get our newsletter at Drop Site, please to that here](https://substack.com/redirect/7fa513ed-f2bb-4721-bc5e-7cb5d76f15df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).)
_This is my personal newsletter. To get my work at Drop Site News,[subscribe for free here.](https://substack.com/redirect/7fa513ed-f2bb-4721-bc5e-7cb5d76f15df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_

name: Roy Cooper HQ
subject: make it make sense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We have to stop them. |

**Here’s how Republicans apparently want to govern (make it make sense):** → Cede congressional authority — allowing one man to govern on his whims of the day, even if that means gutting services like Medicaid → Take away your rights — from abortion care to the ballot box → Make everything more expensive — by pulling tariff numbers out of thin air → Speed up climate change — because they think they’re rich enough to avoid its effects → And gerrymander as many states as they can — so they can stay in power and avoid facing political consequences for their actions Our last hope of stopping them is Democratic candidates with a proven record of winning statewide in battleground states. _Does that sound like anyone you know?_ **[Peter, North Carolina is Democrats’ BEST chance to flip a Senate seat from red to blue, and Roy Cooper is the only candidate who can do it — but winning won’t be easy.
