name: Haley Stevens
subject: I'm humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I'll always fight for Michigan families

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1171%2E49239%2EHv237a)
null, I wanted to quickly follow up to make sure you got my note.
---
I'm still looking for another 45 grassroots Democrats to personally endorse my campaign to become Michigan's next senator, and**I noticed you haven't had a chance to add your name yet.**
**That's why I'm humbly asking one more time:[Will you personally endorse my campaign to keep Michigan blue, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's disastrous agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7355?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=1171%2E49239%2EHv237a)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7355?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1171%2E49239%2EHv237a)
---
Thank you for your support. It means the world to have you by my side in this race.

Haley Stevens
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: What I'm hearing from folks like you
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7356?t=4&akid=1171%2E49239%2EHv237a)
---
null,
On the campaign trail, I've been talking directly with Michiganders across the state – folks like you who are concerned for the future – and **here's what I've been hearing:**
🛟 People are worried about the future of Medicare and Social Security.

🩺 Folks in Michigan and across the country want improved and affordable access to health care.

💰 Working families need real action to create and protect good-paying jobs.

⛓️💥 And many expressed deep concerns about the future of our fundamental freedoms, civil rights, and American democracy itself.
These aren’t just political talking points, null. They’re _real_ concerns from _real_ people. And they’re exactly why I’m running for Michigan's battleground Senate seat – **because I have a track record of getting things done.**
📌 I helped stabilize the auto industry and save over 200,000 Michigan jobs as chief of staff on President Obama's Auto Rescue Task Force.
📌 I played a leading role in passing the bill to grow our manufacturing economy by bringing America’s semiconductor industry back to where it belongs: Michigan.
📌 Most recently, I introduced the Stop Trump's Abuse of Power Act – a bill to ban the president from deploying active duty troops on U.S. soil without consent from state or local leaders.
That barely scratches the surface, and I know there's a _lot_ more work to do. So it's a good thing I grew up the Michigan way: surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work. And I'm in this race now so I can continue fighting for Michigan's working families in the U.S. Senate.
But with polling showing that I'm the Democrat with the very best shot at beating MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, the GOP is getting scared – **and they're gearing up to spend millions to flip this seat red.**
**So, null, I need****you on my grassroots team to help me****keep up my track record of fighting for hardworking Michigan families.****[Will you join me by endorsing my campaign today? My team set an ambitious goal to get 15,000 signatures by midnight, and right now, I’m still 33% short.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7355?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1171%2E49239%2EHv237a)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7355?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1171%2E49239%2EHv237a)
---
Thank you so much for your support,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** Null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7355?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1171%2E49239%2EHv237a) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7356?t=8&akid=1171%2E49239%2EHv237a)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=9&akid=1171%2E49239%2EHv237a)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

Fellow patriot —

You may already know me – some of you know me and my story well.

But I want to take this opportunity to reintroduce myself and **share some exciting news.**

**My name is Mark Lamb** — I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and the proud former Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona.

After much prayer and reflection with my family, I’ve made a huge decision: **I am officially running for Congress in Arizona’s 5th District!**

[ **JOIN MARK LAMB »** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=197eac6727c14819b201f1065affb414&_e=E9fe0WMw2T2O-xX5u02NhA2EItxoavPqCmaN_kk6oI1J6VkeC1s8EtOzA4PU4lD3J5ozk2mGOZX6KqjcPMQ9JaFDNfldJPm-cbCh8D-wl6_qSPBiOKAUgEAOl0PLIGYx9YZxOwnXFpQz2H2eYyAHgiGP5I1H25X4O95yEQ68f8aejYN1YsagIBMPJ2W1lGsfiZ7smYOyCTDdj6h79_xUuA-HQVRKKmftLHs8sPxhnH-X_eY2PJR925FsLIpTdMDZYv-xFK8PPMnnQHmMNZEBPEcom4oC6vFGOmpfyuch7Ffaz5cUjQizhdFpaXoY4ffQIWpJJrCQ8tgxqaZa1QvbZAOISzjXlVQGKqztH2akcNb-ZsoWzXMTb49D7o2IoD4CRIBfAg20iMTdbpdxPS1Hm_EFFIfEXHfalyeEgSf4UXzU0V6nwuOaQIGBBEW4LiH8jMlDXkW8ybq6q9PTBZAVfaMcfPLbY1dbDseT2gEgRfcbYwYbP7yyzgxMdHpeYe_9GMB7cPyrrVoG-_T1XDaxOJAVaED6_qzpMoPnFFtCbJLePeX3AO3Qj1e7ZXQpVijcqyeLEQZ9v_vbI3S9ljtW_OVrC6qG_crgJANsXDW2Iv5nsry4dTCyhHKlgEakgkkck2u87pFpwjHrwksOL4qdfUhvsi3GJWReV58NfWsE7xQ%3D)
This isn’t about ambition — _it’s about service._ I’ve seen what happens when leaders lack courage and conviction, and I refuse to sit by while feckless politicians and bureaucrats fail our nation’s families.

**I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right** — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now.

[**So I’m taking this fight, along with these principles, to Congress, and I want YOU, fellow patriot, to be part of our team from Day One that’s going to bring home a win.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=197eac6727c14819b201f1065affb414&_e=E9fe0WMw2T2O-xX5u02NhA2EItxoavPqCmaN_kk6oI1J6VkeC1s8EtOzA4PU4lD3J5ozk2mGOZX6KqjcPMQ9JaFDNfldJPm-cbCh8D-wl6_qSPBiOKAUgEAOl0PLIGYx9YZxOwnXFpQz2H2eYyAHgiGP5I1H25X4O95yEQ68f8aejYN1YsagIBMPJ2W1lGsfiZ7smYOyCTDdj6h79_xUuA-HQVRKKmftLHs8sPxhnH-l-YrIsskq0689ioVxBiLqjozf_lACwNXTZFzjNppib8-L7w66OfPFJl_mcfkAwb8H0bBdYBv3bXuLiDwbpVjgMXJu-gjhctS6czQI09L1a4fIuMRCapFLVWc5tyBBjGaFGEcQWKAvxC0sAjkebmLHrvVc3EwFZHkM-kojnKcS5UolAeunpGkJTSPC7JzEsNQYmNhQ1aPbPFCF2kbkV4W3wCS1-puV2m1SdEwni7e65shHgcfXsS1IoJSmqvwMeQ0vDenYzWi1dijvhyGjJoZWWezDYSBQVFxKL-8PJ9LZuG9L8JPspTKgIBQiQBgHKjjWpJqdiKNf8NGuQ14JM_GmEq07Mhu9RNM0ac7JsFlK77NSXwwWs9LHkjJ1ckkXEQ2dKJoe0s2YPgEq-faBkDQQgu4X9uA0_O4XZwM539LbWGaYYECwvqACH8MC0v54bGQ%3D)

[ **JOIN MARK LAMB »** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=197eac6727c14819b201f1065affb414&_e=E9fe0WMw2T2O-xX5u02NhA2EItxoavPqCmaN_kk6oI1J6VkeC1s8EtOzA4PU4lD3J5ozk2mGOZX6KqjcPMQ9JaFDNfldJPm-cbCh8D-wl6_qSPBiOKAUgEAOl0PLIGYx9YZxOwnXFpQz2H2eYyAHgiGP5I1H25X4O95yEQ68f8aejYN1YsagIBMPJ2W1lGsfiZ7smYOyCTDdj6h79_xUuA-HQVRKKmftLHs8sPxhnH8dOIes9CSOreAlKrlAYLbtyOpYUQ-Nbo-czqYOPtuKlh9b7HntIzcRFm_zBOpU2uUgD9cb11AaZ83K6mAZiRaR1bfL3V2q-UdwIXk4WlSFATD8JcdQO4qlAhxw5rWG5f13pACFxnC-MKIaQHAPptBGxjn1rR6arErmJTrRR6QnqVC5muS522i7nmB1ftcb06vwFT3CCi0XvK3_00e_FNJ6oSdK_R0llTQqqfW2sj5mUmBA93mBi94gVOoKdKiwqMaOxSr3dqM3NjBI10p2EdztV0V_2v0fbFpOFqra1gAHutNYJsf7-ND0VM-BW8AXQ-J31IKjMN2BwlaC4q9UcEXmfRvAYQA1WR4ErQL1l45bBweEJu2ujPRNU-CR8y_E6BKKZ3lSzK2L7Nr1yfMEvKpbpnlk3bGmRBlsyIuOU3sRNR1Wu_HmtgYS1qYrBpNIC8w%3D)
Before I go any further, I want to thank Congressman Andy Biggs for his years of service to AZ-5 and wish him well in his decision to step down from this seat and run for Governor of Arizona.

Andy has always fought hard for conservative values, **and you can trust that I will do the same.**

**You know me, and you know my record.** As Sheriff, I spent years on the frontlines — battling the fentanyl epidemic, fighting cartel violence spilling over our borders, rescuing children from trafficking rings, and holding gang members and criminals accountable.

**Every day, I put on my badge and carried the responsibility of keeping our communities safe.** I’ve seen families ripped apart by crime and drugs, and I’ve felt that pain personally. I’ve seen firsthand the devastating effects of rising crime and failing leadership.

**I won’t stand by while career politicians in Washington make excuses, play politics, and leave families unprotected.**

Our liberty, our safety, and our freedom are not guaranteed by silence — they are defended through action. I will fight in Congress for the same principles I’ve lived by as Sheriff: **personal responsibility, faith, courage, and an unwavering commitment to the people I serve.**

I will stand up to the woke left, to the weak political establishment, and to anyone who puts politics above the safety of our communities.

_This fight will not be easy._ Washington isn’t used to someone who tells it like it is, someone who’s willing to get their hands dirty and put people over politics. But that’s exactly what I intend to do — for Arizona families, for our law enforcement, and for our Constitution.

I’m ready to step up and bring real leadership to Congress, but I can’t do it alone. [**Will you stand with me and help me launch this campaign with a generous show of support?**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=197eac6727c14819b201f1065affb414&_e=E9fe0WMw2T2O-xX5u02NhA2EItxoavPqCmaN_kk6oI1J6VkeC1s8EtOzA4PU4lD3J5ozk2mGOZX6KqjcPMQ9JaFDNfldJPm-cbCh8D-wl6_qSPBiOKAUgEAOl0PLIGYx9YZxOwnXFpQz2H2eYyAHgiGP5I1H25X4O95yEQ68f8aejYN1YsagIBMPJ2W1lGsfiZ7smYOyCTDdj6h79_xUuA-HQVRKKmftLHs8sPxhnH-So-I5FYYXK0JcnpDuA79o_Ka0tLLiVxGABK8iYCYzUBYZB6242X3jDu9t7Rh-VFeAAYbRJqzjwiTmekIv19IHx9rnWRjBH3OSrorQpX8IZymzYbFP654TvBwkxalR6AOAwBa4jJaVbruMF1bDCNMrzBsrBmUe9kMReW7jjojGBwdMTHbsI_WUanHWeeDgSO2flWFkgP1E_XsFQnmI30yxIh3wt749oTQfXGflw5pSHoVofI-ZZRV2b6ONHFiR8vW4kgetFm2qR4_9yF9TAQ_HMwxcW-bB5Z36I1JXifjIsXHWOpEbOr2Ly_PXiV5cKWImHP8niVv752kJZll11RwuIzlJVNmRJ9AkqOmkUNXEMRBc2OuR8Vi8tA3IV11_hjXEvrDOdVSUXl2Fy-j0nI0MUpu9L-SfaFVm3NlFvPisVUjUkarDAjjXl6xvKZQA4vM%3D)

[ **JOIN MARK LAMB »** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=197eac6727c14819b201f1065affb414&_e=E9fe0WMw2T2O-xX5u02NhA2EItxoavPqCmaN_kk6oI1J6VkeC1s8EtOzA4PU4lD3J5ozk2mGOZX6KqjcPMQ9JaFDNfldJPm-cbCh8D-wl6_qSPBiOKAUgEAOl0PLIGYx9YZxOwnXFpQz2H2eYyAHgiGP5I1H25X4O95yEQ68f8aejYN1YsagIBMPJ2W1lGsfiZ7smYOyCTDdj6h79_xUuA-HQVRKKmftLHs8sPxhnH_nzLcFBISNMR6IqVvOp3krbioMGC4-7L4h7jKwm5PRFbcKJKYM5bugKdHOlAdLqdvCRKEwDQXXCu4ooEaEY_VZ4_bKM00FIlfJvrgIx1gXcVDFGLmHytk4Qax2yUfcPUx0wI1F9qfBnWCm5QLmEk7cvL15nodmB021N2rLcsjzHDYf205rTraCXeJ9hz7opV4IMRxeA4zwm8esZPmxWbsrm2FS4KGh3jW-jlfLMQw1IwF2bML3lPqlDsOAA18S-NP2X3BEWHktn8-QlOwz2XnqxQV6tje433xiShbPQdOQ0d2C3aAhuHKIZo_OEawyTZk8Vn8BwblXbjrMVgQVM70Et5WpdJxf1fPQ1BifuR0JD703uo4qwI2-djbh5mm8nG7ZB5mVs_NXfcM06YqrXNFZzklTWTzVx57vvKTGTDQPLsNByD4iU3jCCfaankFE7SQ%3D)
Every contribution — big or small — sends a message: that hard-working families won’t be ignored, that our freedoms matter, and that courage still counts in America.

[**I’m asking everyone reading this email to chip in a launch donation of at least $5 to help us win in AZ-5 and put a fighter in Congress who is not afraid to get their hands dirty.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=197eac6727c14819b201f1065affb414&_e=E9fe0WMw2T2O-xX5u02NhA2EItxoavPqCmaN_kk6oI1J6VkeC1s8EtOzA4PU4lD3J5ozk2mGOZX6KqjcPMQ9JaFDNfldJPm-cbCh8D-wl6_qSPBiOKAUgEAOl0PLIGYx9YZxOwnXFpQz2H2eYyAHgiGP5I1H25X4O95yEQ68f8aejYN1YsagIBMPJ2W1lGsfiZ7smYOyCTDdj6h79_xUuA-HQVRKKmftLHs8sPxhnH8V5LLo6-UHMLw4Wcr-ae1Fkoghk8cv1SsbTU6wpmOtBwIOMeRSZoT8voUPr9TvewOnNO0gIvJcPCAJQ2b89N_3MYwmkoyNhtOTbyiXztZjHlM2P800PA-r-YodUEmd7LOe3KtcyFp7Db9Mae3YUd1pZjBa2PZOF7QlvYCVuv4xizpIQMFSEq08S7p6cJU4F85nEIKnNU6B_FHG86skZIHtK__HTaK_n5_WWMZswwAJa3Qw_hG3h2P3riS6BnbAsQDqp7XXLzPoPrb5KTRk0Azr70HZkIP5M-1bvM0-ySNT_kaR4N8si7_0dLJaIWRNmoLulJdgSGNwfAQSWxnTBEM4E0O9Nl6JxYwB2hw9w3EQ5OeI3PbIiXhHfbfBmaOVuY9zPEpiG_xosfCxash3UW2JW7shCsYr8RdxGNWpsbAJOJ6FRuLtktiHUYsS6z7GjX8%3D)

I’m ready, fellow patriot. Are you with me?

For God, Family, and Country,

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=197eac6727c14819b201f1065affb414&_e=E9fe0WMw2T2O-xX5u02NhA2EItxoavPqCmaN_kk6oI1J6VkeC1s8EtOzA4PU4lD3J5ozk2mGOZX6KqjcPMQ9JaFDNfldJPm-cbCh8D-wl6_qSPBiOKAUgEAOl0PLIGYx9YZxOwnXFpQz2H2eYyAHgiGP5I1H25X4O95yEQ68f8aejYN1YsagIBMPJ2W1lGsfiZ7smYOyCTDdj6h79_xUuA-HQVRKKmftLHs8sPxhnH-7kV4xmhSnNkize7vTa1FHGTKBvh_87mE0z3AkNKDhJGWd4X-Fv-nonz6Q4hrC_TFHmeNDY1x4u6uLbPTkP80RTcXH2H5pJBFLQI1pJfHU8Oky6DU-ZL3ZMSLFJrTh3EACQDwbk1sCJwnQAev8zzkmebNcn5vk9e1DdcRMatCEIW_AmnijwV5OtfNZXnb7p_iT8LgSSUV6kbi6sGUH4mAVYqsHTIOogxPFkmyo9e1kb4OQpKtt9v2Qdc1iO930QG1ylRj3Lihzh7FI7lOpH60LsjwrN5dCnZm4fc7LZQWypeMsBIuc71mWOkWKyvblbfROrfk580qTthpTyCc25qgaw75OucDxbFWWBC6HVFbmgv82vr3vd7WoLU1qaW33chaMNG-jhSHcpbbktJ9V0Se_EJVLAahUCwf85OILZ94G0gM-lMKBDjxYHxNSB0HNd98%3D)
**Mark Lamb**
Republican for Congress, AZ-5

P.S. I want to make it clear that the outpouring of support you’ve shown me and my wife, Janel, in the past factored into our decision to make this run. **As Sheriff, I couldn’t have accomplished what I did without my deputies, and I won’t be able to succeed in this fight without you.** [**That’s why I’m asking everyone reading this to give just $5 or more to help us make a ton of noise out of the gate and put us on the path to victory from the very start.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=197eac6727c14819b201f1065affb414&_e=E9fe0WMw2T2O-xX5u02NhA2EItxoavPqCmaN_kk6oI1J6VkeC1s8EtOzA4PU4lD3J5ozk2mGOZX6KqjcPMQ9JaFDNfldJPm-cbCh8D-wl6_qSPBiOKAUgEAOl0PLIGYx9YZxOwnXFpQz2H2eYyAHgiGP5I1H25X4O95yEQ68f8aejYN1YsagIBMPJ2W1lGsfiZ7smYOyCTDdj6h79_xUuA-HQVRKKmftLHs8sPxhnH8RpvR6bRgGsUUIynxf0Bxa3iB5W7QD3H-58TrP8CPRar99yQMjeCtPbYEdrkjC8R_d3SP42Ul7twJCzbDkMnxeQD-15BKC-8h_q1Pdexp6ILbV_rLBjgerQseq65jckm9Jz0FZ8oA9zaPj4piv9FzosDcs_QdqNcT7uHMZkuOsLXZMyGxbeypP5OlOUw1_G-IsdgSOI35Ia86pdxPnwPUEngQAWuD1-MK5ONxuQFkyx99ZsQy46saosiXNNb-6pPu9aijSm3TsZs72cJ_cHIyCxFAsJ_ANoWKd5zBhszBQxfj754GIm_El4CmxslsoF_Bo2mK_GqPDGjfU0cL12e6SGbLgXmAaPjisAW5HaQJOWdOycbyUOCCmu03-hPoLwk6zZz1mDf57-amod6KfJnB0Bp0j08GN5GAmp78-U1p_R0IIqQBWO24r1_MsBg-3TM8%3D) Thank you!

clean_body: I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now. | Fellow patriot — You may already know me – some of you know me and my story well. But I want to take this opportunity to reintroduce myself and share some exciting news. My name is Mark Lamb — I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and the proud former Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona. After much prayer and reflection with my family, I’ve made a huge decision: I am officially running for Congress in Arizona’s 5th District! This isn’t about ambition — it’s about service. I’ve seen what happens when leaders lack courage and conviction, and I refuse to sit by while feckless politicians and bureaucrats fail our nation’s families. I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now. Before I go any further, I want to thank Congressman Andy Biggs for his years of service to AZ-5 and wish him well in his decision to step down from this seat and run for Governor of Arizona. Andy has always fought hard for conservative values, and you can trust that I will do the same. You know me, and you know my record. As Sheriff, I spent years on the frontlines — battling the fentanyl epidemic, fighting cartel violence spilling over our borders, rescuing children from trafficking rings, and holding gang members and criminals accountable. Every day, I put on my badge and carried the responsibility of keeping our communities safe. I’ve seen families ripped apart by crime and drugs, and I’ve felt that pain personally. I’ve seen firsthand the devastating effects of rising crime and failing leadership. I won’t stand by while career politicians in Washington make excuses, play politics, and leave families unprotected. Our liberty, our safety, and our freedom are not guaranteed by silence — they are defended through action. I will fight in Congress for the same principles I’ve lived by as Sheriff: personal responsibility, faith, courage, and an unwavering commitment to the people I serve. I will stand up to the woke left, to the weak political establishment, and to anyone who puts politics above the safety of our communities. This fight will not be easy. Washington isn’t used to someone who tells it like it is, someone who’s willing to get their hands dirty and put people over politics. But that’s exactly what I intend to do — for Arizona families, for our law enforcement, and for our Constitution. I’m ready to step up and bring real leadership to Congress, but I can’t do it alone. Every contribution — big or small — sends a message: that hard-working families won’t be ignored, that our freedoms matter, and that courage still counts in America. I’m ready, fellow patriot. Are you with me? For God, Family, and Country, Mark Lamb Republican for Congress, AZ-5 P.S. I want to make it clear that the outpouring of support you’ve shown me and my wife, Janel, in the past factored into our decision to make this run. As Sheriff, I couldn’t have accomplished what I did without my deputies, and I won’t be able to succeed in this fight without you. Thank you! Join Mark Lamb on social media! | | PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Greg Cunningham
subject: I infiltrated the cartels. It’s worse than you think.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cunningham for NM
body:
This is a district that President Trump won, and it’s being represented by a Democrat. One of the few in the entire nation. | | | Peter,
---
_**Being an undercover cop isn’t easy. **_ **It’s even more difficult in a border state.** I spent 20 years with the Albuquerque Police Department and retired as a detective. I’m Greg Cunningham. I went undercover to bust the worst of the worst. Cartels, gangs, human traffickers and drug traffickers. I used my recon experience in the U.S. Marines to blend in, gather information, and put these criminals behind bars to keep my community safe.

clean_body: This is a district that President Trump won, and it’s being represented by a Democrat. One of the few in the entire nation. | | | Peter, Being an undercover cop isn’t easy. It’s even more difficult in a border state. I spent 20 years with the Albuquerque Police Department and retired as a detective. I’m Greg Cunningham. I went undercover to bust the worst of the worst. Cartels, gangs, human traffickers and drug traffickers. I used my recon experience in the U.S. Marines to blend in, gather information, and put these criminals behind bars to keep my community safe. Take it from me: the horrors at the border aren’t a media creation. They’re real, and they’re worse than you can even imagine. With a Defund the Police Democrat representing NM-02 in Washington, I knew I had to do something. I had to step up. Look, I’m a Marine and a Retired Police Detective, but more than that, I’m a husband, father and grandfather who wants to fight for the future of my country. As a Christian man, I’m driven into action with this verse:Proverbs 31:8-9. If God gave me the ability to give a voice to the voiceless, if he has blessed me with the ability to defend the defenseless, then I will NOT waste that blessing. Today, I’m humbly asking you to stand with me to win in this border district. This is a district that President Trump won, and it’s being represented by a Democrat. One of the few in the entire nation. I don’t have PACs lining up to support me. I don’t have a political machine behind me. I’m one man who wants to make a difference. That’s why I’m personally reaching out. We have an opportunity here, but I can’t win this without the generosity of patriots like you. Thank you, Greg Cunningham Christian. Marine. Police Officer. Republican Candidate, NM-02 | | Paid for by Cunningham for NM | | P.O. Box 1197, Las Cruces, NM 88004. name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Before you hit the hay…
body:
There’s something I need to tell you...

| | | | [](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)Hey, Peter. It’s Marsha.
I know it’s late, and you’re probably getting settled for the night, but I need to tell you something that can’t wait until the morning.
I’m just **$231** short of today's fundraising goal. I know this doesn’t seem like a lot. But trust me when I say every single dollar counts when it comes to defeating the Democrats and protecting our GOP Majority.
If we fall short of our goal tonight, it will set the stage for a complete Democrat takeover. Every GOP victory in the past few weeks will be gone overnight!
[](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._QQ)[This is why failure is not an option here, Peter. I’m calling on every patriot reading this email to chip in $4. Nothing more. Nothing less. Just $4.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._23RAVX8eMZyuTwbYUQ)[Chip In $4
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)If everyone reading this email contributes just $4 or more, we’ll EASILY surpass our fundraising goal and have the resources necessary to stop the Democratic takeover.
_If not, we’re doomed..._[ Chip In $4
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)God Bless you, and have a good night,
Marsha Blackburn| | |

body:
Democrats have NO room for failure! We need all hands on deck >>

|
---
Peter,

Last week, we urged you to support Democrats as we face the challenge of going up against the MAGA fundraising machine in CA’s special election happening in 10 days!

**We were shocked when our system flagged that _you didn’t step up._**

_**We know that you _do not support_ the MAGA agenda**_ – gutting Medicaid, Social Security, and destroying our democratic institutions!

_**We know you’re committed to retiring corrupt MAGA Republicans**_ in Congress who have displayed their extremism and inadequacy in the course of a 25-day government shutdown this month.

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/nyc-liberals-prove-they-cannot-be?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

# _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bc80ad1b-94c2-48d2-b083-2e794436c884?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Canal St, NYC
New York City is no stranger in proving just how insane liberals can be when they are in complete control of local and state governments. Putting aside that it appears the city is on the verge of electing a full-blown communist who hates the United States, despite not being from here, the reaction to the recent raid on Canal Street by federal immigration agents highlights how NYC liberals should not be in charge.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..sg2R_haTTvZwxPK3j-fC1yhhyH52husqmpJi5xhQpLc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=177128511)
For those who are unaware, Canal Street in lower Manhattan is famous for sidewalk vendors selling counterfeit items, such as purses and jewelry. It is a long known hotspot for illegal aliens to gather to sell those items, crowding the sidewalk. More recently, people have noticed how much more aggressive and confrontational the newer "sellers" have been when being filmed or refusing to buy from them.
When U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Homeland Security Investigations swept through Canal Street and arrested several illegal aliens, it was no surprise to see New Yorkers who happened to be in the area form a mob and try to interfere with the operation. Agents were attacked by some in the crowd, resulting in several arrests.
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *
# [Doctor's Odd "Salt Trick" Normalizes High Blood Pressure Without Drugs](https://substack.com/redirect/73cb06d3-a8c7-4c68-92f4-3f8cef6b98eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/73cb06d3-a8c7-4c68-92f4-3f8cef6b98eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/73cb06d3-a8c7-4c68-92f4-3f8cef6b98eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Piece continues)**_
Protesters didn't stop there. They later gathered outside the federal plaza, where arrestees were processed, and got into clashes with the New York Police Department. While full-blown riots did not take place, the message was clear: Leave our illegal aliens alone.
And just who did ICE pick up during that operation? Who was the crowd fighting for? Suffice to say, they were certainly people who I would not want to have as neighbors.
The arrestees have "violent rap sheets" that include allegations of robbery, burglary, domestic violence, assaulting law enforcement, counterfeiting, drug trafficking, drug possession, and forgery, according to the Department of Homeland Security.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4c85a394-b443-479b-8ea0-0b89f82cf4a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Each of the men arrested are from Africa, and five of them were released into the United States by the Biden-Harris administration.
**For example:**
* Mamadou Ndoye, "a criminal illegal alien from Mali, issued a final order of removal by an immigration judge in 2008, was previously arrested for crimes including assault, recklessly endangering, counterfeiting third degree, unauthorized use of a motor vehicle, criminal sale of narcotics, possessing a controlled substance, possession of marijuana for sale, making false reports to law enforcement, and resisting arrest."

* Muhammad Ndiaye, "a criminal illegal alien from Senegal, with previous arrests for domestic violence, robbery, receiving stolen property, burglary, fraudulent accosting, forgery, counterfeiting, sale of a controlled substance, obstruction, and disorderly conduct. He entered the U.S. on a B2 tourist visa that required him to depart in 1995."
* Bokar Soko, "a criminal illegal alien from Mauritania, previously arrested for counterfeiting second degree THREE times. He entered the U.S. illegally on May 24, 2023, in a caravan of 26 people [and] was released by the Biden administration into the interior of the country."

The whining from New Yorkers did not stop once the operation was over. On social media, many posted how they either did not care about the fraudulent sellers or how those fraudulent sellers were a benefit to what makes New York City.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..sg2R_haTTvZwxPK3j-fC1yhhyH52husqmpJi5xhQpLc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=177128511)
"Canal street today, after ICE swept through w/ DHS, the FBI & the IRS, arrested everyone & launched an investigation into 'counterfeit trading.' These markets are as old as Chinatown and are tolerated because they are a massive boon for tourism and everyone likes them," **[one user posted on X.](https://substack.com/redirect/0e5f0fa1-bdd5-457f-95ed-29bcdfff1606?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"'Real New Yorkers' are the people who you sent to intimidate with masked men armed with guns. But keep telling yourself a fairy tale about your heroism to drown out the small voice inside you that tells what you know: you are an evil and selfish person who does not know love," another leftist said to a reporter who recently filmed the conditions on Canal Street.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/31efb68f-29b6-48a7-8e92-483b86b8b065?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It is a shame liberals are in charge of our once-great cities. They would rather have the streets turn into a third-world bazaar, rife with criminals than admit Republicans are right about maintaining the American standard for quality of life.
If the Trump administration has to drag liberals back to that standard kicking and screaming, then so be it.
* * *
| A guest post by| [Julio Rosas](https://substack.com/@julioarosas?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)Field Reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media. name: Chris Pappas
subject: Homeownership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3100%2E582294%2Ey_85P-)
Homeownership is slipping further out of reach for far too many Granite Staters — and renting isn’t getting any easier either.
This crisis didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of years of neglect, corporate greed, and policies that put developers and investors before hardworking people.
**That’s why I’m fighting to invest in affordable housing and make sure everyone has access to a safe, affordable place to call home.**
In the Senate I’ll continue tackling this crisis head-on — but I can’t do it alone. We need your support to keep up the fight for lower costs and a fair shot for every family.
**[Will you chip in any amount today so I can fight for affordable housing in the Senate? Every dollar makes a difference to our campaign.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251025_2_housing.baezjM&refcode=em20251025-2&t=2&akid=3100%2E582294%2Ey_85P-)**

Thanks,
Chris Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**

clean_body: - Homeownership is slipping further out of reach for far too many Granite Staters — and renting isn’t getting any easier either. This crisis didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of years of neglect, corporate greed, and policies that put developers and investors before hardworking people. That’s why I’m fighting to invest in affordable housing and make sure everyone has access to a safe, affordable place to call home. In the Senate I’ll continue tackling this crisis head-on — but I can’t do it alone. We need your support to keep up the fight for lower costs and a fair shot for every family. - - Thanks, Chris Pappas New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority? -

name: Elizabeth Guzman
subject: Standing with Virginia’s workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6Cj1D6_hPjIrw3NtPnGDwSMPAQ_OO2pIEULns3pOpFboM2evA0RzPJOnWdSKArJJuw47_hqZ-1pnqbivwvqx7ey0NJhjPtWG5r2ZBtRQDk3Jd7oIpPDrv4sD-bdKoFxO8J-Mj87qCLPe6BTLVtVwJ1tTWUnDCrXJEw32dPqnwNscPbPFbdUgcdB--1hwb05j4dUa7CH-YsovCtG18F6-kyE/4l1/JUz5JDAtTbOl1svhIehxrQ/h0/h001._gbbMcAe8OScrNH3StKnJ8ACnafwuniafgzE5ZbF3Yk)
* * *
Friend, when I first came to this country as a young single mother with $300 in my pocket, I worked three minimum-wage jobs to afford a one-bedroom apartment. I worked my way to finish my education, eventually earning two master’s degrees. **I know what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck and still give everything you have.** Today, as a second-generation union member, I’m proud to stand with unions, not billionaires. That’s why it was such an honor to join **UFCW Local 400** this week to talk about what working families in Virginia truly need: _higher wages, affordable healthcare, and safe workplaces._ These are not radical ideas — they’re the foundation of a fair economy. **And it’s time our laws reflect the value of workers, not corporations.** But too many politicians in Richmond still side with corporations and lobbyists instead of the workers who keep our communities running. They talk about “economic growth,” but they forget that the true measure of our economy **_is how well it serves the people who make it run._** I’m running for the Virginia House to make sure our government finally works for **_us_** — not the wealthy few. **[If you believe in that vision, I need your help to get there. Chip in today to power this campaign for Virginia’s working families.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviLX1YooqCMF2L_ThIlv9qx_dpwIluWPSC9sZqNg51xqvohWm05-9xyZ07IvTSqrg1y4tIzWLIHE1mIv-vlGuMl_yAzXHw01_LmmtjjAc2Sv3GWa35qOFdOcEvtMIiYUw3ovbvDaqVzuUCu_NQqlZI1DBPAWk-RqTQZ7Yj-En3SbvWsUBjN3zNFvJxZzzkBxMnVzz6jA8U5pB7NlCU6AFy94/4l1/JUz5JDAtTbOl1svhIehxrQ/h1/h001.rGyPoMiH8J4Y3Rj4nmkTrEEDQ9LtaAQXS69AmGsSoIA)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Why I’m running
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I’m running to make life easier for our families and the future brighter for our kids.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5292%2E400544%2EpPDZeC)
In a moment, I’m going to ask if you can [**make a contribution**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251025_2_running.ubG6EO&amount=5&%3Brefcode=em20251025-5292&t=2&akid=5292%2E400544%2EpPDZeC) to our campaign. First, though, I want to share why I’m running for Governor of New Mexico.
As a 35th-generation New Mexican, I know firsthand the struggles that New Mexicans face. I understand what it's like to be a single mother, having to decide between rent and groceries, and struggling to keep a roof over your head.
**That struggle I experienced is why I’m running: to make life easier for families and the future brighter for our kids.**
My campaign is about lowering costs, making rent and housing affordable, strengthening our schools, and preventing crimes so that you feel safe raising a family here. This is the future we all want and deserve for our beautiful state.
The solutions are there if we are bold enough to choose them.
**But we have to build a strong campaign to get the future we deserve. I can’t do it alone, and I need your support now more than ever.**
We just learned that a Republican insider has joined this race — someone with a very different vision for New Mexico, one that would pull us backward.
**[That’s why I’m asking: Will you make a donation in this pivotal moment to help us make the critical campaign investments we need to get our message out and win this wide-open seat? I’m hoping to see your name on the list of people who pitch in to this email!](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251025_2_running.ubG6EO&amount=5&refcode=em20251025-5292&t=3&akid=5292%2E400544%2EpPDZeC)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251025_2_running.ubG6EO&amount=5&refcode=em20251025-5292&t=22&akid=5292%2E400544%2EpPDZeC)**
Thank you for your generosity and support.
Be fierce,
Deb
* * *

Peter, I'll keep this quick.
_Donald Trump endorsed my opponent the other day._
And guess what's happened since? Winsome has boasted about how wonderful Trump is, someone who is singularly responsible for laying off Virginia workers and cutting funds for our hospitals and schools.
Let me be clear: _I am the only Democrat running for Governor this year in a state controlled by Republicans._
We have the momentum to flip Virginia blue, but with Trump trying to tip the scales in this race, I need your help yet again.

clean_body: Peter, I'll keep this quick. Donald Trump endorsed my opponent the other day. And guess what's happened since? Winsome has boasted about how wonderful Trump is, someone who is singularly responsible for laying off Virginia workers and cutting funds for our hospitals and schools. Let me be clear: I am the only Democrat running for Governor this year in a state controlled by Republicans. We have the momentum to flip Virginia blue, but with Trump trying to tip the scales in this race, I need your help yet again. = = = = = = = Thanks for giving what you can, Abigail Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: The Democratic Party
subject: We want to be upfront with you...
body:

Derek, We’ve reached out several times asking for your help to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this fall, but so far, we haven’t been able to break through. We’ve sent messages from Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill. We’ve explained how we’ll invest your contribution in these final weeks to help Democrats win. If you can’t afford a contribution today, we completely understand. We hope you’ll just archive this email and keep in mind that your involvement and vote are essential, too. But if you can afford to make a contribution, we hope you’ll give us a chance to make one more request: The polls are very close. Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into states with upcoming elections. They’re hoping that we’re all too exhausted to fight back. We have to prove them wrong. And the truth is that we cannot reach the voters we’ll need to contact without many more people stepping up to make their first donation of 2025. That’s why we’re reaching out to you, Derek. If everyone who gets this email donated to the DNC today, we’d have the resources to expand our voter outreach efforts. But not everyone gives, so we’re reaching out to you directly. Democrats nationwide are counting on you.
